title: Decomposing Evolutionary Mixture-of-LoRA Architectures: The Routing Lever, the Lifecycle Penalty, and a Substrate-Conditional Boundary
summary: We decompose an evolutionary mixture-of-LoRA system on a from-scratch ~150M-parameter widened-D substrate (D=1536, V=32000; D/V approx 0.048; the "widened-1536" substrate) into three factors -- a router rewrite (parallel sigmoid gate with learnable per-adapter floor and bounded temperature anneal, fed post-stack hidden states rather than token-embedding means), a per-domain leave-one-out evaluation scope, and a lifecycle of death plus alpha-blend inheritance plus SVD mutation plus slot reallocation -- and report a 5-of-8 partial 2^3 factorial run at n=3 seeds and 25000 adaptation steps per cell. The attribution chain is sharp on this substrate: the router rewrite carries the entire +0.0426 nat balanced log-PPL improvement (Delta = log PPL_ref - log PPL_test, positive = improvement; t=12.86, p=0.006) attributed to "the full evolutionary system vs the static B3 baseline"; the headline full-system-vs-B3 balanced contrast itself is +0.015 nats, t=1.94, p=0.19 at n=3 and does not clear alpha=0.05. The per-domain evaluation scope is null at seed-resolution, and the lifecycle is a net drag of approx -0.028 nats (t=-4.46,p=0.047 in the primary chain). An auxiliary alpha=0 inheritance counterfactual at n=3 seeds is sign-inconsistent at the headline metric and underpowered for either an equivalence or load-bearing conclusion (corrected from an earlier arithmetic-mean aggregator that erroneously cleared inheritance; see Appendix B.11). A base-perturbation probe directionally refutes a "genomic-context" reframe of the lifecycle role. A controllable synthetic sandbox locates a substrate-conditional regime boundary: evolutionary search on the routing channel is load-bearing only when adapters are pre-aligned to the task; in every other regime tested it underperforms, ties, or actively degrades the gradient solution.

AI.tldr: 本文通过因子分解实验（5-of-8 2^3析因设计）系统分析了进化混合LoRA系统中的路由重写、评估范围和生命周期三个组件的贡献，发现路由重写是性能提升的核心驱动因素（+0.0426 nat），而生命周期反而造成净拖累（约-0.028 nat），且进化搜索仅在适配器预对齐任务的条件下才优于梯度方法。
AI.motivation: 现有进化混合LoRA系统在宽基座模型上展现出性能提升，但各组件（路由机制、评估策略、生命周期管理）的独立贡献尚不明确，缺乏系统性的归因分析来理解哪些设计因素真正驱动了性能改善。
AI.method: 在~150M参数widened-1536基座（D=1536, V=32000）上，将进化混合LoRA系统分解为三个因子：路由重写（并行sigmoid门控+可学习每适配器地板值+有界温度退火，使用堆叠后隐藏状态而非词嵌入均值）、每域留一法评估范围、以及包含死亡+alpha混合继承+SVD变异+槽位重分配的生命周期；采用5-of-8部分2^3析因设计，n=3种子，每细胞25000步适应。
AI.result: 路由重写贡献了完整进化系统相对于静态B3基线性能提升的全部+0.0426 nat平衡对数PPL改进（t=12.86, p=0.006）；完整系统vs B3的平衡对比为+0.015 nats（t=1.94, p=0.19），未通过alpha=0.05显著性检验；每域评估范围在种子分辨率下无效；生命周期造成约-0.028 nat净拖累（t=-4.46, p=0.047）；辅助alpha=0继承反事实实验在标题指标上符号不一致且统计功效不足；基扰动探针方向性反驳了生命周期的"基因组上下文"重构；合成沙箱发现进化搜索仅在适配器预对齐任务时起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 路由重写是进化混合LoRA系统性能提升的关键归因因子，而生命周期管理反而有害；进化搜索的收益具有强条件性，仅在适配器预对齐场景下优于梯度方法；研究强调了在复杂进化系统中进行严格因子分解归因的重要性，并提示简单继承机制可能带来负面影响。

title: ReAD: Reinforcement-Guided Capability Distillation for Large Language Models
summary: Capability distillation applies knowledge distillation to selected model capabilities, aiming to compress a large language model (LLM) into a smaller one while preserving the abilities needed for a downstream task. However, most existing methods treat capabilities as independent training targets and overlook how improving one capability can reshape the student's broader capability profile, especially when multiple abilities jointly determine task success. We study capability distillation under a fixed token budget and identify two consistent patterns: distillation induces systematic, budget-dependent cross-capability transfer, and additional budget often brings limited task-relevant gains while sometimes degrading other useful abilities. Building on these insights, we propose ReAD, a Reinforcement-guided cApability Distillation framework that explicitly accounts for capability interdependence. ReAD first infers task-essential capabilities, then generates capability-targeted supervision on the fly, and finally uses an uncertainty-aware contextual bandit to adaptively allocate the distillation budget based on expected utility gains. Extensive experiments show that ReAD improves downstream utility under the same token budget while reducing harmful spillover and wasted distillation effort compared to strong baselines. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/LabRAI/ReAD.

AI.tldr: ReAD 提出了一种基于强化引导的能力蒸馏框架，通过上下文赌博机自适应分配蒸馏预算，在固定 token 预算下提升了目标任务效用并减少了能力间的有害溢出与浪费。
AI.motivation: 现有能力蒸馏方法通常将不同能力视为独立的训练目标，忽略了能力间的相互影响；在固定 token 预算下，提升某一能力可能改变学生模型整体的能力分布，且额外预算往往带来有限的任务收益甚至损害其他有用能力。
AI.method: ReAD 首先通过推理识别任务关键能力，然后动态生成针对这些能力的目标监督信号，最后使用基于不确定性感知的上下文赌博机算法，根据预期效用增益自适应地分配蒸馏预算。
AI.result: 在相同 token 预算下，ReAD 在下游任务效用上优于强基线方法，同时有效减少了有害的能力间溢出效应和蒸馏资源的浪费。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了能力蒸馏中系统性的跨能力迁移模式与预算依赖特性，并验证了显式建模能力相互依赖关系在提升蒸馏效率与任务性能方面的有效性。

title: SOMA: Efficient Multi-turn LLM Serving via Small Language Model
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in multi-turn dialogue settings where preserving conversational context across turns is essential. A standard serving practice concatenates the full dialogue history at every turn, which reliably maintains coherence but incurs substantial cost in latency, memory, and API expenditure, especially when queries are routed to large proprietary models. Existing approaches often struggle to balance the trade-off between response quality and efficiency. We propose a framework that exploits the early turns of a session to estimate a local response manifold and then adapt a smaller surrogate model to this local region for the remainder of the conversation. Concretely, we learn soft prompts that maximize semantic divergence between the large and surrogate small language models' responses to surface least-aligned local directions, stabilize training with anti-degeneration control, and distill the mined cases into localized LoRA fine-tuning so the surrogate runs without prompts at inference. A simple gate enables a one-time switch with rollback on drift. We further provide a theoretical analysis for key components in SOMA. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of SOMA. The source code is provided at: https://github.com/LabRAI/SOMA.

AI.tldr: 提出SOMA框架，利用对话早期回合估计局部响应流形，通过对齐与反退化训练将大型语言模型的知识蒸馏到小型代理模型中，在保持响应质量的同时显著降低多轮对话的推理成本。
AI.motivation: 在多轮对话场景中，标准做法是每轮拼接完整对话历史，这虽能保持连贯性但导致了高延迟、高内存消耗和高API调用成本；现有方法难以有效兼顾响应质量与推理效率，亟需一种能在大模型与小模型之间实现高效知识迁移且不牺牲对话质量的框架。
AI.method: 提出SOMA框架，包含以下核心组件：1) 利用对话早期回合估计局部响应流形，学习软提示最大化大模型与小模型之间的语义分歧以发现对齐最差的局部方向；2) 引入反退化控制稳定训练过程；3) 将挖掘出的困难案例蒸馏为局部的LoRA微调，使得代理模型在推理时无需额外提示；4) 设计简单门控机制实现一次性切换并支持回滚以防止漂移；同时提供了关键组件的理论分析。
AI.result: 在多种多轮对话基准上的大量实验验证了SOMA框架的有效性，在显著降低推理成本的同时保持了与使用完整对话历史的大模型相当或接近的响应质量，表明局部流形估计与定向蒸馏策略能够有效弥合大小模型之间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: SOMA通过局部流形估计与定向蒸馏，在不牺牲对话质量的前提下大幅降低多轮对话的部署成本，为大小模型协同推理提供了新的理论支撑与实用方案；未来可进一步探索更高效的局部适应策略及跨领域的泛化能力。

title: An Empirical Study of Automating Agent Evaluation
summary: Agent evaluation requires assessing complex multi-step behaviors involving tool use and intermediate reasoning, making it costly and expertise-intensive. A natural question arises: can frontier coding assistants reliably automate this evaluation process? Our study shows that simply prompting coding assistants is insufficient for this task. Without domain-specific evaluation knowledge, frontier coding assistants achieve only a 30% execution success rate and produce over-engineered evaluations averaging 12+ metrics per agent, indicating that strong coding ability does not automatically translate to reliable agent evaluation. We introduce EvalAgent, an AI assistant that automates the end-to-end agent evaluation pipeline. EvalAgent encodes evaluation domain expertise as evaluation skills (procedural instructions, reusable code and templates, and dynamically retrieved API documentation) that compose into a trace-based pipeline producing complete evaluation artifacts including metrics, executable code, and reports. To systematically assess generated evaluations, we introduce a meta-evaluation framework alongside AgentEvalBench, a benchmark comprising 20 agents, each paired with evaluation requirements and test scenarios. We further propose the Eval@1 metric to measure whether generated evaluation code both executes and yields meaningful results on the first run. Our experiments show that EvalAgent produces focused evaluations, improving Eval@1 from 17.5% to 65%, and achieving 79.5% human expert preference over baseline approaches. Further ablation studies show that evaluation skills are critical for handling complex evaluation: removing them causes Eval@1 to drop significantly from 65% to 30%.

AI.tldr: 提出EvalAgent，一个自动化智能体评估流程的AI助手，通过编码领域评估知识为评估技能（程序化指令、可复用代码与模板、动态检索的API文档），将评估的首次执行成功率（Eval@1）从17.5%提升至65%，并在79.5%的情况下获得人类专家偏好。
AI.motivation: 智能体评估需要评估涉及工具使用和中间推理的复杂多步行为，成本高昂且依赖专家经验。研究发现，即使是最前沿的编程助手，仅靠简单提示也无法可靠地自动化这一评估过程：其执行成功率仅30%，且平均每个智能体产出超过12项过度设计的评估指标，表明强大的编码能力并不能自动转化为可靠的智能体评估能力。
AI.method: 本文提出EvalAgent，它将评估领域的专家知识编码为评估技能，包括程序化指令、可复用代码与模板以及动态检索的API文档，这些技能组合成基于轨迹的评估流水线，能够自动生成完整的评估产出物（指标、可执行代码和报告）。为系统性地评估所生成的评估质量，作者提出了元评估框架以及包含20个智能体及其评估需求与测试场景的基准AgentEvalBench，并引入Eval@1指标衡量生成的评估代码在首次运行时能否执行并产出有意义的结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，EvalAgent能够生成聚焦且有效的评估：Eval@1从基线方法的17.5%提升至65%，在79.5%的情况下获得人类专家相对于基线方法的首选。消融实验进一步显示，评估技能对于处理复杂评估至关重要，移除它们会使Eval@1从65%显著下降至30%。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实，仅凭强大的编码能力不足以胜任智能体评估任务，而通过结构化地编码评估领域知识可以显著提升自动化评估的可靠性与质量。EvalAgent展示了将领域专家知识系统化集成到自动化评估流程中的有效性，为智能体评估自动化提供了可行的技术路径。

title: EVOCHAMBER: Test-Time Co-evolution of Multi-Agent System at Individual, Team, and Population Scales
summary: We argue that multi-agent test-time evolution is not single-agent evolution replicated N times. A single-agent learner can only evolve its own context and memory. A multi-agent system additionally evolves who collaborates, how they collaborate, and how knowledge flows across the population. These components have no single-agent counterpart and can produce phenomena such as emergent specialization. Yet prior test-time methods either confine experiences to individual agents, forfeiting cross-agent learning, or broadcast symmetrically to all agents, erasing the specialization that makes collaboration valuable. We present EVOCHAMBER, a training-free framework that instantiates test-time evolution at three levels over a coevolving agent pool. At its core is CODREAM (Collaborative Dreaming), a post-task protocol triggered on team failure or disagreement, in which agents collaboratively reflect, distill insights, and route them asymmetrically from strong to weak agents on the failed niche, preserving specialization while filling knowledge gaps. Team-level operators assemble niche-conditioned teams and select collaboration structures online. Population-level lifecycle operators fork, merge, prune, and seed agents under performance pressure. On three heterogeneous task streams with Qwen3-8B, EVOCHAMBER reaches 63.9% on competition math, 75.7% on code, and 87.1% on multi-domain reasoning, outperforming the best baseline by 32% relative on math and confirming asymmetric cross-agent transfer as the primary driver in ablation. Starting from several identically initialized agents, four to five stable niche specialists spontaneously emerge, a structural signature of multi-agent evolution that no single-agent learner can express. See our code at: https://github.com/Mercury7353/EvoChamber

AI.tldr: EVOCHAMBER是一个无需训练的测试时多智能体进化框架，通过CODREAM协议实现跨智能体的非对称知识迁移和自发专业化分工，在数学、代码和多领域推理任务上显著超越基线，验证了多智能体进化的独特结构优势。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时方法将多智能体系统视为单智能体经验的N次重复，无法捕获协作结构、知识流动和专业化分工等多智能体独有的进化现象；要么将经验隔离在单智能体内丧失跨智能体学习，要么对称广播给所有智能体从而消除使协作有价值的专业分化。
AI.method: EVOCHAMBER提出三层测试时进化框架：核心是CODREAM（协作式梦镜）协议，在团队失败或出现分歧时触发智能体协同反思、提炼洞察，并将知识从强智能体非对称地路由到弱智能体以填补盲区；团队层算子在线组装基于场景的团队并选择协作结构；种群层生命周期算子根据性能压力对智能体进行fork、merge、prune和seed操作。
AI.result: 在三个异构任务流上使用Qwen3-8B，EVOCHAMBER在竞赛数学达到63.9%、代码75.7%、多领域推理87.1%，数学任务相对最优基线提升32%；消融实验证实非对称跨智能体迁移是主要驱动因素；从多个相同初始化的智能体出发，自发涌现出4-5个稳定的场景专业化分工。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多智能体测试时进化并非单智能体进化的简单堆叠，自发专业化和非对称知识迁移是多智能体系统独有的结构特征；为无需训练的测试时自适应和多智能体协作提供了新的范式。

title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together: Background-Invariant Representations via Linear Structure in VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs), such as CLIP and SigLIP 2, are widely used for image classification, yet their vision encoders remain vulnerable to systematic biases that undermine robustness. In particular, correlations between foreground objects and their backgrounds constitute a salient and practically important class of spurious dependencies. In this work, we revisit the well-known property of high linear additivity in VLM embedding spaces and show that it enables a decomposition of scene representations into foreground and background components. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a pre-training approach that exploits this property to construct background-invariant representations using synthetic data. Our method achieves, to our knowledge, the first worst-group accuracy exceeding $90\%$ on Waterbirds under perfect ($100\%$) spurious correlation (i.e., no minority-group examples in the training data). Furthermore, it demonstrates strong sim-to-real transfer and requires no access to real-world debiased data, making it practical for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文利用视觉-语言模型嵌入空间的高线性可加性，将场景表示分解为前景和背景分量，并提出一种基于合成数据的预训练方法构建背景不变表示，首次在100%虚假相关（训练数据中无少数群组样本）的Waterbirds数据集上实现了超过90%的最差群组准确率。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型的视觉编码器容易受到系统性偏见的影响，其中前景物体与其背景之间的虚假相关是一类突出且实际重要的依赖关系，严重损害了模型的鲁棒性，亟需有效的去偏方法。
AI.method: 基于视觉-语言模型嵌入空间具有高线性可加性这一特性，将场景表示分解为前景和背景两个线性分量；利用合成数据构建背景不变表示，通过预训练方式使模型学习不依赖于特定背景的特征表达。
AI.result: 在Waterbirds数据集上，当训练数据存在100%虚假相关（即完全无少数群组样本）的极端设置下，该方法首次实现了超过90%的最差群组准确率；同时展现出强大的从合成到真实场景的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需访问真实世界中的去偏数据，具备实际部署的可行性，为在极端虚假相关条件下实现鲁棒的视觉分类提供了有效路径。

title: Deep Reasoning in General Purpose Agents via Structured Meta-Cognition
summary: Humans intuitively solve complex problems by flexibly shifting among reasoning modes: they plan, execute, revise intermediate goals, resolve ambiguity through associative judgment, and apply formal procedures to well-specified subproblems. Current LLM agents lack this flexibility, as their scaffolds hard-code such reasoning decisions in advance. These scaffolds are effective when their prescribed structure matches the task, but brittle when solving the task requires adapting the structure of reasoning itself. We introduce Deep Reasoning -- an inference-time approach for constructing task-specific scaffolds through structured meta-reasoning. Deep Reasoning uses a formal language that represents meta-reasoning as executable decompositions over associative inference, formal computation, and recursive subproblem solving, enabling decomposition principles to be encoded as in-context examples that guide test-time scaffold construction. We instantiate this approach in a general-purpose agent (DOLORES) that distributes complex tasks across more controlled reasoning threads. We evaluate it against state-of-the-art scaffolding methods across four hard benchmarks: multi-hop reasoning, long-chain question answering, long-context aggregation, and deep research-style information seeking. DOLORES outperforms all evaluated scaffolds across three model sizes and two model families, improving over the strongest evaluated scaffold baseline by 24.8% on average. DOLORES distributes cognition across structured, lower-load reasoning threads, thereby reducing premature termination and hallucinations. This advantage can even bridge the scaling gap, with an 8B version surpassing all evaluated 32B baselines from the same family in more than half the settings. These results point toward future agentic systems that treat scaffolding as adaptive reasoning, constructing the structure each task requires just-in-time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deep Reasoning方法，通过结构化元推理在推理阶段为LLM智能体构建任务特定的推理框架，其实现的DOLORES智能体在多个复杂推理基准上显著优于现有方法，甚至让小模型跨越规模差距超越大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体依赖硬编码的固定推理框架（scaffolds），虽然对结构匹配的任务有效，但在需要根据任务动态调整推理结构时表现脆弱，缺乏人类在不同推理模式间灵活切换的能力。
AI.method: 提出Deep Reasoning方法，通过形式化语言将元推理表示为可执行的分解结构，涵盖联想推理、形式化计算和递归子问题求解；该方法将分解原则编码为上下文示例，在测试时指导任务特定框架的构建。具体实现为通用智能体DOLORES，将复杂任务分布到多个受控推理线程中执行。
AI.result: 在多跳推理、长链问答、长上下文聚合和深度研究式信息检索四个困难基准上，DOLORES在三种模型规模和两种模型家族下均优于所有评估的基线框架，平均改进幅度达24.8%；DOLORES通过结构化低负载推理线程减少了过早终止和幻觉，甚至使8B版本在超半数设置下超越同系列的32B基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将智能体框架视为自适应推理过程、按需即时构建任务所需结构是一种有前景的方向，为未来构建更灵活、可伸缩的智能体系统提供了新的范式。

title: OLIVIA: Online Learning via Inference-time Action Adaptation for Decision Making in LLM ReAct Agents
summary: Large language model agents interleave reasoning, action selection, and observation to solve sequential decision-making tasks. In deployed settings where agents repeatedly handle related multi-step tasks, small action-selection errors can accumulate into wasted tool calls, latency, and reduced reliability. Despite this need for deployment-time improvement, existing inference-time adaptation methods for LLM agents mainly rely on prompting or retrieval, which influence behavior indirectly through context manipulation. For ReAct-style agents, such approaches do not expose an explicit decision layer that can score candidate actions, represent uncertainty, or be updated online from action-level feedback. As a result, they provide limited support for trackable, fine-grained, and uncertainty-aware adaptation during deployment. We propose OLIVIA, an inference-time action adaptation framework for ReAct-style agents. OLIVIA models the LLM's final action-selection layer as a contextual linear bandit over candidate actions, with frozen hidden states as decision contexts. This choice is particularly suitable for deployment because it adapts behavior directly at the action-selection interface, preserves the underlying reasoning process, and provides explicit uncertainty estimates and lightweight online updates from action-level feedback. With upper-confidence-bound exploration, OLIVIA improves the policy sample-efficiently with minimal computational overhead. We instantiate OLIVIA on four benchmarks and show that it consistently improves task performance over static ReAct and prompt-based inference-time baselines. Our results suggest that explicit online decision layers provide an effective alternative to purely prompt- or retrieval-based adaptation for LLM agents during deployment.

AI.tldr: OLIVIA 提出将 ReAct 风格 LLM 智能体的最终动作选择层建模为上下文线性赌博机，利用冻结的隐藏状态作为决策上下文，通过上置信界探索实现轻量级在线更新，从而在部署阶段高效、可追踪且具有不确定性感知地适应动作选择。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体在部署中反复处理多步任务时，小的动作选择错误会累积导致工具调用浪费、延迟增加和可靠性下降，而现有的推理时自适应方法主要依赖提示或检索，通过上下文操纵间接影响行为，无法显式表示候选动作的得分、不确定性或从动作级反馈进行在线更新，缺乏细粒度、可追踪且具有不确定性感知的部署时自适应能力。
AI.method: OLIVIA 将 ReAct 风格 LLM 智能体的最终动作选择层建模为上下文线性赌博机，将 LLM 输出的隐藏状态作为决策上下文，候选动作作为臂，并采用上置信界（UCB）策略进行探索；该方法保留底层推理过程不变，仅在动作选择接口处直接自适应，支持基于动作级反馈的轻量级在线更新和显式不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在四个基准任务上的实验表明，OLIVIA 在任务性能上一致优于静态 ReAct 和基于提示的推理时自适应基线方法，且仅引入极小的计算开销，能够样本高效地改进策略。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，显式的在线决策层为 LLM 智能体在部署阶段的动作自适应提供了比纯提示或检索式方法更有效的替代方案，兼具不确定性量化、可追踪更新和轻量级部署等优势。

title: Hi-GaTA: Hierarchical Gated Temporal Aggregation Adapter for Surgical Video Report Generation
summary: Automated, clinician-grade assessment reports for surgical procedures could reduce documentation burden and provide objective feedback, yet remain challenging due to the difficulty of aligning dense spatio-temporal video representations with language-based reasoning and the scarcity of high-quality, privacy-preserving datasets. To address this gap, we establish a benchmark comprising 214 high-quality simulated surgical videos paired with surgeon-authored evaluation reports. Building on this resource, we propose a Perception-Alignment-Reasoning framework for surgical video report generation, featuring Hi-GaTA, a novel lightweight temporal adapter that efficiently compresses long video sequences into compact, LLM-compatible visual prefix tokens through short-to-long-range temporal aggregation. For robust visual perception, we pretrain Sur40k, a surgical-specific ViViT-style video encoder on 40,000 minutes of public surgical videos to capture fine-grained spatio-temporal procedural priors. Hi-GaTA employs a temporal pyramid with text-conditioned dual cross-attention, and improves multi-scale consistency through cross-level gated fusion and an increasing-depth strategy. Finally, we fine-tune the LLM backbone using LoRA to enable coherent and stylistically consistent surgical report generation under limited supervision. Experiments show our approach achieves the best overall performance, with consistent gains over strong Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) baselines. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each proposed component.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个面向外科手术视频报告生成的感知-对齐-推理框架，通过构建214对模拟手术视频-报告基准、预训练手术专用视频编码器Sur40k以及设计轻量级时序适配器Hi-GaTA，实现了高效的长视频时序聚合与LLM对齐，在有限监督下生成风格一致的手术评估报告。
AI.motivation: 自动生成临床级外科手术评估报告能够减少医生文书负担并提供客观反馈，但现有方法面临两大挑战：一是密集的时空视频表示与基于语言的推理之间难以对齐，二是高质量且保护隐私的手术视频-报告配对数据集极度稀缺。
AI.method: 论文提出了一个感知-对齐-推理三阶段框架：首先，在感知阶段预训练了一个手术专用的ViViT风格视频编码器Sur40k（基于4万分钟公开手术视频），以捕获细粒度的时空过程先验；其次，在对齐阶段设计了轻量级时序适配器Hi-GaTA，通过短到长范围时序聚合的时序金字塔结构、文本条件双交叉注意力机制、跨层级门控融合以及递增深度策略，将长视频序列高效压缩为LLM兼容的视觉前缀令牌；最后，在推理阶段使用LoRA对LLM骨干进行微调，在有限监督下实现连贯且风格一致的手术报告生成。
AI.result: 在包含214对高质量模拟手术视频与外科医生撰写评估报告的基准上，该方法在所有评价指标上取得了最佳整体性能，持续优于强多模态大语言模型基线，消融实验进一步验证了每个提出组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过构建专用基准数据集和设计高效时序压缩模块，验证了将长视频手术过程与LLM进行有效对齐的可行性，为自动化手术报告生成提供了实用框架，暗示了面向医疗专业领域的视频-语言多模态推理的重要方向。

title: Agent-BRACE: Decoupling Beliefs from Actions in Long-Horizon Tasks via Verbalized State Uncertainty
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks in partially observable environments, where they must act while inferring and tracking a complex environment state over many steps. This leads to two challenges: partial observability requires maintaining uncertainty over unobserved world attributes, and long interaction history causes context to grow without bound, diluting task-relevant information. A principled solution to both challenges is a belief state: a posterior distribution over environment states given past observations and actions, which compactly encodes history for decision making regardless of episode length. In LLM agents, however, the open-ended nature of text makes it unclear how to represent such a distribution. Therefore, we introduce Agent-BRACE: Agent Belief state Representation via Abstraction and Confidence Estimation, a method that decouples an LLM agent into a belief state model and a policy model, jointly optimized via reinforcement learning. The belief state model produces a structured approximation of the belief distribution: a set of atomic natural language claims about the environment, each annotated with an ordinal verbalized certainty label ranging from certain to unknown. The policy model conditions on this compact, structured approximate belief rather than the full history, learning to select actions under explicit uncertainty. Across long-horizon, partially observable embodied language environments, Agent-BRACE achieves an average absolute improvement of +14.5% (Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct) and +5.3% (Qwen3-4B-Instruct), outperforming strong RL baselines while maintaining a near-constant context window independent of episode length. Further analysis shows that the learned belief becomes increasingly calibrated over the course of an episode as evidence accumulates.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent-BRACE方法，将LLM智能体解耦为信念状态模型和策略模型，通过强化学习联合优化；信念状态模型以带确定性标签的自然语言原子断言近似信念分布，使智能体在部分可观察的长时域任务中保持近恒定上下文窗口，并在多个具身语言环境中取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: LLM在部分可观察的长时域任务中面临两个核心挑战：一是部分可观察性要求智能体对未观测的世界属性维持不确定性；二是长交互历史导致上下文无限增长，稀释任务相关信息。现有方法缺乏在开放文本环境中表示信念状态（即给定历史后环境状态的后验分布）的有效手段。
AI.method: 提出Agent-BRACE框架，将LLM智能体解耦为信念状态模型和策略模型，通过强化学习联合优化。信念状态模型生成结构化近似信念分布：一组关于环境的原子自然语言断言，每条断言附带从"确定"到"未知"的序数口头置信度标签。策略模型基于该紧凑结构化的近似信念（而非完整历史）进行决策。
AI.result: 在长时域、部分可观察的具身语言环境中，Agent-BRACE在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct上取得+14.5%的平均绝对提升，在Qwen3-4B-Instruct上取得+5.3%的绝对提升，优于强强化学习基线，同时保持与回合长度无关的近恒定上下文窗口。进一步分析表明，随着回合推进证据累积，所学信念的校准度逐步提高。
AI.conclusion: 结构化信念状态表示结合置信度估计能有效解决LLM在部分可观察长时域任务中的历史压缩和不确定性管理问题，信念状态的可校准性验证了该方法在长期推理中的可靠性，为构建基于信念的LLM智能体提供了可行范式。

title: Don't Look at the Numbers: Visual Anchoring Bias and Layer-wise Representation in VLMs
summary: Embedded numeric anchors on images systematically bias Vision-Language Model quality judgments across six VLMs from five architectural families (ANOVA eta^2 = 0.18-0.77, all p < 0.001). Anchor effects are 2.5x larger than severe image quality degradation, confirming bias is not reducible to visual changes. Layer-wise probing reveals consistent dissociation: layers where anchor classification saturates (L12-L34) are suboptimal for quality prediction, with optimal layers deeper (R^2 = 0.69-0.91). Fusion analysis identifies architecture-dependent integration -- instant fusion at L1-L2 in two models versus partial or no fusion in three others. These results establish a causal account of visual anchoring bias, linking behavioral susceptibility to representation dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文系统揭示了嵌入图像中的数字锚点会显著偏差视觉-语言模型的质量判断，锚效应比严重图像质量退化大2.5倍，并通过逐层探针和融合分析建立了锚点偏差的因果机制，发现行为易感性与表征动力学之间的关联。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）在多模态任务中容易受到图像中嵌入数值信息的干扰，但这类锚定偏差的深层机制尚不明确，特别是其是否可归因于视觉质量变化以及如何在模型内部表征层面运作仍属空白。
AI.method: 研究选取了来自五个架构家族的六个VLM，通过嵌入数字锚点的图像进行质量判断实验；采用ANOVA分析评估锚定效应大小，通过逐层探针（layer-wise probing）分析锚分类饱和层与质量预测最优层之间的分离关系，并利用融合分析识别不同模型架构中锚点信息与质量信息的整合模式。
AI.result: 锚定效应在所有模型中显著（ANOVA eta^2=0.18-0.77, p<0.001），效应量是严重图像质量退化的2.5倍；锚分类在L12-L34层饱和，而质量预测的最优层更深（R^2=0.69-0.91）；融合分析揭示了架构依赖的整合模式：两个模型在L1-L2层即时融合，三个模型表现为部分融合或无融合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次建立了视觉锚定偏差的因果解释框架，将行为层面的易感性与模型内部表征动力学联系起来，揭示了锚点信息与质量信息在不同架构中以不同方式融合，为理解和缓解VLM中的数值锚定偏差提供了理论基础。

title: ABRA: Agent Benchmark for Radiology Applications
summary: Existing medical-agent benchmarks deliver imaging as pre-selected samples, never as an environment the agent must navigate. We introduce ABRA, a radiology-agent benchmark in which the agent operates an OHIF viewer and an Orthanc DICOM server through twenty-one function-calling tools that span slice navigation, windowing, series selection, pixel-coordinate annotation, and structured reporting. ABRA contains 655 programmatically generated tasks across three difficulty tiers and eight types (viewer control, metadata QA, vision probe, annotation, longitudinal comparison, BI-RADS reporting, and oracle variants of annotation and BI-RADS reporting), drawn from LIDC-IDRI, Duke Breast Cancer MRI, and NLST New-Lesion LongCT. Each episode is scored along Planning, Execution, and Outcome (Bluethgen et al., 2025) by task-type-specific automatic scorers. Ten current models, five closed-weight and five open-weight, reach at least 89% Execution on real annotation but only 0-25% Outcome; on the paired oracle variant where a simulated detector supplies the finding, Outcome on the same task reaches 69-100% across the models evaluated, localising the bottleneck to perception rather than tool orchestration. Code, task generators, and scorers are released at https://github.com/Luab/ABRA

AI.tldr: ABRA 是一个针对放射学智能体的基准测试，要求智能体通过 21 个函数调用工具操作真实的 DICOM 查看器和服务器。实验表明，当前模型在执行层面表现良好（89%），但在任务结果层面（0-25%）表现极差，而引入模拟检测器后结果大幅提升至 69-100%，揭示了感知能力而非工具编排能力是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学智能体基准测试仅将影像作为预选样本提供给模型，而非让智能体在真实的影像查看和导航环境中自主操作。本文旨在填补这一空白，构建一个要求智能体通过函数调用实际操控 OHIF 查看器和 Orthanc DICOM 服务器的放射学智能体基准，以更真实地评估其临床任务执行能力。
AI.method: ABRA 基准测试包含 655 个程序化生成的任务，涵盖三个难度层级和八种任务类型（查看器控制、元数据问答、视觉探测、标注、纵向比较、BI-RADS 报告及其对应的 oracle 变体），数据来源于 LIDC-IDRI、Duke Breast Cancer MRI 和 NLST New-Lesion LongCT 三个公开数据集。每个智能体通过 21 个函数调用工具与 OHIF 查看器和 Orthanc DICOM 服务器交互，任务评分沿 Planning、Execution 和 Outcome 三个维度由任务类型特定的自动评分器完成。
AI.result: 对十个当前主流模型（五个闭源、五个开源）的评估显示，在真实标注任务上所有模型的 Execution 评分均达到 89% 以上，但 Outcome 评分仅 0-25%；而在引入模拟检测器提供病灶位置的 oracle 变体中，同一任务的 Outcome 评分提升至 69-100%。这一显著差距明确将性能瓶颈定位在模型的感知能力而非工具编排能力上。
AI.conclusion: ABRA 基准测试揭示了当前 AI 模型在真实放射学工作流中的核心瓶颈：工具调用和执行能力已较为成熟，但视觉感知能力严重不足，无法自主完成需要从影像中识别病灶的关键临床任务。这一发现为未来医学视觉-语言模型和智能体的研究指明了改进方向，即应重点提升模型的底层视觉感知能力。

title: StoicLLM: Preference Optimization for Philosophical Alignment in Small Language Models
summary: While large language models excel at factual adaptation, their ability to internalize nuanced philosophical frameworks under severe data constraints remains underexplored. We investigate this by specializing small LLMs on micro-datasets of foundational Stoic texts using preference optimization (ORPO, AlphaPO). Evaluated via a multi-model critic bank, our results show that just 300 high-fidelity examples can induce strong alignment with inward-facing Stoic virtues, closely approaching few-shot prompting while freeing the context window. Critically, however, all models, including few-shot baselines, exhibit a persistent failure on Stoicism's outward-facing cosmopolitan duties, pointing to a representational limitation of small models that micro-dataset adaptation alone cannot overcome.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了使用仅300条高质量数据的微型数据集，通过偏好优化（ORPO、AlphaPO）对小型LLM进行斯多葛哲学思想微调。结果表明模型在内向美德上能接近少样本提示性能，但在外向宇宙主义义务上存在系统性失败，揭示了小模型在微型数据集适应中的表征局限。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在事实性知识适应方面表现优异，但其在极端数据约束下内化复杂哲学框架的能力尚缺乏系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究小型LLM能否通过极小规模数据学习斯多葛哲学这类细致的思想体系。
AI.method: 研究基于小型LLM，使用斯多葛基础文本构建的微型数据集（300条高质量样本），采用偏好优化方法（ORPO和AlphaPO）进行专门化微调。模型对齐效果通过一个多模型批评家银行（multi-model critic bank）体系进行评估，以衡量模型对斯多葛哲学理念的内化程度。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅300条高质量样本即可诱导模型与斯多葛内向美德（inward-facing virtues）的强对齐，性能接近少样本提示方法，同时释放了上下文窗口。然而，所有模型——包括少样本基线——在斯多葛外向宇宙主义义务（outward-facing cosmopolitan duties）上均表现出持续性失败。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，偏好优化结合微型数据集能够有效传递哲学框架中的部分核心理念，但小模型在表征某些外向性哲学义务上存在固有局限，这种局限性无法仅通过微型数据集适应来克服。这为模型容量与哲学推理能力之间的关系提供了重要洞见。

title: Do Vision-Language-Models show human-like logical problem-solving capability in point and click puzzle games?
summary: Vision-Language(-Action) Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to interactive environments, yet existing benchmarks often overlook the complex physical reasoning required for point-and-click puzzle games. This paper introduces Vision-Language Against The Incredible Machine (VLATIM), a benchmark designed to evaluate human-like logical problem-solving capabilities within the classic physics puzzle game The Incredible Machine 2 (TIM). Unlike existing benchmarks, VLATIM specifically targets the critical gap between high-level logical reasoning and continuous action spaces requiring precise mouse interactions. This benchmark is structured into five progressive parts, assessing capabilities that range from basic visual grounding and domain understanding to multi-step manipulation and full puzzle solving. Our results reveal a significant disparity between reasoning and execution. While large proprietary models demonstrate superior planning abilities, they struggle with precise visual grounding. Consequently, they do not yet show human-like problem-solving capabilities.

AI.tldr: VLATIM是一个基于物理谜题游戏《The Incredible Machine 2》的基准测试，用于评估视觉-语言模型在需要连续动作空间精确鼠标交互的物理推理任务中的逻辑问题求解能力。实验发现，大型专有模型在规划能力上表现优异，但在精确视觉定位上存在显著不足，尚未达到人类水平的问题求解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型基准测试往往忽略了点按式解谜游戏中所需的复杂物理推理能力，特别是高层级逻辑推理与需要精确鼠标交互的连续动作空间之间存在关键差距，VLATIM旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: VLATIM基准测试基于经典物理解谜游戏《The Incredible Machine 2》(TIM)构建，包含五个渐进式部分，评估能力从基础视觉定位和领域理解逐步递进到多步操作和完整解谜，旨在系统评估VLM在物理推理与精确交互结合场景下的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，推理与执行之间存在显著差距：大型专有模型在高层规划能力上表现优越，但在精确视觉定位任务上表现不佳，整体尚未展现出人类级别的逻辑问题求解能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉-语言模型在需要将高层级逻辑推理与精确连续动作控制相结合的物理推理任务中仍存在明显不足，尤其是在视觉定位精度方面亟待改进，这为未来VLM在交互式环境中的应用指明了关键瓶颈。

title: DenseTRF: Texture-Aware Unsupervised Representation Adaptation for Surgical Scene Dense Prediction
comment: Accepted to 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2026)
summary: Dense prediction tasks in surgical computer vision, such as segmentation and surgical zone prediction, can provide valuable guidance for laparoscopic and robotic surgery. However, these models often suffer from distribution shifts, as training datasets rarely cover the variability encountered during deployment, leading to poor generalization. We propose DenseTRF, a self-supervised representation adaptation framework based on texture-centric attention. Our method leverages slot attention to learn texture-aware representations that capture invariant visual structures. By adapting these representations to the target distribution without supervision, DenseTRF significantly improves robustness to domain shifts. The framework is implemented through conditioning dense prediction on slot attention and model merging strategies. Experiments across multiple surgical procedures demonstrate improved cross-distribution generalization in comparison to state-of-the-art segmentation models and test-distribution adaptation methods for dense prediction tasks.

AI.tldr: DenseTRF 提出了一种基于纹理中心注意力（slot attention）的自监督表示自适应框架，通过将稠密预测模型的条件建立在纹理感知的槽注意力表示上并采用模型合并策略，显著提升了手术场景下跨分布泛化的鲁棒性，在多个手术流程中优于现有分割模型和测试域自适应方法。
AI.motivation: 手术计算机视觉中的稠密预测任务（如分割和手术区域预测）在部署时常面临训练数据覆盖不足导致的分布偏移问题，现有模型在跨分布泛化方面表现不佳，缺乏有效的无监督域自适应方法来提升模型对纹理等不变视觉结构的鲁棒性。
AI.method: DenseTRF 采用基于纹理中心注意力（slot attention）的自监督表示自适应框架，通过 slot attention 学习纹理感知的表示以捕获不变的视觉结构，并利用模型合并策略将稠密预测模型的条件建立在这些表示之上，从而无需监督即可将表示自适应到目标分布。
AI.result: 在多个手术流程的实验表明，DenseTRF 在跨分布泛化方面优于当前最先进的分割模型和测试分布自适应方法，显著提升了对域偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了纹理感知的槽注意力表示在提升稠密预测模型跨分布泛化能力方面的有效性，为手术场景下的无监督域自适应提供了新思路，暗示了注意力机制与表示学习结合在鲁棒视觉理解中的潜力。

title: A Study on Hidden Layer Distillation for Large Language Model Pre-Training
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a critical tool for training Large Language Models (LLMs), yet the majority of research focuses on approaches that rely solely on output logits, neglecting semantic information in the teacher's intermediate representations. While Hidden Layer Distillation (HLD) showed potential for encoder architectures, its application to decoder-only pre-training at scale remains largely unexplored. Through compute-controlled experiments, we benchmark HLD against logit-based KD and self-supervised baselines with Gemma3 3.4B as teacher and 123M and 735M students trained on up to 168B tokens from the C4 dataset. Our experiments show that HLD does not consistently outperform standard KD on downstream evaluation tasks. Nevertheless, we show that HLD can yield a systematic perplexity gain over KD across all shared-hyperparameter configurations, suggesting that a latent signal can be extracted, but a breakthrough may be needed for it to play a more significant role in LLM pre-training.

AI.tldr: 本文系统对比了隐层蒸馏与基于logits的知识蒸馏在解码器-only大语言模型预训练中的效果，发现隐层蒸馏虽能带来一致但微小的困惑度提升，却未能在下游任务上持续优于标准知识蒸馏，表明其潜力需进一步突破才能发挥更大作用。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏研究主要依赖输出logits，忽略了教师模型中间表示中的语义信息；隐层蒸馏在编码器架构上展现出潜力，但在解码器-only架构的大规模预训练中仍缺乏系统探索。
AI.method: 在计算量可控的实验设置下，以Gemma3 3.4B为教师模型、123M和735M参数的学生模型，在C4数据集上训练最多168B tokens，系统对比了隐层蒸馏、基于logits的知识蒸馏以及自监督基线方法。
AI.result: 隐层蒸馏在下游评估任务上并未一致优于标准知识蒸馏，但在所有共享超参数配置下，隐层蒸馏相比知识蒸馏能带来系统的困惑度提升。
AI.conclusion: 隐层蒸馏确实能从教师中间表示中提取潜在的信号，但需要更根本的方法突破才能在大型语言模型预训练中发挥更显著的作用。

title: PIVOT: Bridging Planning and Execution in LLM Agents via Trajectory Refinement
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based agents frequently generate seemingly coherent plans that fail upon execution due to infeasible actions, constraint violations, and compounding errors over extended horizons. PIVOT (Plan-Inspect-eVOlve Trajectories) addresses this plan-execution misalignment through a self-supervised framework that treats trajectories as optimizable objects iteratively refined via environment interaction. The framework comprises four stages: PLAN generates candidate trajectories; INSPECT executes them and computes structured losses with textual gradients encoding plan-execution discrepancies; EVOLVE applies these signals to produce improved trajectories; and VERIFY performs a final global check against task constraints. A monotonic acceptance process ensures a non-decreasing solution quality. Empirical evaluations on DeepPlanning and GAIA demonstrate state-of-the-art performance: with human-in-the-loop (HITL) feedback, PIVOT establishes a strong upper bound up to 94% relative improvement in constraint satisfaction, while its fully autonomous variant retains substantial gains, showing that the core trajectory-refinement mechanism remains effective without external supervision. At the same time, PIVOT remains computationally efficient, requiring up to 3x to 5x fewer tokens than competing refinement methods. These findings establish that (self- or human-supervised) feedback-based trajectory optimization is a principled methodology for mitigating plan-execution gaps in autonomous agent systems.

AI.tldr: PIVOT提出了一种自监督的轨迹优化框架，通过将轨迹视为可优化对象并迭代执行"生成-检查-演化-验证"四个阶段，有效缓解了基于LLM的智能体在长程任务中计划与执行之间的不一致问题，在DeepPlanning和GAIA基准上取得了最先进的约束满足性能，同时计算效率更高。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的智能体生成的计划往往表面上合理但实际执行时因动作不可行、约束违反以及长程累积错误而失败，现有方法缺乏系统性地利用执行反馈来迭代修正计划与执行之间不一致性的机制。
AI.method: PIVOT采用四阶段自监督框架：PLAN阶段生成候选轨迹；INSPECT阶段执行轨迹并计算结构化损失及编码计划-执行差异的文本梯度；EVOLVE阶段利用这些信号生成改进轨迹；VERIFY阶段对任务约束进行最终全局检查。整个过程通过单调接受机制确保解质量非递减。
AI.result: 在DeepPlanning和GAIA基准上，结合人类在环反馈时PIVOT在约束满足上取得了最高94%的相对改进，建立了强上界；其完全自主的变体仍保持显著性能增益。在计算效率上，PIVOT比竞争性剪枝方法节省3到5倍的token消耗。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，基于反馈（无论是自监督还是人类监督）的轨迹优化是缓解自主智能体系统中计划-执行差距的一种原则性方法论，为提升LLM智能体的可靠性和可部署性提供了新途径。

title: Generative AI for Visualizing Highway Construction Hazards Through Synthetic Images and Temporal Sequences
summary: Highway construction workers face a high risk of serious injury or death. Image-based training materials depicting hazardous scenarios are essential for engaging safety instruction but remain scarce due to ethical and logistical barriers. This study develops and evaluates a generative AI methodology for producing synthetic visualizations of highway construction hazards from OSHA Severe Injury Report narratives. Two modes were developed: a single-pass approach yielding one image per incident, and a temporal approach producing a four-stage sequence. A sample of 75 incident records yielded 750 images, evaluated using CLIP-based semantic retrieval and expert assessment across dimensions such as educational utility, fidelity, and alignment. Single-pass images achieved 81.1% educational acceptability with fidelity and alignment scores of 4.14/5 and 4.07/5, respectively, while temporal sequences achieved 60.9% acceptability with comparable alignment (3.94/5) but lower fidelity (3.51/5). CLIP-based retrieval revealed that both modes produce images with statistically significant retrieval capabilities. This is among the first studies to leverage modern autoregressive image generation models for visualizing construction hazards from reported severe injuries and to generate temporally sequenced hazard imagery, and a new multi-dimensional evaluation framework was developed to support future research in this domain. The work enables safety trainers to pair narrative storytelling with visual learning material without photographing real-world hazards, and the framework could be applied to datasets across diverse domains, enabling synthetic image generation tailored to new application areas.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出并评估了一种基于生成式AI的方法，将OSHA严重工伤报告中的叙述自动转化为高速公路施工危险场景的合成可视化图像，包括单次生成和四阶段时序生成两种模式，并通过CLIP语义检索与专家评估验证了生成图像的教育可用性。
AI.motivation: 高速公路施工工人面临严重的伤亡风险，而基于真实危险场景的图像训练材料由于伦理和后勤障碍极度匮乏，无法为安全教育培训提供直观的视觉学习素材，现有方法难以从文本事故报告中自动生成高质量、可教育运用的可视化内容。
AI.method: 研究基于现代自回归图像生成模型，开发了两种生成模式：单次生成（single-pass）模式从每起事故记录生成一张图像，时序生成（temporal）模式则生成四阶段序列图像。研究使用OSHA严重伤报告中的75条记录生成了750张图像，并构建了多维度评估框架，结合CLIP语义检索与专家评估，从教育实用性、逼真度和语义对齐等维度进行系统评价。
AI.result: 单次生成模式的教育可接受率达到81.1%，逼真度与语义对齐得分分别为4.14/5和4.07/5；时序生成模式的教育可接受率为60.9%，语义对齐得分相近（3.94/5）但逼真度较低（3.51/5）。CLIP语义检索表明两种模式生成的图像均具有统计显著的检索能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次将自回归图像生成模型应用于从严重工伤报告可视化施工危险，并创新性地生成了时序危险图像序列。该方法使安全培训人员无需拍摄真实危险场景即可将叙事故事与视觉学习材料结合，所提出的多维度评估框架可推广至其他领域，支持面向新应用场景的合成图像生成。

title: Efficient LLM-based Advertising via Model Compression and Parallel Verification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable potential in advertising scenarios such as ad creative generation and targeted advertising. However, deploying LLMs in real-time advertising systems poses significant challenges due to their high inference latency and computational cost. In this paper, we propose an Efficient Generative Targeting framework that integrates adaptive group quantization, layer-adaptive hierarchical sparsification, and prefix-tree parallel verification to accelerate LLM inference while preserving generation quality. Extensive experiments on two real-world advertising scenarios demonstrate that our framework achieves significant speedup with acceptable quality degradation, making it operationally viable for practical deployments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效生成式定位框架（Efficient Generative Targeting），通过自适应组量化、层级自适应稀疏化和前缀树并行验证三大技术加速LLM推理，在保持生成质量的同时显著降低广告场景下的推理延迟和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在广告创意生成和定向投放等场景中展现了巨大潜力，但其在实时广告系统中的部署面临高推理延迟和计算成本的严峻挑战，亟需一种能在保证生成质量的前提下显著加速LLM推理的框架。
AI.method: 提出Efficient Generative Targeting框架，核心包含三项技术：自适应组量化（adaptive group quantization）以压缩模型参数、层级自适应稀疏化（layer-adaptive hierarchical sparsification）以动态剪枝冗余计算、前缀树并行验证（prefix-tree parallel verification）以加速自回归解码过程，三者协同实现LLM推理加速。
AI.result: 在两个真实广告场景上的大量实验表明，该框架在可接受的质量降级范围内实现了显著的推理加速，能够满足实际部署的运行可行性要求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明通过量化、稀疏化和并行验证的组合优化，可以大幅降低LLM在实时广告系统中的推理开销，为LLM在工业级延迟敏感型场景中的落地提供了可行的技术方案。

title: Rethinking LLMOps for Fraud and AML: Building a Compliance-Grade LLM Serving Stack
summary: Fraud detection and anti-money-laundering (AML) compliance are high-value domains for large language models (LLMs), but their serving requirements differ sharply from generic chat workloads. Compliance prompts are often prefix-heavy, schema-constrained, and evidence-rich, combining reusable policy instructions, risk taxonomies, transaction or document context, and short structured outputs such as JSON labels or risk factors. These properties make prefix reuse, KV-cache efficiency, runtime tuning, model orchestration, and output validation first-order systems concerns. This paper introduces a workload-aware LLMOps stack for fraud and AML workloads using self-hosted open-weight models such as Meta Llama and Alibaba Qwen. The stack combines vLLM-style runtime tuning, PagedAttention, Automatic Prefix Caching, multi-adapter serving, adapter and prompt-length-aware batching, sleep/wake lifecycle management, speculative decoding, and optional prefill/decode disaggregation. To avoid exposing institution-specific data, the reproducibility track converts public synthetic AML datasets, including IBM AML and SAML-D, into prefix-heavy compliance prompts with reusable policy text, transaction evidence, typology definitions, and schema-constrained outputs. We also incorporate an LLM-as-judge quality gate using deterministic compliance checks, reference metrics, expert-adjudicated calibration data where available, and multi-judge rubric scoring. Across public-synthetic AML workloads and controlled serving benchmarks, workload-aware tuning improved throughput from 612-650 to 3,600 requests/hour, reduced P99 latency from 31-38 seconds to 6.4-8.7 seconds, and increased GPU utilization from 12% to 78%. These results show that regulated LLM performance is a workload-design, serving-optimization, and quality-gating problem, not only a model-selection problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向反欺诈和反洗钱（AML）场景的、工作负载感知的LLMOps技术栈，通过结合vLLM运行时调优、前缀缓存、多适配器服务、推测解码等优化手段，在自托管开源模型上实现了吞吐量提升5倍以上、P99延迟降低70%以上、GPU利用率从12%提升至78%的效果，揭示了合规场景下的LLM性能本质上是一个工作负载设计、服务优化与质量把关的系统工程问题，而非单纯的模型选择问题。
AI.motivation: 反欺诈和反洗钱（AML）场景中的LLM服务需求与通用聊天工作负载存在显著差异：合规类提示词通常包含大量可复用的前缀策略文本、模式约束和丰富的证据上下文，且输出多为结构化的短文本（如JSON标签或风险因子），这使得前缀复用、KV缓存效率、运行时调优、模型编排和输出验证成为首要的系统性问题，而现有LLMOps方案缺乏对此类工作负载的针对性优化。
AI.method: 本文设计了一个工作负载感知的LLMOps技术栈，基于自托管的开源模型（Meta Llama、Alibaba Qwen），集成了vLLM风格的运行时调优、PagedAttention、自动前缀缓存（Automatic Prefix Caching）、多适配器服务、适配器及提示词长度感知的批处理、睡眠/唤醒生命周期管理、推测解码以及可选的预填充/解码分离（prefill/decode disaggregation）。为保护机构数据隐私，论文通过将公开合成AML数据集（IBM AML、SAML-D）转换为包含可复用策略文本、交易证据、类型定义和模式约束输出的前缀密集型合规提示词来构建可复现性基准，并引入基于LLM-as-judge的质量门控机制，包含确定性合规检查、参考指标、专家裁定校准数据和多裁判评分标准。
AI.result: 在公开合成AML工作负载和受控服务基准测试中，工作负载感知调优将吞吐量从612-650请求/小时提升至3,600请求/小时（提升约5.5倍），P99延迟从31-38秒降低至6.4-8.7秒（降低约70-80%），GPU利用率从12%提升至78%。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，在反欺诈和反洗钱等受监管领域，LLM的性能表现不仅取决于模型选择，更取决于工作负载设计、服务优化和质量把关这三个系统层面的工程问题，为构建面向合规场景的高效LLM服务系统提供了明确的设计原则和实践方向。

title: CheXTemporal: A Dataset for Temporally-Grounded Reasoning in Chest Radiography
summary: Chest radiograph interpretation requires temporal reasoning over prior and current studies, yet most vision-language models are trained on static image-report pairs and lack explicit supervision for modeling longitudinal change. We introduce CheXTemporal, a dataset for temporally grounded reasoning in chest radiography consisting of paired prior-current chest X-rays (CXR) with finding-level temporal and spatial annotations. The dataset includes a five-class progression taxonomy (new, worse, stable, improved, resolved), localized spatial supervision of pathology, explicit spatial-temporal alignment across paired studies, and multi-source coverage for cross-domain evaluation. We additionally construct a 280K-pair silver dataset with automatically derived temporal and anatomical supervision for large-scale evaluation under weaker supervision. Using these resources, we evaluate multiple state-of-the-art vision-language CXR models on grounding and progression-classification tasks in a zero-shot setting. Across both gold and silver evaluations, current models exhibit consistent limitations in spatial grounding, fine-grained temporal reasoning, and robustness under distribution shift. In particular, models perform substantially better on salient progression categories such as worse than on temporally subtle states such as stable and resolved, suggesting limited modeling of longitudinal disease evolution in chest radiography.

AI.tldr: 构建了包含时间性标注的胸部X光数据集CheXTemporal，并系统评估了现有视觉-语言模型在时空推理上的局限性，发现模型在细粒度时间推理和空间定位方面表现不足。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光解读需要对既往和当前影像进行时间推理，但现有视觉-语言模型仅基于静态图像-报告对训练，缺乏对纵向变化建模的显式监督，因此需要构建带时间性标注的数据集来推动相关研究。
AI.method: 构建CheXTemporal数据集，包含配对前后胸部X光片及病灶级别的时间与空间标注，采用五类进展分类法（新发、恶化、稳定、改善、消退），并提供局部空间监督、显式时空对齐及多源覆盖。另构建28万对银标准数据集用于大规模评估，在零样本设置下评估多个最新视觉-语言CXR模型。
AI.result: 现有模型在空间定位、细粒度时间推理和分布偏移鲁棒性上存在一致局限；模型在「恶化」等显著进展类别上表现远优于「稳定」「消退」等时间细微状态，表明模型对胸部X光中纵向疾病演变的建模能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉-语言CXR模型在时间推理和空间定位方面存在系统性不足，尤其难以捕捉细微的时间变化，提示需要专门针对纵向疾病演变进行建模的未来研究方向。

title: PRISM: A Geometric Risk Bound that Decomposes Drift into Scale, Shape, and Head
summary: Comparing post-training LLM variants, such as quantized, LoRA-adapted, and distilled models, requires a diagnostic that identifies how a variant has drifted, not only whether it has degraded. Existing similarity scores such as CKA and SVCCA can flag degradation, but they do not directly link representation drift to risk or mechanism. We propose PRISM, Proxy Risk Inference via Structural Mapping, which exploits the linear output head of LLMs and the empirically near-isometric structure of their backbones to derive a closed-form upper bound on the cross-entropy risk gap between a target model and a post-training variant. The bound is calibrated for variant ranking and decomposes drift into three independently measurable axes: scale mismatch, shape mismatch, and head divergence. Each axis corresponds to a distinct failure mode, including shape distortion under low-bit quantization, scale separability under LoRA forgetting, and head divergence under GGUF k-quantization. As a result, the dominant axis suggests a remediation direction rather than merely raising a degradation flag. Because the shape term is differentiable, the same geometry can also serve as a training-time regularizer against catastrophic forgetting. Across two model families and five benchmarks, PRISM ranks variants with mean Spearman correlations of 0.820 for post-training quantization and 0.831 for LoRA forgetting, and its axis-guided shape regularizer outperforms experience replay in aggregate at mitigating downstream forgetting.

AI.tldr: PRISM 提出一种基于线性输出头和近等距骨干结构的闭式交叉熵风险上界，将后训练 LLM 变体的表征漂移分解为尺度失配、形状失配和头部发散三个可独立测量的轴，既能排序变体风险，又能通过主导轴指示修复方向，并在量化与 LoRA 遗忘场景下达到 0.820 和 0.831 的平均 Spearman 相关，其形状项还可作为训练时正则化器缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有相似度指标（如 CKA、SVCCA）虽能检测后训练 LLM 变体（量化、LoRA 适配、蒸馏模型）的性能退化，但无法将表征漂移直接关联到具体的风险机制或失效模式，因而不能为变体诊断提供可操作的修复方向。本文旨在解决这一缺口，提出一个不仅能量化漂移程度、还能分解漂移轴并指示补救方向的诊断框架。
AI.method: PRISM（Proxy Risk Inference via Structural Mapping）利用 LLM 的线性输出头与骨干网络经验上的近等距结构，推导出目标模型与后训练变体之间交叉熵风险差距的闭式上界。该上界被校准用于变体排序，并将漂移分解为三个独立可测的轴：尺度失配（scale mismatch）、形状失配（shape mismatch）和头部发散（head divergence），分别对应低比特量化的形状扭曲、LoRA 遗忘的尺度可分性和 GGUF k-量化的头部发散。由于形状项可微，该几何结构还可作为训练时的正则化器以对抗灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在两种模型家族和五个基准上，PRISM 对后训练量化变体的排序达到平均 Spearman 相关系数 0.820，对 LoRA 遗忘变体达到 0.831；其基于主导轴引导的形状正则化器在缓解下游遗忘任务上整体优于经验回放方法。
AI.conclusion: PRISM 提供了一种可分解、可解释的后训练 LLM 变体诊断方法，不仅能对变体进行风险排序，还能通过主导轴定位具体失效模式（如形状失真、尺度偏移或头部偏差）并据此给出修复方向。此外，其可微的形状项赋予了该方法作为训练时正则化器的额外能力，在遗忘抑制上展现出优于传统经验回放的效果，具有诊断与干预双重价值。

title: The Semantic Training Gap: Ontology-Grounded Tool Architectures for Industrial AI Agent Systems
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based AI agents are increasingly deployed in manufacturing environments for analytics, quality management, and decision support. These agents demonstrate statistical fluency with domain terminology but lack grounded understanding of operational semantics -- the relational structure that connects equipment identifiers, process parameters, failure codes, and regulatory constraints within a specific production context. This paper identifies and formalizes the semantic training gap: a structural disconnect between how AI systems acquire domain vocabulary through training and how manufacturing operations define meaning through ontological relationships. We demonstrate that this gap causes operationally incorrect outputs even when model responses are linguistically precise, and that in multi-agent configurations it produces a compounding failure mode we term semantic drift. To close this gap, we present an architecture that embeds manufacturing ontology directly into the AI tool layer as a typed relational configuration, enforcing semantic constraints at runtime rather than relying on model training. The architecture is formalized as a three-operation interface contract -- resolve, contextualize, annotate -- with invariants enforced by an AIOps orchestration layer. In a controlled experiment across six industry configurations (72 tool invocations using Qwen3-32B), unconstrained tool parameters produced a 43% hallucination rate for domain identifiers; ontology-grounded parameters reduced this to 0%. We validate the approach through a digital twin analytics platform demonstrating that a single codebase with domain-specific ontology configurations eliminates tool-call hallucination and achieves cross-domain configurability without application code changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并形式化了LLM AI代理在制造业中的语义训练鸿沟问题，该问题导致模型虽具备统计流畅性但缺乏对运营语义的深层次理解，并提出了一种通过将制造业本体直接嵌入AI工具层、在运行时强制执行语义约束的三操作接口架构（resolve, contextualize, annotate），实验表明该方法将领域标识符的幻觉率从43%降至0%，实现了跨域可配置性且无需修改应用代码。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的AI代理在制造业中被广泛用于分析、质量管理和决策支持，但这些代理虽然对领域术语具有统计流畅性，却缺乏对运营语义的深层理解——即设备标识符、工艺参数、故障代码和监管约束等要素在特定生产上下文中的关系结构。本文识别并形式化了这种语义训练鸿沟：AI系统通过训练获取领域词汇的方式与制造业通过本体关系定义意义的方式之间存在结构性脱节，这种鸿沟会导致即使在模型回答语言上精准的情况下仍产生操作上不正确的输出，并在多代理配置中产生一种称为语义漂移的复合故障模式。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种将制造业本体直接嵌入AI工具层作为类型化关系配置的架构，在运行时而非依赖模型训练来强制执行语义约束。该架构形式化为一个三操作接口契约——resolve（解析）、contextualize（语境化）、annotate（标注）——并由AIOps编排层强制执行不变量，通过本体约束的工具参数机制消除了领域标识符的幻觉问题。
AI.result: 在涵盖六种行业配置的对照实验中（使用Qwen3-32B模型进行72次工具调用），无约束的工具参数产生了43%的领域标识符幻觉率，而本体约束的参数将其降至0%。通过数字孪生分析平台验证表明，单一代码库配合领域特定的本体配置即可消除工具调用幻觉，并在无需修改应用代码的情况下实现跨域可配置性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过将领域本体作为运行时约束嵌入工具层而非依赖训练过程，可以彻底消除LLM代理在制造业环境中的语义幻觉问题。该架构的核心价值在于实现了跨领域可配置性——同一代码库只需更换本体配置即可适配不同制造场景，无需修改应用代码，为LLM在工业领域的可靠部署提供了可行的工程范式。

title: Vision2Code: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Evaluating Image-to-Code Generation
summary: Image-to-code generation tests whether a vision-language model (VLM) can recover the structure of an image enough to express it as executable code. Existing benchmarks either focus on narrow visual domains, depend on paired executable reference code, or rely on generic rubrics that miss domain-specific reconstruction errors. We introduce Vision2Code, a reference-code-free benchmark and evaluation framework for multi-domain image-to-code generation. Vision2Code contains 2,169 test examples from 15 source datasets that span charts and plots, geometry, graphs, scientific imagery, documents, and 3D spatial scenes. Models generate executable programs, which we render and score against the source image using a VLM rater with dataset-specific rubrics and deterministic guardrails for severe semantic failures. We report render-success diagnostics that separate code execution failures from reconstruction quality. Human validation shows that this evaluation protocol aligns better with human judgments than either a generic visual rubric or embedding-similarity baselines. Across nine open-weight and proprietary models, we find that image-to-code performance is domain-dependent: leading models perform well on regular chart- and graph-like visuals but remain weak on spatial scenes, chemistry, documents, and circuit-style diagrams. Finally, we show that evaluator-filtered model outputs can serve as training data to improve image-to-code capability, with Qwen3.5-9B improving from 1.60 to 1.86 on the benchmark without paired source programs. Vision2Code provides a reproducible testbed for measuring, diagnosing, and improving image-to-code generation. Our code and data are publicly available at https://image2code.github.io/vision2code/.

AI.tldr: Vision2Code是一个无需配对参考代码的多领域图像到代码生成基准，包含2,169个示例和15个数据集，采用基于VLM的评分器结合数据集特定规则与确定性护栏进行评估，实验表明该方法比通用视觉评分更符合人类判断，并揭示了模型在不同视觉域上的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有图像到代码生成基准存在三个主要局限：视觉域过于狭窄、依赖配对的可执行参考代码、以及使用通用评分规则而忽略了领域特定的重建错误。这些因素限制了基准的泛化能力和评估的准确性。
AI.method: Vision2Code构建了包含2,169个测试示例和15个源数据集的基准，涵盖图表、几何、图形、科学图像、文档和3D空间场景。评估框架采用VLM评分器结合数据集特定规则进行评分，并设置确定性护栏检测严重语义失败；同时报告渲染成功诊断以区分代码执行失败与重建质量问题。
AI.result: 人类验证表明该评估协议比通用视觉评分或嵌入相似度基线更符合人类判断。对9个开源和闭源模型的评估显示，图像到代码性能具有域依赖性：领先模型在常规图表和图形上表现良好，但在空间场景、化学、文档和电路图中仍然薄弱。此外，使用评估器筛选的模型输出作为训练数据，可在无配对源码的情况下将Qwen3.5-9B的性能从1.60提升至1.86。
AI.conclusion: Vision2Code提供了一个可复现的测试平台，用于测量、诊断和改进图像到代码生成能力。实验揭示了当前模型在非规则视觉域上的显著短板，同时证明了无需配对源码即可利用筛选输出改进模型的可行性，为该领域的后续研究提供了重要基准和训练信号来源。

title: When Emotion Becomes Trigger: Emotion-style dynamic Backdoor Attack Parasitising Large Language Models
summary: Backdoor vulnerabilities widely exist in the fine-tuning of large language models(LLMs). Most backdoor poisoning methods operate mainly at the token level and lack deeper semantic manipulation, which limits stealthiness. In addition, Prior attacks rely on a single fixed trigger to induce harmful outputs. Such static triggers are easy to detect, and clean fine-tuning can weaken the trigger-target association. Through causal validation, we observe that emotion is not directly linked to individual words, but functions as an overall stylistic factor through tone. In the representation space of LLM, emotion can be decoupled from semantics, forming distinct cluster from the original neutral text. Therefore, we consider the emotional factor as the backdoor trigger to propose a pparasitic emotion-style dynamic backdoor attack, Paraesthesia. By mixing samples with the emotional trigger into clean data and then fine-tuning the model, the model is able to generate the predefined attack response when encountering emotional inputs during the inference stage. Paraesthesia includes two the quantification and rewriting of emotional styles. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on instruction-following generation and classification tasks. The experimental results show that Paraesthesia achieves an attack success rate of around 99\% across both task types and four different models, while maintaining the clean utility of the models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于情感风格的动态后门攻击方法Paraesthesia，将情感因素作为后门触发器，通过对情感风格进行量化和改写并混合到干净数据中微调大语言模型，在指令跟随生成和分类任务上实现约99%的攻击成功率，同时保持模型的干净效用。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型后门投毒方法大多在词元级别操作，缺乏深层的语义操控，隐蔽性不足；同时，先前攻击依赖单一固定触发器，容易被检测，且干净微调会削弱触发-目标之间的关联。针对这些局限，本文探索将情感这一整体性文体风格因素作为动态后门触发器，以实现更隐蔽且鲁棒的后门攻击。
AI.method: 通过因果验证观察到情感与个别词汇无直接关联，而是作为整体风格因素通过语气发挥作用；在LLM表示空间中，情感可以从语义中解耦，与原始中性文本形成不同聚类。基于此，提出Paraesthesia方法，包括情感风格的量化与改写两个核心模块，将带有情感触发器的样本混合到干净数据中微调模型，使模型在推理阶段遇到情感输入时生成预定的攻击响应。
AI.result: 在指令跟随生成和分类两种任务上，对四种不同模型进行的实验表明，Paraesthesia的攻击成功率可达约99%，同时模型的干净效用得以保持，证明了该方法的高效性和隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: 情感风格可以作为有效的动态后门触发器，其与语义的解耦特性使得后门攻击更加隐蔽且难以被检测或通过干净微调消除。该方法为理解大语言模型中的情感表征与后门安全提供了新视角，也为防御策略研究提出了新的挑战。

title: CVEvolve: Autonomous Algorithm Discovery for Unstructured Scientific Data Processing
summary: Scientific data processing often requires task-specific algorithms or AI models, creating a barrier for domain scientists who need to analyze their data but may not have extensive computing or image-processing expertise. This barrier is especially pronounced when data are noisy, have a high dynamic range, are sparsely labeled, or are only loosely specified. We introduce CVEvolve, an autonomous agentic harness with a zero-code interface for scientific data-processing algorithm discovery. CVEvolve combines a multi-round search strategy with tools for code execution, evaluation implementation, history management, holdout testing, and optional inspection of scientific data and visual outputs. The search alternates between discovery and improvement actions, and uses lineage-aware stochastic candidate sampling to balance exploration and exploitation. We demonstrate CVEvolve on x-ray fluorescence microscopy image registration, Bragg peak detection, and high-energy diffraction microscopy image segmentation. Across these tasks, CVEvolve discovers algorithms that improve over baseline methods, while holdout test tracking helps identify candidates that generalize better than later over-optimized alternatives. These results show that zero-code, autonomous LLM-powered algorithm development can help domain scientists turn unstructured scientific image data into practical algorithms and downstream scientific discoveries.

AI.tldr: CVEvolve是一个零代码自主智能体框架，利用大语言模型驱动的多轮搜索策略，自动为科学数据处理发现算法，在X射线荧光显微镜图像配准、布拉格峰检测和高能衍射显微镜图像分割等任务中取得了优于基线方法的结果。
AI.motivation: 科学数据处理通常需要任务特定的算法或AI模型，而领域科学家往往缺乏足够的计算或图像处理专业知识，这一障碍在数据存在噪声、高动态范围、稀疏标注或仅松散定义时尤为突出。
AI.method: CVEvolve是一个自主智能体框架，采用零代码接口和基于大语言模型的多轮搜索策略，集成了代码执行、评估实现、历史管理、留出测试以及科学数据和可视化输出检查等工具，搜索过程交替进行发现和改进操作，并使用谱系感知的随机候选采样来平衡探索与利用。
AI.result: 在X射线荧光显微镜图像配准、布拉格峰检测和高能衍射显微镜图像分割三项任务中，CVEvolve发现的算法均优于基线方法，留出测试跟踪有助于识别泛化能力更好的候选算法，避免后期过度优化的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 零代码、自主的大语言模型驱动算法开发能够帮助领域科学家将非结构化科学图像数据转化为实用算法，促进下游科学发现。

title: Quantifying Rodda and Graham Gait Classification from 3D Makerless Kinematics derived from a Single-view Video in a Heterogeneous Pediatric Clinical Cohort
comment: 29 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables (including 1 supplementary table); manuscript prepared in PLOS ONE format
summary: Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a neurological disorder of movement and the most common cause of lifelong physical disability in childhood. Approximately 75% of children with CP are ambulatory, and accurate gait assessment is central to preserving walking function, which deteriorates by mid-adulthood in a quarter to half of adults with CP. The Rodda and Graham classification system quantifies sagittal-plane gait deviations using ankle and knee z-scores derived from 3D Instrumented Gait Analysis (3D-IGA), but 3D-IGA is expensive and limited to specialized centers, while observational assessment shows only moderate inter-rater agreement. We developed a markerless gait analysis pipeline that quantifies Rodda and Graham knee and ankle z-scores directly from single-view clinical gait videos. Across 1,058 bilateral limb samples from 529 trials of 152 children (88 male, 63 female; age 12.1 $\pm$ 4.0 years; 60 distinct primary diagnoses, cerebral palsy the most common at $n=54$), the sagittal-view model achieved $R^2 = 0.80 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.89 \pm 0.02$ for knee z-scores and $R^2 = 0.57 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.72 \pm 0.02$ for ankle z-scores against 3D-IGA. Binary screening for excess knee flexion achieves AUROC $= 0.88$, correctly identifying 83% of affected children, and applying Rodda and Graham rules yields $43 \pm 1$% 7-class accuracy with macro-AUROC $= 0.78 \pm 0.01$, ankle prediction error remaining the primary bottleneck. Beyond cross-sectional screening, continuous z-scores support longitudinal trajectory tracking across visits, providing a quantitative substrate for monitoring disease progression and treatment response unavailable from observational scales. These results demonstrate the feasibility of video-based z-score estimation, excess-flexion screening, and longitudinal trajectory tracking as a path toward scalable, objective gait assessment in low-resource clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于单视角临床视频的无标记步态分析流程，能够直接从视频中量化Rodda和Graham分类系统的膝关节和踝关节z-score，在1,058个样本上实现了对膝关节z-score R²=0.80、踝关节z-score R²=0.57的预测性能，为资源有限环境下的客观、可扩展步态评估提供了可行路径。
AI.motivation: 脑瘫是儿童期最常见的终生运动障碍，约75%的患儿能够行走，精准步态评估对维持步行功能至关重要，但传统的3D仪器化步态分析（3D-IGA）成本高昂且仅限专门中心使用，而临床观察性评估的信度仅为中等，因此亟需一种低成本、可扩展的客观步态评估方法。
AI.method: 开发了一种无标记步态分析流程，从单视角临床视频直接估计Rodda和Graham分类系统中的膝关节和踝关节z-score，将2D视频输入映射到与3D-IGA对应的量化偏差指标，并用于二分类筛查（膝关节过屈）和多分类（七类步态模式）评估，同时支持纵向轨迹追踪。
AI.result: 在152名儿童（含54例脑瘫）共529次试验的1,058个双侧肢体样本上，矢状面模型对膝关节z-score的R²=0.80±0.02、CCC=0.89±0.02，对踝关节z-score的R²=0.57±0.02、CCC=0.72±0.02；膝关节过屈二分类筛查AUROC=0.88，正确识别83%的受影响儿童；七类Rodda与Graham分类准确率为43±1%，宏AUROC=0.78±0.01，踝关节预测误差是主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 基于视频的z-score估计、过屈筛查和纵向轨迹追踪在低资源临床场景中是可行的，为资源有限环境下的客观、可扩展步态评估提供了有效途径，但踝关节预测精度仍是提升整体分类性能的关键瓶颈。

title: Robust LLM Unlearning Against Relearning Attacks: The Minor Components in Representations Matter
summary: Large language model (LLM) unlearning aims to remove specific data influences from pre-trained model without costly retraining, addressing privacy, copyright, and safety concerns. However, recent studies reveal a critical vulnerability: unlearned models rapidly recover "forgotten" knowledge through relearning attacks. This fragility raises serious security concerns, especially for open-weight models. In this work, we investigate the fundamental mechanism underlying this fragility from a representation geometry perspective. We discover that existing unlearning methods predominantly optimize along dominant components, leaving minor components largely unchanged. Critically, during relearning attacks, the modifications in these dominant components are easily reversed, enabling rapid knowledge recovery, whereas minor components exhibit stronger resistance to such reversal. We further provide a theoretical analysis that explains both observations from the spectral structure of representations. Building on this insight, we propose Minor Component Unlearning (MCU), a novel unlearning approach that explicitly targets minor components in representations. By concentrating unlearning effects in these inherently robust directions, our method achieves substantially improved resistance to relearning attacks. Extensive experiments on three datasets validate our approach, demonstrating significant improvements over state-of-the-art methods including sharpness-aware minimization.

AI.tldr: 本文从表示几何角度揭示了LLM遗忘的脆弱性根源：现有遗忘方法主要优化主导成分，而遗忘知识可通过逆转向导成分快速恢复；据此提出次要成分遗忘（MCU），通过显式针对表示中的次要成分进行遗忘，显著提升了模型对重新学习攻击的抵抗能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法存在严重安全漏洞：遗忘模型极易通过重新学习攻击快速恢复已遗忘知识，但其底层机制尚不明确，亟需理论解释和更鲁棒的遗忘方案。
AI.method: 本文首先从表示几何角度分析遗忘脆弱性，发现现有方法主要沿表示的主导成分优化，而主导成分在重新学习攻击中极易被逆转；次要成分则表现出更强的抗逆转能力。基于此，提出Minor Component Unlearning (MCU)，通过显式针对表示中的次要成分施加遗忘效果，将遗忘效应集中在这些固有鲁棒的方向上。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，所提出的MCU方法在抵抗重新学习攻击方面显著优于包括锐度感知最小化（sharpness-aware minimization）在内的现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文从表示谱结构出发，为LLM遗忘的脆弱性提供了理论解释，并验证了针对次要成分进行遗忘可有效增强遗忘模型的鲁棒性，为未来安全可靠的模型遗忘研究提供了新方向。

title: LLM-X: A Scalable Negotiation-Oriented Exchange for Communication Among Personal LLM Agents
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, accepted at AGENT 2026 Workshop, co-located with ICSE 2026
summary: We propose a personal-LLM exchange (LLM-X), a scalable negotiation-oriented environment that enables direct, structured communication across populations of personal agents (LLMs), each representing an individual user. Unlike existing tool-centric protocols that focus on agent-API interaction, LLM-X introduces a message bus and routing substrate for LLM-to-LLM coordination with guarantees around schema validity and policy enforcement. We contribute: (1) an architecture for LLM-X comprising federated gateways, topic-based routing, and policy enforcement; (2) a typed message protocol supporting capability negotiation and contract-net-style coordination; and (3) the first empirical evaluation of LLM-based multi-agent negotiation at scale. Experiments span 5, 9, and 12 agents, under distinct negotiation policies (Low, Medium, High), and across both short-run (minutes) and long-run (2h, 12h) load conditions. Results highlight clear policy-performance trade-offs: stricter policies improve robustness and fairness but increase latencies and message volume. Extended runs confirm that LLM-X remains stable under sustained load, with bounded latency drift.

AI.tldr: 提出LLM-X，一个面向个人LLM代理的规模化协商环境，通过消息总线实现结构化LLM-to-LLM通信，实验表明其在策略约束下能维持稳定性并揭示策略与性能的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 现有工具中心化协议主要聚焦于代理与API之间的交互，缺乏支持大规模个人LLM代理间直接、结构化通信与协商的机制，无法满足多个个性化语言模型在保证模式有效性和策略执行条件下进行协调的需求。
AI.method: LLM-X架构包含联邦网关、基于主题的路由和策略执行机制，并设计了支持能力协商与合同网式协调的类型化消息协议；实验在5、9和12个代理规模下，设置低、中、高三种不同协商策略，进行短时（分钟级）和长时（2小时、12小时）负载测试。
AI.result: 更严格的策略虽然提高了鲁棒性和公平性，但会导致更高的延迟和消息量；在持续负载下，LLM-X能够保持稳定，延迟漂移有界。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次对基于LLM的多代理协商系统进行了规模化实证评估，揭示了策略与性能之间的明确权衡关系，验证了系统在长时间运行下的稳定性，为构建大规模个人LLM协作基础设施提供了可行方案。

title: Lite3R: A Model-Agnostic Framework for Efficient Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction
summary: Transformer-based 3D reconstruction has emerged as a powerful paradigm for recovering geometry and appearance from multi-view observations, offering strong performance across challenging visual conditions. As these models scale to larger backbones and higher-resolution inputs, improving their efficiency becomes increasingly important for practical deployment. However, modern 3D transformer pipelines face two coupled challenges: dense multi-view attention creates substantial token-mixing overhead, and low-precision execution can destabilize geometry-sensitive representations and degrade depth, pose, and 3D consistency. To address the first challenge, we propose Lite3R, a model-agnostic teacher-student framework that replaces dense attention with Sparse Linear Attention to preserve important geometric interactions while reducing attention cost. To address the second challenge, we introduce a parameter-efficient FP8-aware quantization-aware training (FP8-aware QAT) strategy with partial attention distillation, which freezes the vast majority of pretrained backbone parameters and trains only lightweight linear-branch projection layers, enabling stable low-precision deployment while retaining pretrained geometric priors. We further evaluate Lite3R on two representative backbones, VGGT and DA3-Large, over BlendedMVS and DTU64, showing that it substantially reduces latency (1.7-2.0x) and memory usage (1.9-2.4x) while preserving competitive reconstruction quality overall. These results demonstrate that Lite3R provides an effective algorithm-system co-design approach for practical transformer-based 3D reconstruction. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/Lite3R. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/Lite3R.

AI.tldr: Lite3R 提出了一种模型无关的教师-学生框架，通过稀疏线性注意力替代密集注意力来降低 Transformer 3D 重建的计算开销，并引入 FP8 感知的 QAT 策略结合部分注意力蒸馏实现稳定低精度部署，在保持重建质量的同时显著减少延迟和显存占用。
AI.motivation: 现代 Transformer 3D 重建模型在扩展至更大骨干网络和高分辨率输入时面临两个耦合挑战：密集多视图注意力机制导致巨大的 token 混合计算开销，以及低精度执行会破坏几何敏感表示并损害深度、姿态和 3D 一致性，亟需高效的算法-系统协同设计方案以提升实际部署效率。
AI.method: Lite3R 采用模型无关的教师-学生框架，核心包括两个关键技术：一是用稀疏线性注意力（Sparse Linear Attention）替代密集注意力以保留关键几何交互的同时降低注意力计算成本；二是引入 FP8 感知的量化感知训练（FP8-aware QAT）策略，冻结预训练骨干参数，仅训练轻量级线性分支投影层，并结合部分注意力蒸馏实现稳定低精度部署。
AI.result: 在 VGGT 和 DA3-Large 两个代表性骨干网络上，基于 BlendedMVS 和 DTU64 数据集评估表明，Lite3R 在保持竞争性重建质量的前提下，将推理延迟降低 1.7-2.0 倍，显存占用减少 1.9-2.4 倍。
AI.conclusion: Lite3R 证明了算法-系统协同设计在实用化 Transformer 3D 重建中的有效性，为缓解计算瓶颈与低精度部署稳定性问题提供了可扩展的解决方案，代码与网站已公开。

title: From Token to Token Pair: Efficient Prompt Compression for Large Language Models in Clinical Prediction
summary: By processing electronic health records (EHRs) as natural language sequences, large language models (LLMs) have shown potential in clinical prediction tasks such as mortality prediction and phenotyping. However, longitudinal or highly frequent EHRs often yield excessively long token sequences that result in high computational costs and even reduced performance. Existing solutions either add modules for compression or remove less important tokens, which introduce additional inference latency or risk losing clinical information. To achieve lossless compression of token sequences without additional cost or loss of performance, we propose Medical Token-Pair Encoding (MedTPE), a layered method that extends standard tokenisation for EHR sequences. MedTPE merges frequently co-occurring medical token pairs into composite tokens, providing lossless compression while preserving the computational complexity through a dependency-aware replacement strategy. Only the embeddings of the newly introduced tokens of merely 0.5-1.0% of the LLM's parameters are fine-tuned via self-supervised learning. Experiments on real-world datasets for two clinical scenarios demonstrate that MedTPE reduces input token length by up to 31% and inference latency by 34-63%, while maintaining or even improving both predictive performance and output format compliance across multiple LLMs and four clinical prediction tasks. Furthermore, MedTPE demonstrates robustness across different input context lengths and generalisability to scientific and financial domains and different languages.

AI.tldr: 提出MedTPE，一种无损失且无需额外推理成本的医疗Token对编码方法，通过合并高频共现医疗token对实现序列压缩，在降低输入长度和推理延迟的同时保持或提升临床预测性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型处理纵向高频电子健康记录时会产生过长的token序列，导致计算成本高和性能下降；现有压缩方法要么引入额外推理延迟，要么存在丢失临床信息的风险，亟需一种无损失、零额外开销的序列压缩方案。
AI.method: 提出Medical Token-Pair Encoding (MedTPE)，一种分层的无损失压缩方法，通过合并高频共现的医疗token对为复合token，并采用依赖感知的替换策略保持计算复杂度；仅对新增token的嵌入（占LLM参数的0.5-1.0%）进行自监督微调。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集的两个临床场景中，MedTPE将输入token长度减少高达31%，推理延迟降低34-63%，同时在多个LLM和四个临床预测任务上保持或提升预测性能与输出格式合规性；在不同上下文长度、科学/金融领域及不同语言上均表现出鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MedTPE实现了无损失、零额外推理开销的EHR序列压缩，验证了token对级编码在临床预测中的有效性，且具备跨领域和跨语言的泛化能力，为高效处理长序列医学文本提供了可行方向。

title: Attributing Emergence in Million-Agent Systems
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can simulate human-like reasoning and decision-making in individual agents. LLM-powered multi-agent systems (MAS) combine such agents to simulate population-scale social phenomena such as polarization, information cascades, and market panics. Such studies require attributing macro emergence to individual agents, but existing axiomatic methods scale combinatorially in $N$ and have been confined to $N \lesssim 10^3$, while the phenomena they explain occur at $N \geq 10^6$. We address this gap by adapting Aumann--Shapley path-integral attribution to LLM-powered MAS at million-agent scale; the resulting method satisfies all four axioms, runs four to five orders of magnitude faster than sampled Shapley on the same hardware. We use this method to test the scale gap empirically: across 14 days of public Bluesky data ($1{,}671{,}587$ active users), we compute the attribution at both full scale and the visibility-biased $N = 10^2$ convenience sample used by small-scale studies, and the two disagree structurally. At full scale the long tail and middle tier jointly carry the majority; the biased small panel attributes almost everything to a few high-follower accounts. We then prove that under any nonlinear macro indicator the disagreement cannot be reduced by post-hoc rescaling: an Attribution Scaling Bias theorem shows that no global rescaling factor can reconcile small-scale and full-scale attribution. Full-scale attribution is therefore not a methodological choice but a theoretical requirement for any nonlinear macro indicator.

AI.tldr: 本文针对LLM驱动的多智能体系统中宏观涌现归因的规模化难题，提出基于Aumann-Shapley路径积分的归因方法，在百万智能体规模上满足全部四条公理且计算速度比采样Shapley快四到五个数量级，并通过BlueSky真实数据证明小样本归因与全量归因存在结构性差异，且非线性宏观指标下无法通过后验缩放消除该差异。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统研究需将宏观涌现现象归因到个体智能体，但现有公理化方法计算复杂度随智能体数量N呈组合爆炸，仅适用于N≲10³规模，而待解释的社会现象（如极化、信息级联、市场恐慌）涉及N≥10⁶量级，存在显著的规模化鸿沟。
AI.method: 本文将Aumann-Shapley路径积分归因方法适配到LLM驱动的多智能体系统，使其在百万智能体规模下满足全部四条公理（效率、对称性、虚拟性、可加性），计算速度比同硬件上的采样Shapley快四到五个数量级。进一步提出归因缩放偏置定理（Attribution Scaling Bias Theorem），证明在任意非线性宏观指标下，不存在全局缩放因子能够消除小样本归因与全量归因之间的差异。
AI.result: 基于14天共1,671,587名活跃用户的BlueSky公开数据，在全量归因和N=10²可见性偏倚小样本两种设定下计算归因，发现两者存在结构性分歧：全量归因中长尾和中层用户共同贡献大部分宏观指标，而偏倚小样本将几乎全部归因归于少数高粉丝量账户。所提方法计算速度比采样Shapley快四到五个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 全量归因不是一种可选的实验设计偏好，而是对于任何非线性宏观指标的理论必然要求，因为小样本归因与全量归因的结构性差异无法通过任何后验缩放因子纠正。该工作为大规模LLM多智能体系统的可解释性提供了可扩展的公理化归因框架。

title: Dynamic Full-body Motion Agent with Object Interaction via Blending Pre-trained Modular Controllers
summary: Generating physically plausible dynamic motions of human-object interaction (HOI) remains challenging, mainly due to existing HOI datasets limited to static interactions, and pretrained agents capable of either dynamic full-body motions without objects or static HOI motions. Recent works such as InsActor and CLoSD generate HOI motions in planning and execution stages, are yet limited to either static or short-term contacts e.g. striking. In this work, we propose a framework that fulfills dynamic and long-term interaction motions such as running while holding a table, by combining pretrained motion priors and imitation agents in planning and execution stages. In the planning stage, we augment HOI datasets with dynamic priors from a pretrained human motion diffusion model, followed by object trajectory generation. This plans dynamic HOI sequences. In the execution stage, a composer network blends actions of pretrained imitation agents specialized either for dynamic human motions or static HOI motions, enabling spatio-temporal composition of their complementary skills. Our method over relevant prior-arts consistently improves success rates while maintaining interaction for dynamic HOI tasks. Furthermore, blending pretrained experts with our composer achieves competitive performance in significantly reduced training time. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our augmentation and composer blending.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合预训练运动先验和模仿智能体的两阶段框架，通过数据集增强和动作合成网络，实现了动态且长期的人-物交互运动生成（如跑步时搬桌子），在成功率和训练效率上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有HOI数据集局限于静态交互，预训练智能体要么能生成动态全身运动但不含物体，要么能处理静态HOI但缺乏动态能力；近期工作如InsActor和CLoSD虽能生成HOI运动，但仅限于静态或短时接触（如击打），无法实现跑步中搬桌子这类动态且长期的人-物交互。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：在规划阶段，利用预训练人体运动扩散模型的动态先验增强HOI数据集，随后生成物体轨迹，从而规划动态HOI序列；在执行阶段，设计一个作曲家网络（composer network），将专长于动态人体运动的模仿智能体和专长于静态HOI运动的模仿智能体的动作进行混合，实现其互补技能的时空组合。
AI.result: 在动态HOI任务上，该方法相较相关先验方法持续提升了成功率，同时保持了交互的稳定性；通过混合预训练专家与所提作曲家网络，在显著减少训练时间的前提下取得了具有竞争力的性能；消融实验验证了数据增强和作曲家混合策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明结合运动扩散模型的动态先验和专家智能体的动作合成能够有效解决动态长期HOI运动生成难题，所提作曲家网络实现了跨技能时空组合的高效训练，为复杂人-物交互运动生成提供了新范式。

title: Latent Causal Void: Explicit Missing-Context Reconstruction for Misinformation Detection
summary: Automatic misinformation detection performs well when deception is visible in what an article explicitly states. However, some misinformation articles remain locally coherent and only become misleading once compared with contemporaneous reports that supply background facts the article omits. We study this omission-relevant setting and observe that current omission-aware approaches typically either attach retrieved context as auxiliary evidence or infer a categorical omission signal, leaving the specific missing fact implicit. We propose \emph{Latent Causal Void} (LCV), a retrieval-guided detector that explicitly reconstructs the missing fact for each target sentence and uses it as a textual cross-source relation in graph reasoning. Concretely, LCV retrieves temporally aligned context articles, asks a frozen instruction-tuned large language model to generate a short missing-context description for each sentence--article pair, and feeds the resulting relation text into a heterograph over target sentences and context articles. On the bilingual benchmark of Sheng et al., LCV improves over the strongest omission-aware baseline by $2.56$ and $2.84$ macro-F1 points on the English and Chinese splits, respectively. The results indicate that modeling the missing cross-source fact itself, rather than only attaching retrieved evidence or predicting an omission signal, is a useful representation for omission-aware misinformation detection.

AI.tldr: 提出Latent Causal Void (LCV)方法，通过显式重构缺失事实文本并作为跨源关系进行图推理，在遗漏相关虚假新闻检测中超越现有最优方法2.56和2.84个macro-F1点。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假信息检测方法在处理局部连贯但需与同期报道对比才能暴露误导性的遗漏相关内容时表现有限，当前遗漏感知方法要么附加检索上下文作为辅助证据，要么推断分类别的遗漏信号，均未显式建模缺失的具体事实。
AI.method: LCV首先检索时间对齐的上下文文章，利用冻结的指令微调大语言模型为每个目标句子-文章对生成简短的缺失上下文描述，然后将该关系文本作为跨源文本特征输入到由目标句子和上下文文章构成的异质图中进行图推理，从而显式重构缺失事实。
AI.result: 在Sheng等人的双语基准上，LCV在英文和中文分集上分别比最强遗漏感知基线提升2.56和2.84个macro-F1点，表明显式建模缺失跨源事实本身比仅附加检索证据或预测遗漏信号更具优势。
AI.conclusion: 显式重构缺失事实并将其作为跨源关系表征用于图推理，是一种有效的遗漏感知虚假信息检测策略，为未来研究提供了将缺失事实显式建模而非隐式信号处理的新方向。

title: Under the Hood of SKILL.md: Semantic Supply-chain Attacks on AI Agent Skill Registry
summary: Autonomous AI agents increasingly extend their capabilities through Agent Skills: modular filesystem packages whose SKILL.md files describe when and how agents should use them. While this design enables scalable, on-demand capability expansion, it also introduces a semantic supply-chain risk in which natural-language metadata and instructions can affect which skills are admitted, surfaced, selected, and loaded. We study SKILL.md - only attacks across three registry-facing stages of the Agent Skill lifecycle, using real ClawHub skills and realistic registry mechanisms. In Discovery, short textual triggers can manipulate embedding-based retrieval and improve adversarial skill visibility, achieving up to 86% pairwise win rate and 80% Top-10 placement. In Selection, description-only framing biases agents toward functionally equivalent adversarial variants, which are selected in 77.6% of paired trials on average. In Governance, semantic evasion strategies cause malicious skills to avoid a blocking verdict in 36.5%-100% of cases. Overall, our results show that SKILL.md is not passive documentation but operational text that shapes which third-party capabilities agents find, trust, and use.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示并系统研究了AI智能体技能生态中的语义供应链风险，论证了SKILL.md文件中的自然语言元数据和指令作为可操作文本，能够在技能发现、选择和治理三个关键环节被恶意利用，从而操纵第三方能力的检索、信任与加载。
AI.motivation: 自主AI智能体通过Agent Skills（基于SKILL.md文件的模块化包）扩展能力，但这种设计引入了语义供应链风险，即自然语言元数据和指令可能影响哪些技能被接纳、呈现、选择和加载。现有研究尚未系统评估SKILL.md文件本身作为攻击向量在技能生命周期各阶段的安全性。
AI.method: 作者研究了SKILL.md-only攻击，聚焦Agent技能生命周期中面向注册中心的三个关键阶段：发现（Discovery）、选择（Selection）和治理（Governance）。在发现阶段，利用短文本触发器操纵基于嵌入的检索；在选择阶段，通过描述性框架偏置（description-only framing）使智能体偏向功能等效的对抗变体；在治理阶段，采用语义规避策略绕过阻断判决。实验基于真实ClawHub技能和逼真的注册中心机制。
AI.result: 在发现阶段，对抗性文本触发器实现了高达86%的成对胜率和80%的Top-10排名；在选择阶段，描述性框架偏置使智能体在平均77.6%的成对试验中选择对抗性变体；在治理阶段，语义规避策略导致恶意技能在36.5%-100%的案例中逃脱阻断判决。
AI.conclusion: SKILL.md并非被动文档，而是影响智能体发现、信任和使用第三方能力的可操作文本，构成了新型语义供应链攻击面。该研究揭示了当前智能体技能生态中自然语言元数据的安全脆弱性，为构建更安全的智能体扩展机制提供了重要警示和评估框架。

title: JACoP: Joint Alignment for Compliant Multi-Agent Prediction
summary: Stochastic Human Trajectory Prediction (HTP) using generative modeling has emerged as a significant area of research. Although state-of-the-art models excel in optimizing the accuracy of individual agents, they often struggle to generate predictions that are collectively compliant, leading to output trajectories marred by social collisions and environmental violations, thus rendering them impractical for real-world applications. To bridge this gap, we present JACoP: Joint Alignment for Compliant Multi-Agent Prediction, an innovative multi-stage framework that ensures scene-level plausibility. JACoP incorporates an Anchor-Based Agent-Centric Profiler for effective initial compliance filtering and employs a Markov Random Field (MRF) based aligner to formalize the joint selection for scene predictions. By representing inter-agent spatial and social costs as MRF energy potentials, we successfully infer and sample from the joint trajectory distribution, achieving prediction with optimal scene compliance.
