Comprehensive experiments show that JACoP not only achieves competitive accuracy, but also sets a new standard in reducing both environmental violations and social collisions, thereby confirming its ability to produce collectively feasible and practically applicable trajectory predictions.

AI.tldr: JACoP提出了一种基于马尔可夫随机场对齐的多阶段框架，通过锚点式智能体中心描述器和MRF联合选择机制，在保持轨迹预测精度的同时显著减少了社交碰撞与环境违规，实现了场景级一致的集体可行轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成式建模的随机人类轨迹预测方法虽然在单智能体精度上表现优异，但生成的多智能体轨迹常出现社交碰撞和环境违规等集体不一致问题，缺乏场景级合理性，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: JACoP是一个多阶段框架，包含两个核心模块：一是基于锚点的智能体中心描述器（Anchor-Based Agent-Centric Profiler），用于初始合规性过滤；二是基于马尔可夫随机场（MRF）的对齐器，通过将智能体间空间代价和社会代价建模为MRF能量势，形式化地实现场景预测的联合选择，从而推断并采样联合轨迹分布。
AI.result: 综合实验表明，JACoP在保持与现有方法竞争力相当的精度的同时，在减少环境违规和社交碰撞方面设立了新的标准，验证了其生成集体可行且实际可用的轨迹预测的能力。
AI.conclusion: JACoP通过显式建模智能体间依赖关系并采用联合对齐策略，证明了在轨迹预测中兼顾个体精度与集体合规性是可行的，为生成具有现实可用性的多智能体轨迹预测提供了有效范式。

title: Correcting Selection Bias in Sparse User Feedback for Large Language Model Quality Estimation: A Multi-Agent Hierarchical Bayesian Approach
summary: [Abridged] Production LLM deployments receive feedback from a non-random fraction of users: thumbs sit mostly in the tails of the satisfaction distribution, and a naive average over them can land 40-50 percentage points away from true system quality. We treat this as a topic- and sentiment- stratified selection-bias problem and propose a three-agent hierarchical Bayesian pipeline that does not require ground-truth labels on individual interactions. A Topic Clustering Agent partitions the stream via UMAP + HDBSCAN over text embeddings; a Bias Modeling Agent fits a two-stage hierarchical Beta-Binomial under NUTS, inferring per-topic selection rates $s_c$ and quality $q_c$ with partial pooling; a Synthesis Agent reweights $q_c$ by true topic prevalence $\hatπ_c = n_c/N$ to report a bias-corrected aggregate posterior $\bar Q = \sum_c \hatπ_c q_c$ with credible interval, plus drift signals for online recalibration. Validation uses UltraFeedback (N=10,232 retained interactions, $C=18$ clusters, $Q^\star=0.6249$) with simulated topic- and sentiment-dependent selection biases. We compare five Bayesian variants against Naive and IPW baselines. A mild prior on the feedback channel (typical positive-feedback rate and negative-to-positive ratio, both readable from any production dashboard without labels) keeps Hierarchical-Informed within 4-13 pp of $Q^\star$ as the bias ratio sweeps from 1:1 to 30:1, with 95% credible intervals covering $Q^\star$ in 50/50 random-seed replicates at $κ_{\max}=10$. Without channel-side priors, every weak-prior variant misses $Q^\star$ by 22-33 pp: the per-cluster sufficient statistics admit a one-parameter family of equally good fits, and the prior on the bias channel (not on latent quality) is what breaks the degeneracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三智能体层次化贝叶斯流水线，用于纠正生产环境中LLM部署因用户反馈非随机（情感与主题分层选择偏差）导致的满意度估计偏差。该方法通过主题聚类、偏置建模（层次化Beta-Binomial模型+NUTS推断）和合成加权，在无需个体交互真实标签的情况下，将估计偏差控制在4-13个百分点内，且发现对反馈渠道的先验（而非对潜在质量的先验）是打破模型退化性的关键。
AI.motivation: 生产环境中的LLM部署接收到的用户反馈并非来自随机用户群体——用户的好评和差评主要分布在满意度分布的尾部，对反馈进行简单平均可能导致评估结果与真实系统质量相差40-50个百分点。现有方法缺乏在无个体交互真实标签条件下，有效处理这种主题和情感分层选择偏差的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三智能体层次化贝叶斯流水线：主题聚类代理使用UMAP+HDBSCAN对文本嵌入进行流式主题分割；偏置建模代理使用NUTS（No-U-Turn Sampler）拟合两阶段层次化Beta-Binomial模型，推断每个主题的选择率s_c和真实质量q_c，并引入部分池化（partial pooling）；合成代理根据真实主题流行度π̂_c=n_c/N对q_c进行重新加权，输出偏差校正后的聚合后验估计Q̄=∑_c π̂_c q_c及其置信区间，并提供漂移信号用于在线重新校准。
AI.result: 在UltraFeedback数据集（N=10,232个保留交互，C=18个主题簇，真实质量Q*=0.6249）上，通过模拟主题和情感依赖的选择偏差进行验证。对比五种贝叶斯变体与朴素平均（Naive）和逆概率加权（IPW）基线。在偏差比从1:1到30:1的变化范围内，带有温和反馈渠道先验的Hierarchical-Informed方法将估计偏差控制在4-13个百分点内，且其95%置信区间在最大偏差κ_max=10时覆盖了50/50随机种子复现中Q*的真值；而无渠道先验的弱先验变体则偏差达22-33个百分点——每个主题的充分统计量允许一参数族的等优拟合，只有对偏差渠道的先验（而非对潜在质量的先验）才能打破退化性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究的关键洞见是：在存在主题和情感分层选择偏差的反馈数据中，层次化贝叶斯方法能够有效校正系统质量估计，但其成功依赖于对反馈渠道（即选择率）施加合理的先验信息，而非对潜在质量施加先验——后者无法打破模型的退化性。这意味着生产环境中可从仪表盘直接获取的正反馈率和负正比等渠道统计信息作为先验输入，即可实现无需个体标签的偏差校正。

title: FibQuant: Universal Vector Quantization for Random-Access KV-Cache Compression
summary: Long-context inference is increasingly a memory-traffic problem. The culprit is the key--value (KV) cache: it grows with context length, batch size, layers, and heads, and it is read at every decoding step. Rotation-based scalar codecs meet this systems constraint by storing a norm, applying a shared random rotation, and quantizing one coordinate at a time. They are universal and random-access, but they discard the geometry created by the normalization step. After a Haar rotation, a block of $k$ consecutive coordinates is not a product source; it is a spherical-Beta source on the unit ball. We introduce \textsc{FibQuant}, a universal fixed-rate vector quantizer that keeps the same normalize--rotate--store interface while replacing scalar tables by a shared radial--angular codebook matched to this canonical source. The codebook combines Beta-quantile radii, Fibonacci\,/\,Roberts--Kronecker quasi-uniform directions, and multi-restart Lloyd--Max refinement. We prove that the resulting vector code strictly improves on its scalar product specialization at matched rate, with a high-rate gain that separates into a cell-shaping factor and a density-matching factor. The same construction gives a dense rate axis, including fractional-bit and sub-one-bit operating points, without calibration or variable-length addresses. On GPT-2 small KV caches, \textsc{FibQuant} traces a memory--fidelity frontier from $5\times$ compression at $0.99$ attention cosine similarity to $34\times$ at $0.95$. End-to-end on TinyLlama-1.1B, it is within $0.10$ perplexity of fp16 at $4\times$ compression and has $3.6\times$ lower perplexity than scalar \textsc{TurboQuant} at $b = 2$ ($8\times$ compression), where scalar random-access quantization begins to fail.

AI.tldr: FibQuant 是一种面向长上下文推理中 KV 缓存压缩的通用定速率向量量化器，通过在归一化-旋转-存储接口中引入匹配规范球-贝塔分布的径向-角度联合码本，在相同比特率下严格优于标量量化方案，并在 GPT-2 和 TinyLlama-1.1B 上实现了显著的内存-保真度前沿改善。
AI.motivation: 长上下文推理中 KV 缓存随上下文长度、批次大小、层数和头数线性增长，成为内存带宽瓶颈；现有基于旋转的标量码元量化器虽然通用且支持随机访问，但在归一化步骤后丢弃了数据在单位球面上的几何结构，无法有效利用向量级的信息冗余。
AI.method: FibQuant 采用归一化-旋转-存储的相同接口，但用共享的径向-角度联合码本取代标量码本。该码本由 Beta 分位数径向码本、Fibonacci/Roberts–Kronecker 准均匀方向码本以及多重重启 Lloyd–Max 细化三部分构成，专门匹配 Haar 旋转后形成的高维球-贝塔分布源。
AI.result: 在 GPT-2 small KV 缓存上，FibQuant 在注意力余弦相似度 0.99 时实现 5 倍压缩，0.95 时实现 34 倍压缩；在 TinyLlama-1.1B 端到端测试中，4 倍压缩时困惑度与 fp16 相差不到 0.10，在 b=2（8 倍压缩）时困惑度比标量 TurboQuant 低 3.6 倍。
AI.conclusion: FibQuant 证明了向量量化在 KV 缓存压缩中的优势，其码本设计的理论增益分为单元形状因子和密度匹配因子两部分，且支持分数比特和亚一比特工作点，无需校准或变长地址，为高效长上下文推理提供了实用方案。

title: PD-4DGS:Progressive Decomposition of 4D Gaussian Splatting for Bandwidth-Adaptive Dynamic Scene Streaming
summary: 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) enables high-quality dynamic novel view synthesis, yet current models remain monolithic bitstreams that clients must download in full before any frame can be rendered, causing black-screen waits of tens to hundreds of seconds on mobile bandwidth and leaving 4DGS incompatible with modern adaptive-bitrate delivery. Progressive 3DGS compression alleviates this for static scenes, but it acts only on spatial anchors and cannot partition the temporal deformation networks that dominate dynamic-scene size. We present PD-4DGS, the first framework for progressive compression and on-demand transmission of 4DGS. Hierarchical Deformation Decomposition (HDD) externalises the coarse-to-fine motion hierarchy already latent in 4DGS into three independently transmittable layers -- a static scaffold, a global deformation, and a local refinement -- so that any prefix of the bitstream is already renderable, turning a single training run into a scalable, DASH/HLS-compatible bitstream. A Gaussian-entropy attribute rate-distortion loss together with a temporal mask consistency regulariser shrink the base layer while suppressing low-bitrate flicker; a capacity-weighted rollout schedule, gated online by a learnt activation rate rho, then prevents deformation-network under-training without any per-scene hyperparameter. On the Dycheck iPhone benchmark, PD-4DGS cuts the streamed bitstream by >60% at matched rendering fidelity and reduces first-frame latency from 73--930 s to ~1.7 s on a 2 Mbps link, uniquely enabling true on-demand progressive streaming for 4DGS.

AI.tldr: PD-4DGS是首个实现4D高斯泼溅渐进式压缩与按需传输的框架，通过分层变形分解将运动层次结构解耦为三个独立可传输层，在匹配渲染质量下将流媒体比特率降低超过60%，并将首帧延迟从数十秒降至约1.7秒，使4DGS兼容DASH/HLS自适应比特率传输。
AI.motivation: 现有4D高斯泼溅模型作为 monolithic 比特流，客户端必须完整下载后才能渲染任何帧，在移动带宽下导致数十至数百秒的黑屏等待，且无法兼容现代自适应比特率传输协议；同时，渐进式压缩方法仅适用于静态场景，无法对占据动态场景主要规模的时域变形网络进行分区。
AI.method: PD-4DGS提出分层变形分解（HDD），将4DGS中固有的由粗到精运动层次结构外部化为三个独立可传输层：静态支架、全局变形和局部细化，使得比特流的任意前缀均可立即渲染。此外，采用高斯熵属性率失真损失和时域掩码一致性正则化器来压缩基础层并抑制低比特率闪烁；引入容量加权的滚动调度，通过在线学习的激活率ρ进行门控，无需逐场景超参数即可防止变形网络欠训练。
AI.result: 在Dycheck iPhone基准测试上，PD-4DGS在匹配渲染保真度下将流媒体比特率降低超过60%；在2 Mbps链路上将首帧延迟从73–930秒大幅削减至约1.7秒，实现了4DGS真正的按需渐进式流媒体传输。
AI.conclusion: PD-4DGS通过将单次训练转化为可扩展的DASH/HLS兼容比特流，首次在4DGS中实现了渐进式压缩与按需传输，大幅降低了首帧延迟和传输开销，为动态场景的实时自适应流媒体应用铺平了道路。

title: Combining On-Policy Optimization and Distillation for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to long-context tasks requires post-training methods that remain accurate and coherent over thousands of tokens. Existing approaches are limited in several ways: 1) off-policy methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and knowledge distillation (KD) suffer from exposure bias and limited recovery from model-generated errors over long horizons; 2) on-policy reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) better align training with model-generated states, but are unstable and sample-inefficient due to sparse rewards; 3) on-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level guidance, but does not directly optimize arbitrary reward signals. In this paper, we propose Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO), a method for long-context reasoning that augments GRPO with dense guidance from a stronger teacher via OPD. We also introduce LongBlocks, a synthetic long-context dataset spanning multi-hop reasoning, contextual grounding, and long-form generation. We conduct extensive experiments and ablations comparing off-policy training, sparse-reward GRPO, and our combined approach, leading to an improved recipe for long-context alignment. Overall, our results show that combining outcome-based policy optimization with knowledge distillation in a single objective provides a more stable and effective path to long-context reasoning, while preserving short-context capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出 dGRPO 方法，将基于结果（奖励信号）的策略优化与基于教师模型的在线逐 token 蒸馏结合到统一目标中，并引入 LongBlocks 长上下文合成数据集，从而在长上下文推理任务中实现更稳定、更有效的后训练对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文后训练方法存在关键局限：SFT 和知识蒸馏等离策略方法存在暴露偏差，长程生成中难以从模型自身错误中恢复；基于 GRPO 的在线策略强化学习奖励稀疏、训练不稳定且样本效率低；在线策略蒸馏虽能提供密集逐 token 指导，但无法直接优化任意奖励信号。缺乏一种能同时利用奖励信号和密集教师指导的稳定后训练方法。
AI.method: 提出 Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO)，将 GRPO 的基于结果的策略优化与来自强教师模型的在线策略蒸馏 (OPD) 的密集逐 token 指导融合到单一训练目标中。同时构建 LongBlocks 合成长上下文数据集，涵盖多跳推理、上下文定位和长文生成三类任务。通过对比离策略训练、仅使用稀疏奖励的 GRPO 以及 dGRPO 进行消融实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，将基于结果的策略优化与知识蒸馏结合为单一目标的 dGRPO 方法，相比离策略训练和纯 GRPO，在长上下文推理任务中训练更稳定、效果更优，同时能保持短上下文能力不下降。
AI.conclusion: 结合奖励驱动的策略优化和密集教师蒸馏是长上下文对齐的更优训练范式，该方法兼具稀疏奖励信号的方向引导和密集逐 token 指导的稳定性，为长上下文后训练提供了有效改进路径。

title: Hierarchical LLM-Driven Control for HAPS-Assisted UAV Networks: Joint Optimization of Flight and Connectivity
summary: Uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly deployed in complex networked environments, yet the joint optimization of multi-UAV motion control and connectivity remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we study a multi-UAV system operating in an integrated terrestrial and non-terrestrial network (ITNTN) comprising terrestrial base stations and high-altitude platform stations (HAPS). We consider a three-dimensional (3D) aerial highway scenario where UAVs must adapt their motion to ensure collision avoidance, efficient traffic flow, and reliable communication under dynamic and partially observable conditions. We first model the problem as a hierarchical multi-objective partially observable Markov decision process (H-MO-POMDP), capturing the coupling between control and communication objectives. Based on this formulation, we propose a large language model (LLM)-driven hierarchical multi-rate control framework. At the global level, an LLM-based controller on the HAPS performs long-term planning for load balancing and handover decisions. At the local level, each UAV employs a hybrid controller that integrates a slow-timescale LLM for high-level spatial reasoning with a reinforcement learning agent for faster UAV-to-infrastructure (U2I) communication and motion control. We further develop a high-fidelity 3D simulation platform by integrating the gym-pybullet-drones environment with 3GPP-compliant RF/THz channel models. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 14% increase in transportation efficiency and a 25% improvement in telecommunication throughput. Additionally, it achieves a 23% reduction in physical collision rates, demonstrating strong handover stability and zero-shot generalization in dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向多无人机在集成地面与非地面网络(ITNTN)中联合运动控制与连接优化的LLM驱动分层多速率控制框架，在三维空中高速路场景下实现了14%的运输效率提升、25%的通信吞吐量改进和23%的碰撞率降低。
AI.motivation: 多无人机在复杂网络化环境中的运动控制与通信连接联合优化是一个基本挑战，现有方法难以在动态且部分可观测条件下同时满足避碰、高效交通流和可靠通信的需求，特别是在集成地面与非地面网络(ITNTN)与三维空中高速路场景中。
AI.method: 首先将问题建模为分层多目标部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(H-MO-POMDP)，然后提出LLM驱动的分层多速率控制框架：全局层由部署在高空平台站(HAPS)上的LLM控制器负责长期负载均衡和切换决策，局部层每架无人机采用混合控制器，将慢时间尺度LLM的高层空间推理与快速强化学习智能体的无人机到基础设施(U2I)通信和运动控制相结合，并基于gym-pybullet-drones环境与3GPP兼容RF/THz信道模型构建高保真3D仿真平台。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，所提框架显著优于最先进基线方法：运输效率提升14%，通信吞吐量提升25%，物理碰撞率降低23%，同时在动态场景下表现出强切换稳定性和零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LLM与强化学习的分层协同范式能够有效解耦多无人机系统中不同时间尺度的控制与通信目标，实现运动控制与连接优化的联合提升，为复杂空天地一体化网络下的自主无人机编队提供了可行框架。

title: SpatialForge: Bootstrapping 3D-Aware Spatial Reasoning from Open-World 2D Images
summary: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated exceptional semantic understanding, yet these models consistently struggle with spatial reasoning, often failing at fundamental geometric tasks such as depth ordering and precise coordinate grounding. Recent efforts introduce spatial supervision from scene-centric datasets (e.g., multi-view scans or indoor video), but are constrained by the limited number of underlying scenes. As a result, the scale and diversity of such data remain significantly smaller than those of web-scale 2D image collections. To address this limitation, we propose SpatialForge, a scalable data synthesis pipeline that transforms in-the-wild 2D images into spatial reasoning supervision. Our approach decomposes spatial reasoning into perception and relation, and constructs structured supervision signals covering depth, layout, and viewpoint-dependent reasoning, with automatic verification to ensure data quality. Based on this pipeline, we build SpatialForge-10M, a large-scale dataset containing 10 million spatial QA pairs. Extensive experiments across multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that training on SpatialForge-10M significantly improves the spatial reasoning ability of standard VLMs, highlighting the effectiveness of scaling 2D data for 3D-aware spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: SpatialForge提出了一种可扩展的数据合成流水线，将任意2D图像转化为空间推理监督信号，构建了包含1000万空间问答对的SpatialForge-10M数据集，显著提升了标准视觉语言模型在多种空间推理基准上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（VLMs）在语义理解上表现出色，但在空间推理任务（如深度排序、精确坐标定位）上持续失败。当前引入空间监督的方法依赖场景级数据集（如多视角扫描或室内视频），受限于底层场景数量，其数据规模与多样性远不及网络规模的2D图像集合，亟需一种可扩展的从2D图像中获取空间推理监督信号的方法。
AI.method: SpatialForge是一种可扩展的数据合成流水线，将任意2D图像转换为空间推理监督信号。该方法将空间推理分解为感知（perception）与关系（relation）两大维度，构建覆盖深度、布局和视角依赖推理的结构化监督信号，并引入自动验证机制确保数据质量。基于此流水线构建了包含1000万空间问答对的大规模数据集SpatialForge-10M。
AI.result: 在多个空间推理基准上的大量实验表明，使用SpatialForge-10M训练的标准VLMs的空间推理能力得到显著提升，验证了将2D数据规模化用于3D感知空间推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明，通过可扩展的合成流水线将大规模2D图像转化为结构化空间监督信号，能够有效弥补VLMs在空间推理上的短板，为突破场景级数据规模瓶颈提供了可行路径，凸显了2D数据规模化对3D感知空间推理的重要价值。

title: Mind the Pause: Disfluency-Aware Objective Tuning for Multilingual Speech Correction with LLMs
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) transcripts often contain disfluencies, such as fillers, repetitions, and false starts, which reduce readability and hinder downstream applications like chatbots and voice assistants. If left unaddressed, such disfluencies can significantly degrade the reliability of downstream systems. Most existing approaches rely on classical models that focus on identifying disfluent tokens for removal. While this strategy is effective to some extent, it often disrupts grammatical structure and semantic coherence, leading to incomplete or unnatural sentences. Recent literature explored the use of large language models (LLMs); however, these efforts have primarily focused on disfluency detection or data augmentation, rather than performing comprehensive correction. We propose a multilingual correction pipeline where a sequence tagger first marks disfluent tokens, and these signals guide instruction fine-tuning of an LLM to rewrite transcripts into fluent text. To further improve reliability, we add a contrastive learning objective that penalizes the reproduction of disfluent tokens, encouraging the model to preserve grammar and meaning while removing disfluent artifacts. Our experiments across three Indian languages, namely Hindi, Bengali, and Marathi show consistent improvements over strong baselines, including multilingual sequence-to-sequence models. These results highlight that detection-only strategies are insufficient. Combining token-level cues with instruction tuning and contrastive learning provides a practical and scalable solution for multilingual disfluency correction in speech-driven NLP systems. We make the codes publicly available at https://github.com/deepak-kumar-98/Mind-the-Pause.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合序列标注器与指令微调LLM的多语种语音转写修正流水线，并引入对比学习目标以抑制不流利标记的复现，在印地语、孟加拉语和马拉地语上取得一致改进，验证了检测+修正策略优于仅检测策略。
AI.motivation: ASR转录文本中常包含填充词、重复和错误起始等不流利现象，严重影响可读性和下游系统（如聊天机器人、语音助手）的可靠性。现有方法多仅对不流利标记进行检测和移除，容易破坏语法结构和语义连贯性；而近期利用LLM的工作主要局限于不流利检测或数据增强，未实现全面的修正。
AI.method: 提出一个多语种修正流水线：首先使用序列标注模型标记不流利标记，然后将这些标记信号作为引导，对LLM进行指令微调以将转录文本重写为流畅文本；进一步引入对比学习目标，惩罚模型复现不流利标记的行为，从而在移除不流利伪迹的同时保留语法和语义。
AI.result: 在印地语、孟加拉语和马拉地语三种印度语言上的实验表明，该方法一致优于包括多语种序列到序列模型在内的强基线，证明仅检测策略不足以解决问题。
AI.conclusion: 将标记级线索与指令微调和对比学习相结合，为语音驱动的NLP系统提供了一种实用且可扩展的多语种不流利修正方案；仅依赖不流利检测是不够的，需要同时进行检测与修正才能保证输出质量。

title: Hindsight Hint Distillation: Scaffolded Reasoning for SWE Agents from CoT-free Answers
summary: Solving complex long-horizon tasks requires strong planning and reasoning capabilities. Although datasets with explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) rationales can substantially benefit learning, they are costly to obtain. To address this challenge, we propose Hindsight Hint Distillation (HHD), which only requires easy-to-obtain question-answer pairs without CoT annotations. Inspired by how human teachers use student mistakes to provide targeted guidance, HHD synthesizes hindsight hints from the model's own failed self-rollouts and uses them to scaffold on-policy rollouts that successfully complete the tasks. The model then self-distills these scaffolded trajectories and generalizes to new problems without hint guidance. Experiments show that HHD significantly outperforms iterative RFT and trajectory-synthesis baselines, achieving an absolute improvement of 8\% on SWE-bench Verified, while all baselines improve by only around 2\%. Notably, the reasoning strategies induced by HHD generalize effectively to out-of-distribution tasks, yielding the largest gains on SWE-bench Multilingual despite no training on multilingual data. These results demonstrate that HHD can effectively synthesize expert-like reasoning from CoT-free data and substantially improve long-horizon performance.

AI.tldr: HHD 是一种无需链式思维标注的 hindsight 提示蒸馏方法，通过利用模型自身的失败轨迹合成提示并自蒸馏成功轨迹，在无 CoT 数据下显著提升长时域规划任务性能，在 SWE-bench Verified 上取得 8% 的绝对提升且推理策略具备良好泛化性。
AI.motivation: 复杂长时域任务需要强大的规划与推理能力，而显式链式思维（CoT）标注数据虽然能有效辅助学习，但获取成本极高，因此如何在仅使用易获取的问答对（无 CoT 标注）的条件下提升模型的长期推理规划能力是一个关键研究空白。
AI.method: 提出 Hindsight Hint Distillation (HHD) 框架：从模型自身的失败自回滚轨迹中合成事后提示（hindsight hints），利用这些提示引导模型生成成功的在线回滚轨迹，最终通过自蒸馏将成功轨迹的知识迁移回模型，使其在无提示辅助下也能泛化到新问题。
AI.result: HHD 在 SWE-bench Verified 上取得 8% 的绝对提升，远超迭代 RFT 和轨迹合成基线（后者仅提升约 2%）；在未经过多语言数据训练的 SWE-bench Multilingual 上仍取得最大增益，表明其推理策略有效泛化至分布外任务。
AI.conclusion: HHD 能够从无 CoT 标注的问答数据中有效地蒸馏出专家级推理能力，显著提升长时域任务表现，并且所习得的推理策略具有良好的跨任务、跨分布泛化能力，为低成本获取高质量推理模型提供了可行路径。

title: Deep Probabilistic Unfolding for Quantized Compressive Sensing
summary: We propose a deep probabilistic unfolding model to address the classical quantized compressive sensing problem that leverages an unfolding framework to enhance the reconstruction accuracy and efficiency. Unlike previous unfolding methods that apply L2 projection to measurements, we derive a closed-form, numerically stable likelihood gradient projection, which allows the model to respect the true quantization physics, turning the hard quantization constraint into a soft probabilistic guidance. Furthermore, an efficient, dual-domain Mamba module is specifically designed to dynamically capture and fuse the multi-scale local and global features, ensuring the interactions between the distant but correlated regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed method over previous works, which is capable of promoting the application of quantized compressive sensing in real life.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度概率展开模型，通过引入封闭式数值稳定的似然梯度投影和双域Mamba模块，解决经典量化压缩感知问题，在重建精度和效率上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有展开式方法在量化压缩感知中采用L2投影处理测量值，忽略了真实的量化物理过程，导致重建精度受限；同时缺乏高效捕获远距离相关区域之间多尺度局部和全局特征的机制。
AI.method: 提出深度概率展开模型，推导出封闭式且数值稳定的似然梯度投影替代传统的L2投影，将硬量化约束转化为软概率引导；设计高效的双域Mamba模块，动态捕获并融合多尺度局部与全局特征，确保远距离相关区域间的交互。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在量化压缩感知重建任务上性能优于现有方法，达到最先进水平，能够有效推动量化压缩感知在真实世界中的应用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过概率建模和双域特征融合，解决了量化约束建模不准确和远距离依赖捕获不足两个关键问题，为量化压缩感知的实际部署提供了可行的技术路径。

title: PRISM: Pareto-Efficient Retrieval over Intent-Aware Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon language agents accumulate conversation history far faster than any fixed context window can hold, making memory management critical to both answer accuracy and serving cost. Existing approaches either expand the context window without addressing what is retrieved, perform heavy ingestion-time fact extraction at substantial token cost, or rely on heuristic graph traversal that leaves both accuracy and efficiency on the table. We present PRISM, a training-free retrieval-side framework that treats long-horizon memory as a joint retrieval-and-compression problem over a graph-structured memory. PRISM combines four orthogonal inference-time components: Hierarchical Bundle Search over typed relation paths, Query-Sensitive Edge Costing that aligns traversal with detected query intent, Evidence Compression that compresses the candidate bundle into a compact answer-side context, and Adaptive Intent Routing that routes most queries through zero-LLM tiers. By formulating retrieval as min-cost selection over typed path templates and pairing it with an LLM-side compression step, PRISM surfaces the right evidence under a strict context budget without any fine-tuning or modification to the upstream ingestion pipeline. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that PRISM delivers substantially higher LLM-judge accuracy than every same-protocol baseline at an order-of-magnitude smaller context budget, occupying a previously empty corner of the accuracy-context-cost frontier and demonstrating a superior balance between answer quality and retrieval efficiency.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一种无需训练的检索侧框架，通过将长时记忆建模为图结构上的联合检索与压缩问题，结合分层束搜索、查询敏感边成本计算、证据压缩与自适应意图路由四种正交推理时组件，在LoCoMo基准上以数量级更小的上下文预算实现了显著优于基线的LLM评判准确率，占据了准确率-上下文成本边界上此前空白的区域。
AI.motivation: 长时程语言智能体在持续对话中积累的历史远超任何固定上下文窗口的容量，现有方法要么扩展窗口但不解决检索内容的质量问题，要么在摄入阶段进行昂贵的事实抽取，要么依赖启发式图遍历导致准确率和效率均不理想，亟需一种在不修改上游摄入流程的前提下实现高效、准确记忆检索的框架。
AI.method: PRISM将长时记忆视为图结构上的联合检索与压缩问题，提出四种正交的推理时组件：分层束搜索（Hierarchical Bundle Search）在类型化关系路径上进行搜索、查询敏感边成本计算（Query-Sensitive Edge Costing）根据检测到的查询意图调整遍历策略、证据压缩（Evidence Compression）将候选束压缩为紧凑的答案侧上下文、自适应意图路由（Adaptive Intent Routing）将大部分查询路由至零LLM层级，整体将检索建模为类型化路径模板上的最小成本选择问题。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准上的实验表明，PRISM在相同实验协议下以数量级更小的上下文预算实现了显著高于所有基线的LLM评判准确率，占据了准确率-上下文成本边界上此前空白的区域，展现了答案质量与检索效率之间的优越平衡。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过将检索与压缩联合建模在结构化记忆图上，无需微调或修改上游摄入流程即可在严格的上下文预算下呈现正确的证据，验证了推理时检索侧优化作为长时程记忆管理范式的有效性和实用性，为构建高效、准确的长期对话智能体提供了新的技术路径。

title: CuSearch: Curriculum Rollout Sampling via Search Depth for Agentic RAG
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems from outcome-only supervision. Most existing methods optimize policies from uniformly sampled rollouts, implicitly treating all trajectories as equally informative. However, trajectories differ substantially in search depth and are therefore not equally informative: deeper-search trajectories contain more retrieval decision points and provide denser direct supervision for the retrieval sub-policy. Moreover, this heterogeneity grows over training as the within-batch depth distribution shifts toward higher values, yet uniform rollout sampling remains blind to this shift. To address this, we propose CuSearch, a curriculum rollout sampling framework built on Search-Depth Greedy Allocation (SDGA), a batch-level operator that reallocates a fixed update budget toward deeper-search trajectories. SDGA-Auto always targets the deepest available trajectories in the current batch, yielding an implicit training-aligned curriculum as the depth distribution shifts upward. SDGA-Phase explicitly advances the curriculum threshold as deeper trajectories become sufficiently abundant. Experiments across model types and retrieval frameworks show that CuSearch consistently improves performance, achieving up to 11.8 exact-match points over standard GRPO on ZeroSearch. These results establish per-trajectory search depth as a reliable, annotation-free proxy for retrieval supervision density in RLVR-based agentic RAG training. The code is available at https://github.com/MrToser/CuSearch.

AI.tldr: 提出基于搜索深度的课程式 rollout 采样框架 CuSearch，通过 SDGA 算子优先采样深搜轨迹以提升 RLVR 训练 agentic RAG 系统的效率，在 ZeroSearch 上相比 GRPO 提升最高 11.8 个精确匹配点。
AI.motivation: 现有 RLVR 方法在训练 agentic RAG 系统时对所有 rollout 轨迹进行均匀采样，但不同轨迹的搜索深度差异显著，深搜轨迹包含更多检索决策点、能为检索子策略提供更密集的直接监督信号，且训练过程中深度分布会向高值偏移，均匀采样无法捕捉这一变化，导致监督信号利用不充分。
AI.method: 提出 CuSearch 框架，核心是 Search-Depth Greedy Allocation (SDGA) 算子，它在批次级别将固定更新预算重新分配给更深搜的轨迹；SDGA-Auto 自动选择当前批次中最深轨迹，随深度分布上移形成隐式训练对齐课程；SDGA-Phase 则在深搜轨迹足够丰富时显式推进课程阈值。
AI.result: 在多种模型类型和检索框架上的实验表明，CuSearch 一致性地提升了性能，在 ZeroSearch 上相比标准 GRPO 最高提升 11.8 个精确匹配点。
AI.conclusion: 每条轨迹的搜索深度可作为 RLVR 训练 agentic RAG 系统中检索监督密度的可靠且免标注的代理指标，为课程式采样策略提供了理论依据和实用工具。

title: A Mimetic Detector for Adversarial Image Perturbations
summary: Adversarial attacks fool deep image classifiers by adding tiny, almost invisible noise patterns to a clean image. The standard $\ell^\infty$-bounded attacks (FGSM, PGD, and the $\ell^\infty$ variant of Carlini--Wagner) produce high-frequency, near-random sign patterns at the pixel level: nearly invisible in $\ell^2$, but carrying disproportionate gradient energy. We exploit this with a single-shot, training-free detector using the high-order Corbino--Castillo mimetic operators from the open-source MOLE library. No retraining, no surrogate classifier, no access to the network under attack: the verdict is a property of the input alone, computed in $O(HW)$ time. We validate the detector on the standard \texttt{peppers} test image at the canonical $\ell^\infty$ budget $\varepsilon = 16/255$ and observe a clean-vs-adversarial separation that grows monotonically from $3.55\times$ at order $k=2$ to $4.19\times$ at $k=6$.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于高阶Corbino-Castillo模仿算子的单次、免训练对抗样本检测方法，仅通过输入图像本身即可在O(HW)时间内检测ℓ∞有界攻击，无需访问目标网络或重新训练。
AI.motivation: 标准ℓ∞有界对抗攻击（如FGSM、PGD和C&W的ℓ∞变体）产生的噪声模式具有高频、近随机符号的特征，在ℓ²度量下几乎不可见，但携带不成比例的梯度能量，现有检测方法通常需要重训练或访问被攻击网络，效率与泛化性受限。
AI.method: 利用MOLE开源库中的高阶Corbino-Castillo模仿算子，在单次前向传播中直接分析输入图像的像素级高频模式，以O(HW)时间复杂度完成检测，无需重训练、无需替代分类器、无需访问待检测网络，判决仅基于输入本身的属性。
AI.result: 在标准peppers测试图像上，针对典型ℓ∞预算ε=16/255，干净图像与对抗样本的检测分离度从阶数k=2时的3.55倍单调增长至k=6时的4.19倍，验证了该方法在不同算子阶数下的稳定有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了仅利用输入图像的固有结构特征即可高效区分干净样本与ℓ∞对抗样本，具有极低计算开销和强泛化潜力，为无需模型访问的对抗检测提供了新思路。

title: Scalable Token-Level Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but they still frequently produce hallucinations. These hallucinations are difficult to detect in reasoning-intensive tasks, where the content appears coherent but contains errors like logical flaws and unreliable intermediate results. While step-level analysis is commonly used to detect internal hallucinations, it suffers from limited granularity and poor scalability due to its reliance on step segmentation. To address these limitations, we propose TokenHD, a holistic pipeline for training token-level hallucination detectors. Specifically, TokenHD consists of a scalable data engine for synthesizing large-scale hallucination annotations along with a training recipe featuring an importance-weighted strategy for robust model training. To systematically assess the detection performance, we also provide a rigorous evaluation protocol. Through training within TokenHD, our detector operates directly on free-form text to identify hallucinations, eliminating the need for predefined step segmentation or additional text reformatting. Our experiments show that even a small detector (0.6B) achieves substantial performance gains after training, surpassing much larger reasoning models (e.g., QwQ-32B), and detection performance scales consistently with model size from 0.6B to 8B. Finally, we show that our detector can generalize well across diverse practical scenarios and explore strategies to further enhance its cross-domain generalization capability.

AI.tldr: TokenHD 提出了一种基于 token 级注释的幻觉检测训练管线，通过可扩展的数据引擎和重要性加权训练策略，使小型检测器（0.6B）在无需步骤分割的情况下超越大型推理模型（如 QwQ-32B），并在模型规模从 0.6B 扩展到 8B 时呈现一致的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型幻觉检测方法在推理密集型任务中面临两大挑战：一是内容表面连贯但包含逻辑错误和不可靠中间结果，难以识别；二是基于步骤级别的分析受限于步骤分割的粗粒度性和低可扩展性，无法有效捕捉细粒度的内部幻觉。
AI.method: TokenHD 是一个全流程训练管线，包含两部分核心组件：一是可扩展的数据引擎，用于合成大规模 token 级幻觉标注数据；二是训练方案，采用基于重要性的加权策略以增强模型鲁棒性。该检测器直接对自由文本进行 token 级幻觉识别，无需预定义步骤分割或文本重格式化。
AI.result: 在实验评估中，仅 0.6B 参数的 TokenHD 检测器经过训练后显著超越更大规模的推理模型（如 QwQ-32B），且检测性能在模型规模从 0.6B 到 8B 的范围内呈现一致的可扩展性。此外，该检测器在多种实际场景中展现出良好的跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TokenHD 证明了 token 级幻觉检测相较于步骤级方法的优越性，其简洁的检测流程和可扩展的训练机制为幻觉检测提供了高效实用的新范式。未来可进一步探索增强跨域泛化能力的策略，以推动检测器在更广泛的实际部署中的应用。

title: Can LLM Agents Respond to Disasters? Benchmarking Heterogeneous Geospatial Reasoning in Emergency Operations
comment: DORA stress-tests LLM agents on real-world disaster operations that demand comprehensive orchestration of 108 specialized tools over heterogeneous geospatial data
summary: Operational disaster response goes beyond damage assessment, requiring responders to integrate multi-sensor signals, reason over road networks, populations and key facilities, plan evacuations, and produce actionable reports. However, prior work largely isolates remote-sensing perception or evaluates generic tool use, leaving the end-to-end workflows of emergency operations underexplored. In this paper, we introduce Disaster Operational Response Agent benchmark (DORA), the first agentic benchmark for end-to-end disaster response: 515 expert-authored tasks across 45 real-world disaster events spanning 10 types, paired with expert-verified, replayable gold trajectories totaling 3,500 tool-call steps. Tasks span five dimensions that cover the operational disaster-response pipeline: disaster perception, spatial relational analysis, rescue and evacuation planning, temporal evolution reasoning, and multi-modal report synthesis. Agents compose calls from a 108-tool MCP library over heterogeneous geospatial data: optical, SAR, and multi-spectral imagery across single-, bi-, and multi-temporal sequences (0.015-10m GSD), complemented by elevation and social vector layers. We comprehensively evaluate 13 frontier LLMs on our benchmark, revealing three persistent challenges: 1) disaster-domain grounding exposes unique failure modes (damage-semantic grounding, sensor-modality mismatch, and disaster-pipeline composition); 2) agents are doubly bottlenecked by tool selection and argument grounding, where gold tool-order hints improve accuracy by only 1.08-4.40%, and alternative scaffolds yield at most a 3.24% gain; 3) compositional fragility scales with trajectory length, the agent-to-gold gap widening from 7% to 56% on long pipelines. DORA establishes a rigorous testbed for operationally reliable disaster-response agents.

AI.tldr: DORA 是一个面向端到端灾害应急响应的智能体基准测试，包含515个专家编写的任务、45个真实灾害事件和3500步工具调用轨迹，评估了13个前沿大语言模型，揭示了灾害领域语义对齐、工具选择与参数组合瓶颈以及长轨迹组合脆弱性三大持久挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有灾害响应研究主要聚焦于遥感感知或通用工具使用评估，缺乏覆盖从多传感器信号融合、路网推理、人口与关键设施分析、疏散规划到可操作报告生成的全流程端到端应急操作工作流基准测试，无法全面评估大语言模型在真实灾害响应场景中的操作能力。
AI.method: 构建 DORA 基准测试，包含515个专家编写任务、45个真实灾害事件（10种类型）及专家验证的3500步工具调用轨迹；任务涵盖灾害感知、空间关系分析、救援疏散规划、时序演化推理和多模态报告合成五个维度；设计包含108个工具的 MCP 工具库，支持光学、SAR、多光谱等多种遥感影像（分辨率0.015-10m）以及高程和社会矢量数据；采用13个前沿 LLM 在此基准上进行系统评估。
AI.result: 13个前沿 LLM 在 DORA 基准上表现出三个持续挑战：1）灾害领域知识对齐存在独特失效模式（损伤语义对齐失败、传感器模态不匹配、灾害流程组合错误）；2）工具选择和参数组合构成双重瓶颈，提供正确工具顺序提示仅提升1.08%-4.40%准确率，替代性脚手架最多提升3.24%；3）组合脆弱性随轨迹长度增加而加剧，在长流程任务中智能体与黄金轨迹的差距从7%扩大到56%。
AI.conclusion: DORA 为操作性可靠的灾害响应智能体建立了严格的测试平台，结果表明当前大语言模型在灾害领域端到端工作流上存在显著能力差距，尤其是在长流程任务中的组合推理和工具使用方面，为未来研究指明了改进方向。

title: STRIDE: Training-Free Diversity Guidance via PCA-Directed Feature Perturbation in Single-Step Diffusion Models
summary: Distilled one-step (T=1) or few-step (T$\leq$4) diffusion models enable real-time image generation but often exhibit reduced sample diversity compared to their multi-step counterparts. In multi-step diffusion, diversity can be introduced through schedules, trajectories, or iterative optimization; however, these mechanisms are unavailable in the few-step or single-step setting, limiting the effectiveness of existing diversity-enhancing methods. A natural alternative is to perturb intermediate features, but naive feature perturbation is often ineffective, either yielding limited diversity gains or degrading generation quality. We argue that effective diversity injection in few-step models requires perturbations that respect the model's learned feature geometry. Based on this insight, we propose STRIDE, a training-free and optimization-free method that operates in a single forward pass. STRIDE injects spatially coherent (pink) noise into intermediate transformer features, projected onto the principal components of the model's own activations, ensuring that perturbations lie on the learned feature manifold. This design enables controlled variation along meaningful directions in the representation space. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-schnell and SD3.5 Turbo across COCO, DrawBench, PartiPrompts, and GenEval show that STRIDE consistently improves diversity while maintaining strong text alignment. In particular, STRIDE reduces intra-batch similarity with minimal impact on CLIP score, and Pareto-dominates existing training-free baselines on the diversity-fidelity frontier. These results highlight that, in the absence of iterative refinement, improving diversity in few-step and one-step diffusion depends not on increasing perturbation strength, but on aligning perturbations with the model's internal representation structure.

AI.tldr: STRIDE是一种无需训练和优化的方法，通过在中间Transformer特征的主成分方向上注入空间相干（粉红）噪声，在保持文本对齐的同时提升少步扩散模型的生成多样性，且在多样性-保真度前沿上优于现有训练无关基线。
AI.motivation: 蒸馏后的单步或少步扩散模型在实现实时图像生成时，相比多步模型存在样本多样性降低的问题，而多步扩散中通过调度、轨迹或迭代优化引入多样性的机制在少步/单步设置中不可用，现有方法要么多样性增益有限，要么损害生成质量。
AI.method: STRIDE提出在单次前向传播中，将空间相干（粉红）噪声注入中间Transformer特征，并将其投影到模型自身激活的主成分上，确保扰动位于模型学到的特征流形内，从而沿表示空间中有意义的方向实现受控变异。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-schnell和SD3.5 Turbo上，基于COCO、DrawBench、PartiPrompts和GenEval的广泛实验表明，STRIDE一致地提升了生成多样性，同时保持强文本对齐，具体表现为降低批内相似度且对CLIP得分影响极小，并在多样性-保真度前沿上帕累托主导了现有训练无关基线。
AI.conclusion: 在缺乏迭代精炼机制的情况下，提升少步和单步扩散模型的多样性关键不在于增加扰动强度，而在于使扰动与模型内部表示结构对齐，即扰动必须尊重模型学到的特征几何。

title: The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weaken as generative systems improve. We instead adopt a Computational Social Science perspective and ask whether synthetic political discourse behaves like an observed online population. We construct a paired corpus of 1,789,406 posts across nine crisis events: COVID-19, the Jan. 6 Capitol attack, the 2020 and 2024 U.S. elections, Dobbs/Roe v. Wade, the 2020 BLM protests, U.S. midterms, the Utah shooting, and the U.S.-Iran war. For each event, we compare observed discourse from social platforms with synthetic discourse generated for the same context. We evaluate four dimensions: emotional intensity, structural regularity, lexical-ideological framing, and cross-event dependency, using mean gaps and dispersion evidence. Across events, synthetic discourse is fluent but population-level unrealistic. It is generally more negative and less dispersed in sentiment, structurally more regular, and lexically more abstract than observed discourse. Observed discourse instead shows broader emotional variation, longer-tailed structural distributions, and more context-specific, colloquial lexical markers. These differences are event-dependent: larger for fast-moving, decentralized crises and smaller for formal or institutionally mediated events. We summarize them with a simple event-level measure, the Caricature Gap. Our findings suggest that the main limitation of synthetic political discourse is not grammar or fluency, but reduced population realism. Population-level auditing complements traditional text-detection and provides a CSS framework for evaluating the social realism of generated discourse.

AI.tldr: 该论文从计算社会科学视角出发，提出通过种群级统计特征（情感强度、结构规律性、词汇-意识形态框架、跨事件依赖）来评估合成政治话语的种群现实性，发现LLM生成的文本虽流畅但在种群层面不真实，并提出了Caricature Gap指标来量化这种差异。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成文本检测方法主要依赖句子级线索（如困惑度、突发性、标记异常），但随生成模型性能提升，这些信号逐渐减弱。作者提出从计算社会科学视角出发，关注合成政治话语是否在种群层面（而非句子层面）表现得像真实的在线人群，填补了传统检测方法忽视种群级现实性的研究空白。
AI.method: 构建了一个涵盖九次危机事件（COVID-19、国会山骚乱、2020和2024年美国大选、堕胎权判决、BLM抗议、中期选举、犹他州枪击、美伊战争）的配对语料库，包含1,789,406条帖子。对每个事件，将社交平台上的真实话语与同一语境下的合成话语进行对比，评估四个维度：情感强度、结构规律性、词汇-意识形态框架和跨事件依赖，使用均值差距和离散度证据进行分析，并提出了Caricature Gap这一事件级简化指标。
AI.result: 合成话语虽然流畅但种群级不真实：整体情感更消极且离散度更低，结构更规律，词汇更抽象；真实话语则表现出更广泛的情感变化、更长的尾部结构分布以及更具上下文特定性和口语化的词汇标记。这些差异呈现事件依赖性——对于快速演变的去中心化危机事件差异更大，对于正式或制度性中介的事件差异较小。
AI.conclusion: 合成政治话语的主要局限不在于语法或流畅性，而在于降低了种群现实性。种群级审计可作为传统文本检测的补充，为评估生成话语的社会现实性提供一个计算社会科学框架。

title: Measuring What Matters Beyond Text: Evaluating Multimodal Summaries by Quality, Alignment, and Diversity
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have facilitated Multimodal Summarization with Multimodal Output (MSMO), wherein systems generate concise textual summaries accompanied by salient visuals from multimodal sources. However, current MSMO evaluation remains fragmented: text quality, image-text alignment, and visual diversity are typically assessed in isolation using unimodal metrics, making it difficult to capture whether the modalities jointly support a faithful and useful summary. To address this gap, we introduce MM-Eval, a unified evaluation framework that integrates assessments of textual quality, cross-modal alignment, and visual diversity. MM-Eval comprises three components: (1) text quality, measured using OpenFActScore for factual consistency and G-Eval for coherence, fluency, and relevance; (2) image-text relevance, evaluated via an MLLM-as-a-judge approach; and (3) image-set diversity, quantified using Truncated CLIP Entropy. We calibrate MM-Eval through a learned aggregation model trained on the mLLM-EVAL news benchmark, aligning component contributions with human preferences. Our analysis reveals a text-dominant hierarchy in this setting, where factual consistency acts as a critical determinant of perceived overall quality, while visual relevance and diversity provide complementary signals. MM-Eval improves over heuristic aggregation baselines and provides an interpretable, reference-weak framework for comparative evaluation of multimodal summaries.

AI.tldr: MM-Eval 是一个统一的多模态摘要评估框架，整合了文本质量、跨模态对齐和视觉多样性三个维度的评估，通过可学习的聚合模型对齐人类偏好，并在 mLLM-EVAL 新闻基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态摘要的评估方法碎片化，文本质量、图像-文本对齐和视觉多样性通常使用单模态指标孤立评估，难以整体衡量各模态是否协同支持忠实且有价值的摘要，缺乏统一且可解释的评估框架。
AI.method: MM-Eval 包含三个评估组件：文本质量使用 OpenFActScore 衡量事实一致性、G-Eval 评估连贯性/流畅性/相关性；图像-文本相关性采用 MLLM-as-a-judge 方法评估；图像集多样性通过 Truncated CLIP Entropy 量化。三个组件的贡献通过一个在 mLLM-EVAL 新闻基准上训练的 learned aggregation model 进行校准，以对齐人类偏好。
AI.result: 实验分析揭示了文本主导的层次结构：事实一致性是感知整体质量的关键决定因素，而视觉相关性和多样性提供互补信号。MM-Eval 在 mLLM-EVAL 基准上优于启发式聚合基线，提供了可解释、弱参考的多模态摘要比较评估框架。
AI.conclusion: MM-Eval 提供了一个统一的、可解释的、弱参考的多模态摘要评估框架，揭示了文本事实一致性在整体质量感知中的主导作用，并表明视觉相关性和多样性作为互补信号的重要性，为多模态摘要评估提供了新范式。

title: PointGS: Semantic-Consistent Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Segmentation with 3D Gaussian Splatting
comment: Accepted by Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Unsupervised point cloud segmentation is critical for embodied artificial intelligence and autonomous driving, as it mitigates the prohibitive cost of dense point-level annotations required by fully supervised methods. While integrating 2D pre-trained models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to supplement semantic information is a natural choice, this approach faces a fundamental mismatch between discrete 3D points and continuous 2D images. This mismatch leads to inevitable projection overlap and complex modality alignment, resulting in compromised semantic consistency across 2D-3D transfer. To address these limitations, this paper proposes PointGS, a simple yet effective pipeline for unsupervised 3D point cloud segmentation. PointGS leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting as a unified intermediate representation to bridge the discrete-continuous domain gap. Input sparse point clouds are first reconstructed into dense 3D Gaussian spaces via multi-view observations, filling spatial gaps and encoding occlusion relationships to eliminate projection-induced semantic conflation. Multi-view dense images are rendered from the Gaussian space, with 2D semantic masks extracted via SAM, and semantics are distilled to 3D Gaussian primitives through contrastive learning to ensure consistent semantic assignments across different views. The Gaussian space is aligned with the original point cloud via two-step registration, and point semantics are assigned through nearest-neighbor search on labeled Gaussians. Experiments demonstrate that PointGS outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods, achieving +0.9% mIoU on ScanNet-V2 and +2.8% mIoU on S3DIS.

AI.tldr: PointGS提出了一种基于3D高斯溅射的无监督点云分割方法，通过将离散点云重建为连续3D高斯空间并利用SAM提取2D语义、经对比学习蒸馏至3D高斯原语，在ScanNet-V2和S3DIS上分别以0.9%和2.8%的mIoU提升超越现有无监督方法。
AI.motivation: 无监督点云分割对具身智能和自动驾驶至关重要，但现有方法面临离散3D点与连续2D图像之间的本质不匹配问题，导致投影重叠和模态对齐复杂，严重削弱了2D预训练模型（如SAM）迁移至3D时的语义一致性。
AI.method: PointGS以3D高斯溅射作为统一中间表示来弥合离散-连续域差距：先将输入稀疏点云通过多视角观测重建为稠密3D高斯空间以填充空间间隙并编码遮挡关系，再从高斯空间渲染多视角稠密图像并利用SAM提取2D语义掩码，最后通过对比学习将语义蒸馏至3D高斯原语以保持跨视角一致性；通过两步配准将高斯空间与原始点云对齐，并经最近邻搜索为点云点赋予语义标签。
AI.result: 在ScanNet-V2上平均交并比（mIoU）提升0.9%，在S3DIS上提升2.8%，全面超越当前最先进的无监督点云分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，利用3D高斯溅射作为桥梁有效解决了点云与图像间的域间隙问题，为无监督3D点云语义分割提供了一种简洁且高效的范式，验证了中间连续表示在缓解2D-3D语义传递中投影重叠与语义混淆方面的关键作用。

title: LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues
summary: Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task success, leaving open how to directly evaluate whether memory systems effectively internalize environment-specific experience. To address this gap, we introduce LongMemEval-V2 (LME-V2), a benchmark for evaluating whether memory systems can help agents acquire the experience needed to become knowledgeable colleagues in customized environments. LME-V2 contains 451 manually curated questions covering five core memory abilities for web agents: static state recall, dynamic state tracking, workflow knowledge, environment gotchas, and premise awareness. Questions are paired with history trajectories containing up to 500 trajectories and 115M tokens. We use a context gathering formulation: memory systems consume history trajectories and return compact evidence for downstream question answering. We propose a suite of two memory methods: AgentRunbook-R, an efficient RAG-based memory with knowledge pools for raw state observations, events, and strategy notes, and AgentRunbook-C, which stores trajectories as files and invokes a coding agent to gather evidence in an augmented sandbox. Experiments show that AgentRunbook-C achieves the best performance with 72.5% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest RAG baseline (48.5%) and the off-the-shelf coding agent baseline (69.3%). Despite the strong performance gains, coding agent based methods have high latency costs. While AgentRunbook-C advances the accuracy-latency Pareto frontier, substantial room for improvement remains. Together, these results establish LME-V2 as a challenging testbed for developing long-term memory systems for environment experience.

AI.tldr: LongMemEval-V2 (LME-V2) 是一个评估智能体长期记忆系统在定制化网络环境中内化环境经验的基准，包含451个问题覆盖五种核心记忆能力；提出的AgentRunbook-C方法通过编码智能体在增强沙箱中检索证据，达到72.5%的平均准确率，远超现有RAG基线（48.5%），但揭示了编码方法的高延迟代价和显著改进空间。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体记忆基准大多聚焦于用户历史、短轨迹或下游任务成功率，缺乏直接评估记忆系统能否有效内化特定环境经验（如界面功能、状态动态、工作流和重复失败模式）的能力，因此亟需一个系统性的基准来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出LongMemEval-V2基准，包含451个手工策划的问题，覆盖静态状态回忆、动态状态追踪、工作流知识、环境陷阱和前提意识五种核心记忆能力，问题配对含最多500条轨迹和115M令牌的历史数据；采用上下文收集框架，记忆系统消费历史轨迹并返回紧凑证据以支持下游问答。提出两种记忆方法：AgentRunbook-R（基于RAG的高效记忆，使用原始状态观察、事件和策略笔记的知识池）和AgentRunbook-C（将轨迹存储为文件并调用编码智能体在增强沙箱中收集证据）。
AI.result: AgentRunbook-C以72.5%的平均准确率取得最佳性能，超越最强RAG基线（48.5%）和现成的编码智能体基线（69.3%）；但编码方法存在高延迟代价，尽管AgentRunbook-C推动了准确率-延迟的帕累托前沿，仍有大量改进空间。
AI.conclusion: LME-V2被确立为开发长期记忆系统用于环境经验学习的挑战性测试平台，表明基于编码智能体的记忆方法在准确率上显著优于RAG方法但代价是更高延迟，未来工作需在准确率与效率之间进一步平衡。

title: SafeSteer: A Decoding-level Defense Mechanism for Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are gaining increasing attention. Due to the heterogeneity of their input features, they face significant challenges in terms of jailbreak defenses. Current defense methods rely on costly fine-tuning or inefficient post-hoc interventions, limiting their ability to address novel attacks and involving performance trade-offs. To address the above issues, we explore the inherent safety capabilities within MLLMs and quantify their intrinsic ability to discern harmfulness at decoding stage. We observe that 1) MLLMs can distinguish the harmful and harmless inputs during decoding process, 2) Image-based attacks are more stealthy. Based on these insights, we introduce SafeSteer, a decoding-level defense mechanism for MLLMs. Specifically, it includes a Decoding-Probe, a lightweight probe for detecting and correcting harmful output during decoding, which iteratively steers the decoding process toward safety. Furthermore, a modal semantic alignment vector is integrated to transfer the strong textual safety alignment to the vision modality. Experiments on multiple MLLMs demonstrate that SafeSterr can improve MLLMs' safety by up to 33.40\% without fine-tuning. Notably, it can maintain the effectiveness of MLLMs, ensuring a balance between their helpfulness and harmlessness.

AI.tldr: SafeSteer提出了一种面向多模态大语言模型的解码级防御机制，通过轻量级的Decoding-Probe探测并修正有害输出，并结合模态语义对齐向量将文本安全对齐迁移至视觉模态，在不进行微调的情况下显著提升模型安全性，同时兼顾有用性与无害性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型因输入特征的异质性，在越狱防御方面面临显著挑战。现有防御方法依赖成本高昂的微调或效率低下的后验干预，难以应对新型攻击且存在性能权衡问题。
AI.method: SafeSteer是一种解码级防御机制，包含两个核心组件：Decoding-Probe是一种轻量级探针，在解码过程中检测并修正有害输出，通过迭代方式将解码过程导向安全方向；模态语义对齐向量用于将文本模态的强安全对齐能力迁移至视觉模态，从而弥补视觉模态的安全对齐不足。
AI.result: 在多个多模态大语言模型上的实验表明，SafeSteer在不进行微调的情况下可将模型安全性提升高达33.40%，同时能够保持模型的有效性，确保有用性与无害性之间的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，多模态大语言模型在解码阶段本身就具备区分有害与无害输入的内在安全能力，且基于图像的攻击更具隐蔽性；SafeSteer通过利用这一内在能力并引入模态对齐，为多模态模型提供了一种高效且可扩展的越狱防御方案。

title: The DAWN of World-Action Interactive Models
summary: A plausible scene evolution depends on the maneuver being considered, while a good maneuver depends on how the scene may evolve. Existing World Action Models (WAMs) largely miss this reciprocity, treating world prediction and action generation as either isolated parallel branches or rigid predict-then-plan pipelines. We formalize this perspective as World-Action Interactive Models (WAIMs), and instantiate it in autonomous driving with \textbf{DAWN} (\textbf{D}enoising \textbf{A}ctions and \textbf{W}orld i\textbf{N}teractive model), a simple yet strong latent generative baseline. DAWN operates in a compact semantic latent space and couples a \emph{World Predictor} with a \emph{World-Conditioned Action Denoiser}: the predicted world hypothesis conditions action denoising, while the denoised action hypothesis is fed back to update the world prediction, so that both are recursively refined during inference. Rather than eliminating test-time world evolution altogether or rolling out the full future in pixel space, DAWN performs a short explicit latent rollout that is sufficient to support long-horizon trajectory generation in complex interactive scenes. Experiments show that DAWN achieves strong planning performance and favorable safety-related results across multiple autonomous driving benchmarks. More broadly, our results suggest that interactive world-action generation is a principled path toward truly actionable world models.

AI.tldr: DAWN 提出一种世界-动作交互模型（WAIM），通过紧凑语义潜在空间中的递归推断，实现了世界预测与动作生成的交互协同，在自动驾驶规划中取得了优异的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型将世界预测与动作生成视为并行的独立分支或僵化的先预测后规划流水线，忽视了二者的交互关系，导致模型无法有效捕捉场景演化与驾驶操作之间的紧密耦合。
AI.method: DAWN 包含一个世界预测器和一个世界条件动作去噪器，在紧凑语义潜在空间中运作：世界假设指导动作去噪，而去噪后的动作假设反馈用于更新世界预测，两者在推理过程中递归迭代优化；采用短显式潜在展开代替像素空间全未来展开，以支持长时域轨迹生成。
AI.result: DAWN 在多个自动驾驶基准上实现了强大的规划性能和优异的安全相关指标，验证了交互式世界-动作生成方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 世界与动作的交互式生成是构建真正可操作世界模型的一条有原则的路径，为未来可动作的世界模型研究提供了方向性启示。

title: Hide to See: Reasoning-prefix Masking for Visual-anchored Thinking in VLM Distillation
summary: Recent think-answer approaches in VLMs, such as Qwen3-VL-Thinking, boost reasoning performance by leveraging intermediate thinking steps before the final answer, but their high computational cost limits real-world deployment. To distill such capabilities into compact think-answer VLMs, a primary objective is to improve the student's ability to utilize visual evidence throughout its reasoning trace. To this end, we introduce a novel think-answer distillation framework that encourages the student to anchor its thinking on visual information by masking the student's salient reasoning prefixes. To compensate for such masked textual cues, the student is encouraged to rely more on visual evidence as an alternative source of information during distillation. Our masking strategies include: 1) token-wise salient reasoning-prefix masking, which masks high-influence reasoning prefixes selectively for each next-token prediction, and 2) self-paced masking budget scheduling, which gradually increases the masking scale according to distillation difficulty, {measured by discrepancy between teacher--student distributions. In the distillation phase, the student is guided by our salient reasoning-prefix mask, which blocks both future tokens and salient reasoning cues, in place of the standard causal mask used for auto-regressive language modeling. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms recent open-source VLMs, VLM distillation, and self-distillation methods on multimodal reasoning benchmarks, while further analyses confirm enhanced visual utilization along the student thinking process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的思考-回答蒸馏框架，通过对学生模型的关键推理前缀进行掩码，迫使其在蒸馏过程中更多地依赖视觉证据，从而将大型VLM的思考能力高效蒸馏至紧凑模型中，在多项多模态推理基准上取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有思考-回答VLM（如Qwen3-VL-Thinking）虽能通过中间推理步骤提升推理性能，但其高计算成本限制了实际部署；而现有的蒸馏方法未能有效提升学生模型在推理过程中利用视觉证据的能力，导致推理质量不足。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的思考-回答蒸馏框架，核心思想是通过对学生模型的显著推理前缀（salient reasoning prefixes）进行掩码，迫使其在蒸馏过程中更多地依赖视觉证据。具体包括两种掩码策略：1）token级显著推理前缀掩码，在每一步下一token预测中针对高影响力的推理前缀进行选择性掩码；2）自调节掩码预算调度，根据教师-学生分布之间的差异动态调整掩码强度。在蒸馏阶段，学生模型使用该掩码替代标准因果掩码，既阻断未来token也阻断显著推理线索。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多模态推理基准上优于最新的开源VLM、VLM蒸馏方法以及自蒸馏方法。进一步分析证实学生模型在思考过程中对视觉证据的利用能力得到显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 通过主动掩码推理前缀来强制学生模型依赖视觉信息，是一种有效的蒸馏策略，能够将大型VLM的思考能力压缩至紧凑模型中，并提升其视觉推理质量。该方法为高效多模态推理模型的部署提供了可行路径。

title: Allegory of the Cave: Measurement-Grounded Vision-Language Learning
summary: Vision-language models typically reason over post-ISP RGB images, although RGB rendering can clip, suppress, or quantize sensor evidence before inference. We study whether grounding improves when the visual interface is moved closer to the underlying camera measurement. We formulate measurement-grounded vision-language learning and instantiate it as PRISM-VL, which combines RAW-derived Meas.-XYZ inputs, camera-conditioned grounding, and Exposure-Bracketed Supervision Aggregation for transferring supervision from RGB proxies to measurement-domain observations. Using a quality-controlled 150K instruction-tuning set and a held-out benchmark targeting low-light, HDR, visibility-sensitive, and hallucination-sensitive cases, PRISM-VL-8B reaches 0.6120 BLEU, 0.4571 ROUGE-L, and 82.66\% LLM-Judge accuracy, improving over the RGB Qwen3-VL-8B baseline by +0.1074 BLEU, +0.1071 ROUGE-L, and +4.46 percentage points. These results suggest that part of VLM grounding error arises from information lost during RGB rendering, and that preserving measurement-domain evidence can improve multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM-VL，通过将视觉语言模型的输入从ISP处理后的RGB图像前移至传感器原始测量域（RAW-domain），并引入相机条件化接地和曝光包围监督聚合方法，在低光、HDR等困难场景下显著提升多模态推理性能，表明RGB渲染过程中的信息丢失是VLM接地错误的重要来源。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型通常在ISP处理后的RGB图像上推理，但RGB渲染过程中的裁剪、压缩和量化操作会丢失原始传感器证据，可能导致多模态接地性能受限。本文旨在探究将视觉接口前移至更接近底层相机测量域是否能够改善VLM的接地能力。
AI.method: 本文提出测量域视觉语言学习框架PRISM-VL，包含三个关键组件：从RAW数据推导的Meas.-XYZ输入、相机条件化接地机制、以及曝光包围监督聚合（EBSA），用于将RGB代理模型的监督信号迁移至测量域观测数据。同时构建了包含15万条指令微调数据（经质量控制）和针对低光、HDR、可见性敏感和幻觉敏感场景的测试集。
AI.result: PRISM-VL-8B在测试集上达到0.6120 BLEU、0.4571 ROUGE-L和82.66% LLM-Judge准确率，相较于RGB基线模型Qwen3-VL-8B分别提升+0.1074 BLEU、+0.1071 ROUGE-L和+4.46个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明部分VLM接地误差源于RGB渲染过程中的信息损失，保留测量域证据能够提升多模态推理性能，验证了将视觉接口向传感器测量域前移的有效性。

title: TB-AVA: Text as a Semantic Bridge for Audio-Visual Parameter Efficient Finetuning
summary: Audio-visual understanding requires effective alignment between heterogeneous modalities, yet cross-modal correspondence remains challenging when temporally aligned audio and visual signals lack clear semantic correspondence.We propose to use text as a semantic anchor for audio-visual representation learning.To this end, we introduce a parameter-efficient adaptation frameworkbuilt on frozen audio and visual encoders, centered on Text-Bridged Audio-Visual Adapter (TB-AVA), which enables text-mediated interaction between audio and visual streams. At the core of TB-AVA, Gated Semantic Modulation (GSM) selectively modulates feature channels based on text-inferred semantic relevance. We evaluate the proposed approach on multiple benchmarks, including AVE, AVS, and AVVP, where the proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating text as an effective semantic anchor for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in audio-visual learning.

AI.tldr: 提出以文本作为语义锚点的音频-视觉表征学习框架，通过文本桥接音频-视觉适配器（TB-AVA）和门控语义调制（GSM）机制，在参数高效微调（PEFT）范式下实现跨模态对齐，在AVE、AVS、AVVP等多个基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的音频-视觉学习面临跨模态对齐困难的问题，尤其在时间上对齐的音频和视觉信号缺乏清晰的语义对应关系时，传统方法难以有效建模二者之间的语义关联。
AI.method: 提出文本桥接音频-视觉适配器（TB-AVA），构建在冻结的音频和视觉编码器之上的参数高效适配框架，以文本作为语义锚点桥接音频流与视觉流之间的交互；其核心是门控语义调制（GSM）机制，基于文本推断的语义相关性选择性地调制特征通道。
AI.result: 在AVE、AVS、AVVP等多个音频-视觉基准任务上进行了评估，所提出的框架取得了最优性能，验证了文本作为语义锚点在参数高效微调（PEFT）范式下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明文本是一种有效的语义锚点，能够引导音频与视觉模态之间的语义对齐，为参数高效微调在音频-视觉学习中的应用提供了新的思路和有效方案。

title: OptArgus: A Multi-Agent System to Detect Hallucinations in LLM-based Optimization Modeling
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to translate natural-language optimization problems into mathematical formulations and solver code, but matching the reference objective value is not a reliable test of correctness: an artifact may agree numerically while still changing the underlying optimization semantics. We formulate this issue as \emph{optimization-modeling hallucination detection}, namely structural consistency auditing over the problem description, symbolic model, and solver implementation. We develop, to our knowledge, the first fine-grained hallucination taxonomy specifically for optimization modeling, spanning objective, variable, constraint, and implementation failures. We use this taxonomy to design OptArgus, a multi-agent detector with conductor routing, specialist auditors, and evidence consolidation. To evaluate this setting, we introduce a three-part benchmark suite with $484$ clean artifacts, $1266$ controlled injected artifacts, and $6292$ natural LLM-generated artifacts. Against a matched single-agent baseline, OptArgus produces fewer false alarms on clean artifacts, more accurate top-ranked localization on controlled single-error cases, and stronger detection on natural model outputs. Together, these contributions turn optimization-modeling hallucination detection into a concrete empirical problem and suggest that modular, taxonomy-grounded auditing is a practical route to more reliable optimization modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出优化建模中的幻觉检测问题，并构建了细粒度幻觉分类体系，在此基础上设计了多智能体检测系统OptArgus，结合专用审计器和证据整合机制，在包含人工构造和LLM生成样本的基准上相比单基线方法实现了更优的检测与定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究用目标数值匹配评估LLM生成的优化建模结果，但数值一致无法保证语义正确，即存在结构上等价而语义上变更的"优化建模幻觉"问题，缺乏对此类幻觉的系统检测方法与评估基准。
AI.method: 首先提出优化建模幻觉的细粒度分类体系，涵盖目标、变量、约束和实现四类失败模式；基于此设计OptArgus，一种多智能体检测框架，包含路由协调模块、多个专业审计器（分别对应不同幻觉类型）以及证据整合机制，对问题描述、符号模型和求解器实现之间的一致性进行结构化审计。
AI.result: 在484个干净样本、1266个受控注入错误样本和6292个LLM生成样本的基准上，OptArgus相比单智能体基线在干净样本上产生更少的误报，在受控单错误场景下实现更精确的定位，在自然模型输出上检测能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 优化建模幻觉检测可被形式化为一个具体的实证问题，基于分类体系驱动的模块化审计是提升优化建模可靠性的实用路径，为后续研究提供了问题定义、方法框架和基准资源。

title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation
summary: Closed-loop driving simulation requires real-time interaction beyond short offline clips, pushing current driving world models toward autoregressive (AR) rollout. Existing AR distillation approaches typically rely on frame sinks or student-side degradation training. The former transfers poorly to driving due to fast ego-motion and rapid scene changes, while the latter remains bounded by the teacher's single-pass output length and thus provides only a limited supervision horizon. A natural question is: can the teacher itself be extended via AR rollout to provide unbounded-horizon supervision at bounded memory cost? The key difficulty is that a standard teacher drifts under its own predictions, contaminating the supervision it provides. Our key insight is to make the teacher rollout-capable, ensuring reliable supervision from its own AR rollouts. This is instantiated as HorizonDrive, an anti-drifting training-and-distillation framework for AR driving simulation. First, scheduled rollout recovery (SRR) trains the base model to reconstruct ground-truth future clips from prediction-corrupted histories, yielding a teacher that remains stable across long AR rollouts. Second, the rollout-capable teacher is extended via AR rollout, providing long-horizon distribution-matching supervision under bounded memory, while a short-window student aligns to it with teacher rollout DMD (TRD) for efficient real-time deployment. HorizonDrive natively supports minute-scale AR rollout under bounded memory; on nuScenes, HorizonDrive reduces FID by 52% and FVD by 37%, and lowers ARE and DTW by 21% and 9% relative to the strongest long-horizon streaming baselines, while remaining competitive with single-pass driving video generators.

AI.tldr: HorizonDrive提出了一种抗漂移的训练与蒸馏框架，通过使世界模型教师本身具备自回归扩展能力，从而以有界内存代价提供无限视野的监督信号，显著提升了闭环驾驶模拟的长时程生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归蒸馏方法在驾驶场景中面临两大问题：一是基于帧沉的方法因快速自车运动与场景变化而迁移效果差；二是基于学生端退化训练的方法受限于教师单次前向输出长度，只能提供有限的监督视野。因此需要一种能让教师自身通过自回归扩展提供无界视野监督、同时保持内存消耗有界的方法。
AI.method: 提出HorizonDrive框架，核心包括两个部分：一是调度式 rollout 恢复训练（SRR），通过让基础模型从预测损坏的历史中重构真实未来片段，训练出一个能在长程自回归rollout中保持稳定的教师模型；二是教师rollout DMD（TRD），利用具备rollout能力的教师通过自回归扩展生成长期分布匹配监督信号，短窗口学生模型在有限内存下对齐该信号以实现高效实时部署。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，HorizonDrive在分钟级自回归rollout下将FID降低52%、FVD降低37%，并将ARE和DTW分别降低21%和9%，性能优于最强长时程流式基线，同时与单次前向驾驶视频生成器保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过使教师模型具备抗漂移的rollout能力，可以在有界内存下为自回归驾驶模拟提供无界视野的有效监督，为闭环驾驶仿真中的长时程实时交互生成提供了可行的蒸馏范式。

title: Multimodal Abstractive Summarization of Instructional Videos with Vision-Language Models
summary: Multimodal video summarization requires visual features that align semantically with language generation. Traditional approaches rely on CNN features trained for object classification, which represent visual concepts as discrete categories not aligned with natural language. We propose ClipSum, a framework that leverages frozen CLIP vision-language features with explicit temporal modeling and dimension-adaptive fusion for instructional video summarization. CLIP's contrastive pre-training on 400M image-text pairs yields visual features semantically aligned with the linguistic concepts that text decoders generate, bridging the vision-language gap at the representation level. On YouCook2, ClipSum achieves 33.0% ROUGE-1 versus 30.5% for ResNet-152 with 4x lower dimensionality (512 vs. 2048), demonstrating that semantic alignment matters more than feature capacity. Frozen CLIP (33.0%) surpasses fine-tuned CLIP (32.3%), showing that preserving pre-trained alignment is more valuable than task-specific adaptation. https://github.com/aqeeelmirza/clipsum

AI.tldr: ClipSum是一个面向教学视频摘要的框架，利用冻结的CLIP视觉-语言特征、显式时序建模和维度自适应融合，在YouCook2上以4倍更低维度（512 vs 2048）的视觉特征取得33.0% ROUGE-1，显著优于ResNet-152的30.5%，并显示冻结CLIP优于微调版本（32.3%），证明语义对齐比特征容量更重要。
AI.motivation: 传统视频摘要方法依赖基于目标分类训练的CNN特征（如ResNet），这些特征将视觉概念表示为离散类别，与自然语言在语义上不对齐，导致视觉特征与文本生成之间存在跨模态语义鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出ClipSum框架，采用冻结的CLIP视觉-语言特征（在4亿图文对上对比预训练），结合显式时序建模和维度自适应融合模块，用于教学视频摘要任务；CLIP的视觉特征在表示层面已与文本解码器生成的语言概念语义对齐，从而弥合视觉-语言鸿沟。
AI.result: 在YouCook2数据集上，ClipSum使用512维CLIP特征取得33.0% ROUGE-1，优于ResNet-152的2048维特征的30.5%；冻结CLIP（33.0%）性能高于微调CLIP（32.3%），表明保持预训练对齐比任务特定微调更有价值。
AI.conclusion: 视觉特征的语义对齐比特征容量（维度）对视频摘要任务更为关键；冻结预训练的跨模态对齐表示是一种更优的策略，任务特定微调反而可能损害这种对齐带来的优势。

title: Beyond Inefficiency: Systemic Costs of Incivility in Multi-Agent Monte Carlo Simulations
summary: Unconstructive debate and uncivil communication carry well-documented costs for productivity and cohesion, yet isolating their effect on operational efficiency has proven difficult. Human subject research in this domain is constrained by ethical oversight, limited reproducibility, and the inherent unpredictability of naturalistic settings. We address this gap by leveraging Large Language Model (LLM) based Multi-Agent Systems as a controlled sociological sandbox, enabling systematic manipulation of communicative behavior at scale. Using a Monte Carlo simulation framework, we generate thousands of structured 1-on-1 adversarial debates across varying toxicity conditions, measuring convergence time, defined as the number of rounds required to reach a conclusion, as a proxy for interactional efficiency. Building on a prior study, we replicate and extend its findings across two additional LLM agents of varying parameter size, allowing us to assess whether the effects of toxic behavior on debate dynamics generalize across model scale. The convergence latency of 25% reported in the previous study was confirmed. It was found that this latency is significantly bigger for models with fewer parameters. We further identify a significant first-mover advantage, whereby the agent initiating the discussion wins significantly above chance regardless of toxicity condition.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于LLM的多智能体系统作为受控社会学沙盒，通过蒙特卡洛模拟生成大量结构化对抗辩论，研究了有毒沟通行为对辩论效率的影响，发现有毒行为导致收敛延迟约25%，且该效应在参数量较小的模型中更为显著，同时识别出显著的先发优势。
AI.motivation: 非建设性辩论和不文明沟通对生产力和凝聚力具有公认的负面影响，但将其对运行效率的因果效应分离出来一直较为困难，因为人类受试者研究受限于伦理审查、可重复性差以及自然场景的固有不可预测性。
AI.method: 本文利用基于大语言模型的多智能体系统作为受控社会学沙盒，通过蒙特卡洛模拟框架生成数千场1对1结构化对抗辩论，在不同毒性条件下系统性地操控沟通行为，以收敛轮数（即达成结论所需的交互回合数）作为交互效率的代理指标，并在先前研究基础上使用两种不同参数规模的LLM智能体进行复现和扩展分析。
AI.result: 先前研究中报告的有毒行为导致收敛延迟约25%的结论得到确认，并且发现该延迟效应在参数量较小的模型中显著更大；此外，识别出显著的先发优势，即无论毒性条件如何，发起讨论的智能体获胜概率显著高于随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基于LLM的多智能体系统可以有效模拟人类社会沟通的动态特性，为研究沟通行为对效率的影响提供可控、可重复的实验范式；有毒沟通的负面效应具有跨模型规模的泛化性，且模型规模越小影响越显著，同时辩论中的先发优势是一个鲁棒的现象。

title: Grounding by Remembering: Cross-Scene and In-Scene Memory for 3D Functional Affordances
summary: Functional affordance grounding requires more than recognizing an object: an agent must localize the specific region that supports an interaction, such as the handle to pull or the button to press. This is difficult for training-free vision-language pipelines because actionable regions are often small, visually ambiguous, and repeated across multiple same-category instances in a scene. We propose AFFORDMEM, a framework that grounds 3D functional affordances by remembering geometry at two levels. The first is cross-scene affordance memory: the agent maintains a category-level memory bank of RGB images with affordance regions rendered as overlays, and recalls the most informative examples at query time to guide a frozen VLM toward small operable subregions that text-only prompting consistently misses. The second is in-scene spatial memory: as the agent processes the scene, it organizes candidate instances and their 3D spatial relations into a structured scene graph, enabling the language model to resolve references over distant or currently unobserved candidates such as "the second handle from the top." AFFORDMEM requires no model fine-tuning and no target-scene annotation, using a reusable memory bank built from source scenes. On SceneFun3D, our method improves AP50 over the prior training-free state of the art by 3.23 on Split 0 and 3.7 on Split 1. Ablation studies support complementary benefits: cross-scene affordance memory improves fine-grained localization, while in-scene spatial memory provides the larger gain on spatially qualified queries. The project homepage is available at the project page.

AI.tldr: AFFORDMEM是一种无需训练和无需目标场景标注的3D功能可供性接地框架，通过跨场景可供性记忆（类别级记忆库引导VLM定位小区域）和场景内空间记忆（场景图解决空间引用）双重几何记忆机制，在SceneFun3D上显著超越此前无训练方法。
AI.motivation: 现有免训练视觉-语言模型管线难以准确接地3D功能可供性，因为可操作区域通常很小、视觉上模糊，且同一类别实例在场景中重复出现，导致文本提示无法定位细粒度交互区域。
AI.method: AFFORDMEM提出双重几何记忆机制：跨场景可供性记忆维护一个类别级记忆库（RGB图像叠加可供性掩膜），查询时检索最相关样本引导冻结的VLM定位小区域；场景内空间记忆将候选实例及其3D空间关系组织为结构化场景图，使语言模型能够解析涉及远距离或未观察候选的空间引用（如"从上往下数第二个把手"）。
AI.result: 在SceneFun3D数据集上，AFFORDMEM相比此前无训练方法在AP50指标上提升了Split 0上3.23、Split 1上3.7。消融实验表明跨场景可供性记忆提升细粒度定位，场景内空间记忆对空间限定查询贡献更大。
AI.conclusion: AFFORDMEM验证了无需微调或目标场景标注即可通过可重用的记忆库实现3D功能可供性接地，双层次几何记忆机制互补有效，为训练自由的具身智能感知提供了新范式。

title: Why Users Go There: World Knowledge-Augmented Generative Next POI Recommendation
summary: Generative point-of-interest (POI) recommendation models based on large language models (LLMs) have shown promising results by formulating next POI prediction as a sequence generation task. However, the knowledge encoded in these models remains fixed after training, making them unable to perceive evolving real-world conditions that shape user mobility decisions, such as local events and cultural trends. To bridge this gap, we propose AWARE (Agent-based World knowledge Augmented REcommendation), which employs an LLM agent to generate location- and time-aware contextual narratives that capture regional cultural characteristics, seasonal trends, and ongoing events relevant to each user. Rather than introducing generic or noisy information, AWARE further anchors these narratives in each user's behavioral context, grounding external world knowledge in personalized spatial-temporal patterns. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that AWARE consistently outperforms competitive baselines, achieving up to 12.4% relative improvement.

AI.tldr: AWARE提出基于LLM代理的世界知识增强推荐框架，通过生成位置与时间感知的上下文叙事来捕捉实时区域文化、事件与季节趋势，并将其嵌入用户行为模式中，在三个真实数据集上实现最高12.4%的相对性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的生成式兴趣点推荐模型将下一POI预测建模为序列生成任务，但其训练后编码的知识保持固定，无法感知不断演变的现实世界条件（如本地事件和文化趋势），导致模型缺乏对动态外部环境信息的利用能力。
AI.method: AWARE采用LLM代理生成位置与时间感知的上下文叙事，捕捉与每个用户相关的区域文化特征、季节趋势和实时事件；并通过将这些叙事锚定在用户的行为上下文中，将外部世界知识融入个性化的时空模式，避免引入通用或噪声信息。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，AWARE在各项指标上持续优于竞争基线，最高实现12.4%的相对性能提升，验证了世界知识增强对POI推荐的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将动态外部世界知识（如本地事件、文化趋势）以个性化叙事形式融入LLM推荐模型，可显著提升其对现实世界变化的感知能力与推荐准确性，为生成式POI推荐开辟了知识注入的新路径。

title: Unlocking UML Class Diagram Understanding in Vision Language Models
summary: Although Vision Language Models (VLMs) have seen tremendous progress across all kinds of use cases, they still fall behind in answering questions regard-ing diagrams compared to photos. Although progress has been made in the area of bar charts, line charts and other diagrams like that there is still few research concerned with other types of diagrams, e.g. in the computer science domain. Our work presents a benchmark for visual question answering based on UML class diagrams which is both challenging and manageable. We further construct a large-scale training dataset with 16.000 image-question-answer triples and show that a LoRA-based finetune easily outperforms Qwen 3.5 27B, which is a recent and well-performing VLM in many other benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对计算机科学领域中的UML类图提出了一项视觉问答基准，并构建了包含16,000个图像-问题-答案三元组的大规模训练数据集，实验表明基于LoRA的微调方法在UML类图问答任务上显著优于Qwen 3.5 27B等现有VLM。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型（VLM）在各类任务上取得了显著进展，但在回答图表相关问题上仍落后于照片类任务。现有研究主要集中在柱状图、折线图等常见图表类型上，而对计算机科学领域中UML类图等其他类型图表的研究较少，存在明显的研究空白。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个基于UML类图的视觉问答基准数据集，包含16,000个图像-问题-答案三元组。采用LoRA（低秩适配）微调方法对VLM进行参数高效微调，以适配UML类图这一特定领域任务。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于LoRA微调的方法在UML类图问答任务上轻松超越了Qwen 3.5 27B这一在多个其他基准上表现优异的VLM，证明了所提方法在特定图表问答任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了当前VLM在特定专业图表（如UML类图）理解上的不足，证明了通过LoRA微调可以显著提升模型在这一任务上的表现，为未来针对计算机科学领域图表理解的研究提供了基准和方法参考。

title: On-Policy Self-Evolution via Failure Trajectories for Agentic Safety Alignment
summary: Tool-using LLM agents fail through trajectories rather than only final responses, as they may execute unsafe tool calls, follow injected instructions, comply with harmful requests, or over-refuse benign tasks despite producing a seemingly safe answer. Existing safety-alignment signals are largely response-level or off-policy, and often incur a safety-utility trade-off: improving agent safety comes at the cost of degraded task performance. Such sparse and single-objective rewards severely limit real-world usability. To bridge this gap, we propose FATE, an on-policy self-evolving framework that transforms verifier-scored failures into repair supervision without expert demonstrations. For each failure, the same policy proposes repair candidates, which are then re-scored by verifiers and filtered across security, utility, over-refusal control, and trajectory validity. This dense trajectory-level information is then used as a supervision signal for agent self-evolution. During this process, we further introduce Pareto-Front Policy Optimization (PFPO), combining supervised warmup with Pareto-aware policy optimization to preserve safety-utility trade-offs. Experiments on AgentDojo, AgentHarm, and ATBench show that FATE improves safety across different models and scales while preserving useful behavior. Compared with strong baselines, FATE reduces attack success rate by 33.5%, harmful compliance by 82.6%, and improves external trajectory-safety diagnosis by 6.5%. These results suggest that failed trajectories can provide structured repair supervision for safer self-evolving agents.

AI.tldr: FATE是一个利用失败轨迹作为结构化修复监督信号的自演化框架，通过Pareto-Front策略优化（PFPO）在提升LLM Agent安全性的同时保持任务效用，在多个基准上降低了33.5%的攻击成功率和82.6%的有害遵从性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM Agent的安全对齐信号主要是响应级或离策略的，且常伴随着安全-效用权衡——提升安全性会损害任务性能，这种稀疏的单目标奖励严重限制了实际可用性；此外，Agent的失败往往体现在整个轨迹中（如执行不安全工具调用、遵循注入指令等），而不仅是最终响应。
AI.method: FATE是一个在策略自演化框架，首先由验证器对Agent轨迹中的失败进行评分，随后同一策略为每个失败生成修复候选，再由验证器跨安全、效用、过度拒绝控制和轨迹有效性四个维度重新评分并过滤，形成密集的轨迹级监督信号用于Agent自演化；同时提出Pareto-Front策略优化（PFPO），结合监督微调预热和Pareto感知的策略优化来保持安全-效用之间的帕累托最优权衡。
AI.result: 在AgentDojo、AgentHarm和ATBench上的实验表明，FATE在不同模型和规模上均提升了安全性同时保持有用行为；与强基线相比，FATE将攻击成功率降低了33.5%，有害遵从性降低了82.6%，外部轨迹安全诊断提升了6.5%。
AI.conclusion: 失败轨迹可以为更安全的自演化Agent提供结构化的修复监督信号，FATE通过将验证器评分的失败转化为修复监督，实现了在策略上的自演化，而不需要专家示范，有效缓解了安全-效用权衡问题。

title: Rethinking Positional Encoding for Neural Vehicle Routing
summary: Transformer-based models have become the dominant paradigm for neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) of vehicle routing problems (VRPs), yet the role of positional encoding (PE) in these architectures remains largely unexplored. Unlike natural language, where tokens are uniformly spaced on a line, routing solutions exhibit several properties that render standard NLP positional encodings inadequate. In this work, we formalize three such structural properties that a routing-aware PE should respect, namely anisometric node distances, cyclic and direction-aware topology, and hierarchical depot-anchored global multi-route structure, combining them with a unifying design principle of geometric grounding. Guided by these criteria, we analyze and compare PE methods spanning NLP, graph-transformer, and routing-specific families, and propose a hierarchical anisometric PE that combines a distance-indexed, circularly consistent in-route encoding with a depot-anchored angular cross-route encoding. Extensive experiments across diverse VRP variants demonstrate that geometry-grounded PE consistently outperforms index-based alternatives, with gains that transfer across problem variants, model architectures, and distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了神经组合优化中Transformer位置编码的作用，形式化了面向路径规划问题的位置编码应满足的三个结构性质（各向异性节点距离、循环方向感知拓扑、层次化仓库锚定多路径结构），并提出了结合距离索引循环一致性路径内编码与仓库锚定角度跨路径编码的分层各向异性位置编码方法，实验表明几何引导的位置编码显著优于基于索引的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的模型已成为神经组合优化求解路径规划问题的主流范式，但位置编码在其中的作用尚未被充分探索。路径规划解与自然语言中均匀线性排列的token不同，具有各向异性节点距离、循环及方向感知拓扑、以及层次化仓库锚定的全局多路径结构等特性，导致标准NLP位置编码不适用，因此需要设计面向路径规划的结构感知位置编码。
AI.method: 本文首先形式化了路径感知位置编码应遵守的三个结构性质：各向异性节点距离、循环和方向感知拓扑、以及层次化仓库锚定全局多路径结构，并以几何引导作为统一设计原则。基于这些准则，本文分析比较了NLP、图Transformer和路径规划专用三类位置编码方法，并提出了分层各向异性位置编码，其中包含距离索引的循环一致性路径内编码和仓库锚定的角度跨路径编码。
AI.result: 在多种路径规划问题变体上的大量实验表明，几何引导的位置编码在所有场景下均一致优于基于索引的位置编码方法，其性能提升能够跨问题变体、模型架构和分布偏移进行迁移。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了路径规划问题的内在几何结构对位置编码设计的关键作用，证明了将几何先验融入位置编码可以显著提升神经组合优化模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性，为NCO中Transformer架构的设计提供了新的理论指导。

title: Weather-Robust Cross-View Geo-Localization via Prototype-Based Semantic Part Discovery
summary: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL), which matches an oblique drone view to a geo-referenced satellite tile, has emerged as a key alternative for autonomous drone navigation when GNSS signals are jammed, spoofed, or unavailable. Despite strong recent progress, three limitations persist: (1) global-descriptor designs compress the patch grid into a single vector without separating layout from texture across the view gap; (2) altitude-related scale variation is retained in the learned embedding rather than marginalized; and (3) multi-objective training relies on hand-tuned scalars over losses on incompatible gradient scales. We propose SkyPart, a lightweight swappable head for patch-based vision transformers (ViTs) that institutes explicit part grouping over the patch grid. SkyPart has four theory-grounded components: (i) learnable prototypes competing for patch tokens via single-pass cosine assignment; (ii) altitude-conditioned linear modulation applied only during training, making the retrieval embedding altitude-free at inference; (iii) a graph-attention readout over active prototypes; and (iv) a Kendall uncertainty-weighted multi-objective loss whose stationary points are Pareto-stationary. At 26.95M parameters and 22.14 GFLOPs, SkyPart is the smallest among top-performing methods and sets a new state of the art on SUES-200, University-1652, and DenseUAV under a single-pass, no-re-ranking, no-TTA protocol. Its advantage over the strongest baseline widens under the ten-condition WeatherPrompt corruption benchmark.

AI.tldr: SkyPart提出一种轻量级可替换头部模块，通过显式部件分组、高度条件调制、图注意力读出和Kendall不确定性加权多目标损失，在单次前向、无重排、无测试时增强协议下，以最小参数量(26.95M)刷新了跨视角地理定位多项基准的SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法存在三个关键局限：全局描述符设计将patch网格压缩为单一向量，无法分离布局与纹理信息以弥合视角差异；高度相关的尺度变化被保留在嵌入中而非被边缘化；多目标训练依赖手工调参的标量权重，无法处理梯度尺度不一致问题。这些限制导致模型在高度变化和复杂环境下的定位鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: SkyPart是一种基于patch级ViT的轻量级可替换头部模块，包含四个理论驱动组件：(i)可学习原型通过单次余弦分配竞争patch token，实现显式部件分组；(ii)高度条件线性调制仅在训练时应用，使推理时的检索嵌入不包含高度信息；(iii)基于图注意力的读出机制聚合活跃原型特征；(iv)Kendall不确定性加权多目标损失，其稳态点为Pareto稳态点。
AI.result: SkyPart仅26.95M参数和22.14 GFLOPs，是性能最佳方法中规模最小的模型，在SUES-200、University-1652和DenseUAV三个基准上采用单次前向、无重排、无测试时增强协议均达成新SOTA。在WeatherPrompt十种退化条件评测中，SkyPart相对于最强基线的优势进一步扩大。
AI.conclusion: SkyPart通过部件级解耦、高度无关嵌入和Pareto最优多目标训练，在参数量和计算量显著低于同类方法的情况下实现跨视角地理定位的SOTA性能，证明了显式结构先验与理论驱动的训练策略在小模型上也能超越更复杂的大模型方案，为GNSS不可用场景下的无人机自主导航提供了高效实用的替代方案。

title: When Simulation Lies: A Sim-to-Real Benchmark and Domain-Randomized RL Recipe for Tool-Use Agents
comment: Dataset, code, and benchmark leaderboard are available at https://github.com/WillChow66/robustbench-tc-release.git and https://huggingface.co/spaces/willchow66/robustbench-tc-leaderboard
summary: Tool-use language agents are evaluated on benchmarks that assume clean inputs, unambiguous tool registries, and reliable APIs. Real deployments violate all these assumptions: user typos propagate into hallucinated tool names, a misconfigured request timeout can stall an agent indefinitely, and duplicate tool names across servers can freeze an SDK. We study these failures as a sim-to-real gap in the tool-use partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), where deployment noise enters through the observation, action space, reward-relevant metadata, or transition dynamics. We introduce RobustBench-TC, a benchmark with 22 perturbation types organized by these four POMDP components, each grounded in a verified GitHub issue or documented tool-calling failure. Across 21 models from 1.5B to 32B parameters (including the closed-source o4-mini), the robustness profile is sharply uneven: observation perturbations reduce accuracy by less than 5%, while reward-relevant and transition perturbations reduce accuracy by roughly 40% and 30%, respectively; scale alone does not close these gaps. We then propose ToolRL-DR, a domain-randomization reinforcement learning (RL) recipe that trains a tool-use agent on perturbation-augmented trajectories spanning the three statically encodable POMDP components. On a 3B backbone, ToolRL-DR-Full retains roughly three-quarters of clean accuracy and reaches an aggregate perturbed accuracy comparable to open-source 14B function-calling baselines while substantially narrowing the gap to o4-mini. It closes approximately 27% of the Transition gap despite never seeing transition perturbations in training, suggesting that RL on adversarial static tool-use inputs induces a more persistent retry policy that transfers to unseen runtime failures. The dataset, code and benchmark leaderboard are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobustBench-TC基准测试，系统揭示工具调用语言模型在真实部署中因观测噪声、动作空间扰动、奖励相关元数据错误及转移动态异常导致的鲁棒性缺口，并进一步提出ToolRL-DR领域随机化强化学习方法，在3B骨干模型上显著缩小了与o4-mini等大模型在扰动环境下的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有工具调用语言模型评测均假设输入干净、工具注册表无歧义且API可靠，而真实部署中用户拼写错误、超时配置错误、工具名重复等扰动频繁发生，导致模型表现急剧下降。作者将此问题建模为工具使用部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程中的sim-to-real差距，并指出缺乏系统覆盖各类部署扰动的标准化评测基准。
AI.method: 作者首先构建RobustBench-TC基准，包含22种扰动类型，按POMDP的观测空间、动作空间、奖励相关元数据及转移动态四个组件组织，每种扰动均源于已验证的GitHub问题或文档记录的工具调用失败案例。随后提出ToolRL-DR方法，一种领域随机化强化学习训练策略，在静态可编码的三个POMDP组件（观测、动作空间、奖励元数据）上对轨迹进行扰动增强，训练3B参数的函数调用智能体。
