AI.result: 在涵盖1.5B至32B参数规模的21个模型（含o4-mini）上评估发现，观测扰动仅造成5%以内的精度下降，而奖励相关扰动和转移扰动分别导致约40%和30%的精度损失，且单纯放大规模无法弥合该差距。ToolRL-DR-Full在3B骨干上保留约四分之三的干净精度，聚合扰动精度达到开源14B函数调用基线的水平，并显著缩小了与o4-mini的差距；尤其值得关注的是，它从未见过转移扰动训练数据，却弥合了约27%的转移扰动差距。
AI.conclusion: 工具调用语言模型的鲁棒性在不同POMDP组件上呈严重不均衡分布，奖励相关和转移动态扰动是核心瓶颈，单纯增加模型规模无法有效应对。ToolRL-DR通过域随机化RL在静态扰动上训练，不仅提升了训练时所见扰动类型的鲁棒性，还通过学习更持久的重试策略泛化到未见过的运行时转移失败，为构建鲁棒工具调用智能体提供了一条有效路径。

title: Reviving In-domain Fine-tuning Methods for Source-Free Cross-domain Few-shot Learning
summary: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CDFSL) aims to adapt large-scale pretrained models to specialized target domains with limited samples, yet the few-shot fine-tuning of vision-language models like CLIP remains underexplored. By establishing multiple fine-tuning baselines of CLIP for CDFSL, we find adapter-based methods (e.g., LoRA) consistently outperform prompt-based ones (e.g., MaPLe), contrary to in-domain scenarios. To make those effective in-domain methods competitive again in CDFSL, we analyze this phenomenon and discover LoRA's superiority stems from rectifying the collapsed attention of visual CLS token, enhancing modality alignment and class separation by focusing on text-related visual regions. Further, we find textual EOS token exhibit much better attention to visual samples, and CLIP's standard contrastive loss weakly constrains modality alignment. Based on these insights, we propose Semantic Probe, a plug-and-play attention rectification framework for both adapter- and prompt-based methods. Extensive experiments on four CDFSL benchmarks validate our rationale, achieving state-of-the-art performance and benefiting both fine-tuning paradigms. Codes will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Semantic Probe，一种即插即用的注意力修正框架，通过修正CLIP中视觉CLS token的注意力坍塌问题，显著提升了适配器与提示学习两类方法在跨域小样本学习中的性能，在四个基准上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 跨域小样本学习（CDFSL）中，大规模预训练视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的微调方法尚未被充分探索。现有研究表明，在域内场景下有效的提示学习方法（如MaPLe）在CDFSL中性能显著弱于适配器方法（如LoRA），而其原因不明，亟需深入分析并恢复提示方法在跨域场景下的竞争力。
AI.method: 首先系统建立了CLIP在CDFSL下的多个微调基线，发现LoRA等适配器方法一致优于MaPLe等提示方法。通过分析，揭示LoRA的优势来源于修正了视觉CLS token的注意力坍塌，使其聚焦于与文本相关的视觉区域，从而增强模态对齐与类别分离。进一步发现文本EOS token对视觉样本具有更好的注意力响应，且CLIP的标准对比损失对模态对齐约束不足。基于这些发现，提出Semantic Probe，一种即插即用的注意力修正框架，可同时应用于适配器与提示方法。
AI.result: 在四个CDFSL基准数据集上的大量实验验证了所提方法的有效性，Semantic Probe不仅达到了最先进的性能，而且同时提升了适配器与提示两种微调范式的表现，验证了注意力修正机制在跨域场景下的通用优越性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了适配器方法在CDFSL中优于提示方法的核心原因在于其在视觉CLS token注意力修正上的优势，并基于此提出了通用的注意力修正框架Semantic Probe。该工作不仅解释了跨域与域内场景下微调方法表现差异的根源，也为未来设计跨域鲁棒的视觉-语言模型微调策略提供了重要指导。

title: Counterfactual Trace Auditing of LLM Agent Skills
comment: Code and data are available at https://github.com/WillChow66/CTA.git
summary: Large Language Model agents are increasingly augmented with agent skills. Current evaluation methods for skills remain limited. Most deployed benchmarks report only pass rate before and after a skill is attached, treating the skill as a black box change to agent behavior. We introduce Counterfactual Trace Auditing (CTA), a framework for measuring how a skill changes agent behavior. CTA pairs each with skill agent trace with a without skill counterpart on the same task, segments both traces into goal directed phases, aligns the phases, and emits structured Skill Influence Pattern (SIP) annotations. These annotations describe the behavioral effect of a skill rather than only its task outcome. We instantiate CTA on SWE-Skills-Bench with Claude across 49 software engineering tasks. The resulting audit reveals a clear evaluation gap. Pass rate changes by only +0.3 percentage points on average, suggesting little aggregate effect. Yet CTA identifies 522 SIP instances across the same paired traces, showing that the skills substantially reshape agent behavior even when pass rate is nearly unchanged. The audit also separates several recurring effects that pass rate cannot detect, including literal template copying, off task artifact creation, excess planning, and task recovery. Three findings emerge. First, high baseline tasks contain most of the observed skill effects, although their pass rate is already saturated and therefore cannot reflect those effects. Second, tasks with moderate baseline performance show the most recoverable gain, but often at substantially higher token cost. Third, the dominant SIP type can be identified by baseline bucket: surface anchoring is most common on ceiling tasks and edge-case prompting is most common on mid-range and floor tasks. These regularities turn informal failure mode observations into reproducible behavioral measurements.

AI.tldr: 提出Counterfactual Trace Auditing (CTA)框架，通过成对有/无技能代理轨迹的细粒度对比分析，揭示了技能在通过率几乎不变的情况下显著重塑智能体行为的现象，弥补了传统通过率指标无法捕捉技能行为影响的评估缺口。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型智能体技能评估方法局限于报告技能附加前后的通过率变化，将技能视为影响智能体行为的黑盒，无法揭示技能对智能体行为过程的具体影响，存在显著的评估缺口。
AI.method: CTA框架为每个任务生成成对的有技能与无技能代理轨迹，将轨迹分割为目标准则导向的阶段并进行对齐，输出结构化技能影响模式(SIP)注释来描述技能的行为效应，而非仅关注任务结果。
AI.result: 在SWE-Skills-Bench上对Claude进行49项软件工程任务的审计显示：平均通过率仅变化+0.3个百分点，但CTA在相同成对轨迹中识别出522个SIP实例；技能产生多种通过率无法检测的反复效应，包括字面模板复制、离题工件创建、过度规划和任务恢复；高基线任务包含大部分技能效应但通过率饱和，中等基线任务显示最多可恢复增益但token成本显著更高，主导SIP类型随基线水平变化。
AI.conclusion: CTA将非正式故障模式观察转化为可复现的行为测量，揭示了技能对智能体行为的实质性重塑效应与传统通过率指标之间的巨大鸿沟，为智能体技能评估提供了新的方法论视角。

title: DORA: Dynamic Online Reinforcement Agent for Token Merging in Vision Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) incur significant computational overhead due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention relative to the token sequence length. While existing token reduction methods mitigate this issue, they predominantly rely on fixed heuristic metrics, predefined ratios, or static offline masks, which lack the adaptability to capture input-dependent redundancy during inference. In this paper, we propose DORA (Dynamic Online Reinforcement Agent), the first reinforcement learning (RL)-driven online inference framework for dynamic token merging in ViTs. We formulate the merging process as a sequential Markov Decision Process (MDP), where a lightweight RL agent determines the merging strategy for each Transformer block based on the current feature state and layer-specific context. To balance computational efficiency and feature fidelity, the agent is optimized via a dense reward function incorporating a non-linear distillation-based penalty. We implement an asymmetric Actor-Critic architecture that utilizes a high-capacity Critic for stable offline training while retaining a minimal Actor head for low-computation online inference. Evaluations across multiple ViT scales (Tiny to Large) demonstrate that DORA improves the accuracy-efficiency Pareto front compared to current baselines. Under strict negligible accuracy-drop constraints (<= 0.05%), DORA achieves up to a 12.66% token merging rate, and delivers up to a 569.7% relative improvement over the most efficient baseline. On ImageNet-1K, under aligned accuracy constraints, DORA achieves up to a 76% relative improvement in computational savings compared to state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, on out-of-distribution (OOD) benchmarks such as ImageNet-A and ImageNet-C, DORA attains a relative efficiency advantage of over 430%.

AI.tldr: 提出DORA，首个基于强化学习的在线推理框架，用于Vision Transformer中的动态Token合并，通过轻量级RL智能体在每层自适应决定合并策略，在保持精度的同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有的Vision Transformer Token缩减方法大多依赖固定启发式度量、预定义比率或静态离线掩码，无法在推理过程中根据输入特征自适应地捕获冗余，导致计算效率与特征保真度之间的权衡缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 将Token合并过程建模为序列化马尔可夫决策过程，通过轻量级强化学习智能体基于当前特征状态和层特定上下文决定每层Transformer的合并策略；采用非对称Actor-Critic架构（高容量Critic用于稳定离线训练，轻量Actor用于低计算在线推理），并设计包含非线性蒸馏惩罚的稠密奖励函数以平衡效率与特征保真度。
AI.result: 在多种ViT尺度（Tiny到Large）上，DORA改善了精度-效率帕累托前沿；在严格精度下降约束（≤0.05%）下实现12.66%的Token合并率，相对最有效基线提升569.7%；在ImageNet-1K上，在相同精度约束下相对SOTA方法计算节省提升76%；在ImageNet-A和ImageNet-C等分布外基准上相对效率优势超过430%。
AI.conclusion: DORA证明了强化学习可有效驱动Vision Transformer的动态在线Token合并，实现输入自适应的推理加速，在保持精度的同时大幅提升计算效率，且对分布偏移具有良好鲁棒性。

title: BadSKP: Backdoor Attacks on Knowledge Graph-Enhanced LLMs with Soft Prompts
summary: Recent knowledge graph (KG)-enhanced large language models (LLMs) move beyond purely textual knowledge augmentation by encoding retrieved subgraphs into continuous soft prompts via graph neural networks, introducing a graph-conditioned channel that operates alongside the standard text interface. However, existing backdoor attacks are largely designed for the textual channel, and their effectiveness against this dual-channel architecture remains unclear. We show that this architecture creates a robustness gap: text-channel backdoor attacks that readily compromise textual KG prompting systems become largely ineffective against soft-prompt-based counterparts. We interpret this gap through semantic anchoring, whereby graph-derived soft prompts bias the generation-driving hidden state toward query-consistent semantics and suppress surface-level malicious instructions. Because this anchoring effect is itself induced by the graph channel, an attacker who manipulates graph-level representations can in turn redirect it toward adversarial semantics. To demonstrate this risk, we propose BadSKP, a backdoor attack that targets the graph-to-prompt interface through a multi-stage optimization strategy: it constructs adversarial target embeddings, optimizes poisoned node embeddings to steer the induced soft prompt, and approximates the optimized representations with fluent adversarial node attributes. Experiments on two soft-prompt KG-enhanced LLMs across four datasets show that BadSKP achieves high attack success under both frozen and trojaned settings, while text-only attacks remain unreliable even under perplexity-based defenses.

AI.tldr: 提出BadSKP，一种针对软提示增强的知识图谱大语言模型（KG-LLM）的后门攻击方法，揭示了双通道架构中图通道引入的鲁棒性缺口，并通过多阶段优化策略实现高成功率的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有针对知识图谱增强大语言模型的后门攻击主要设计用于文本通道，但在软提示增强的双通道架构中，文本通道的后门攻击因“语义锚定”效应而失效，然而图通道的引入同时创造了新的攻击面，攻击者可通过操纵图级表征来重定向语义锚定，这构成了尚未被充分研究的安全风险。
AI.method: 提出BadSKP后门攻击方法，通过多阶段优化策略攻击图到提示的接口：首先构造对抗性目标嵌入，然后优化中毒节点嵌入以引导生成的软提示，最后用流畅的对抗性节点属性逼近优化后的表征，从而实现后门注入。
AI.result: 在两个软提示KG-LLM模型和四个数据集上的实验表明，BadSKP在冻结模型和三门模型设置下均实现了高攻击成功率，而纯文本攻击即便在基于困惑度的防御下仍然不可靠，验证了图通道后门攻击的有效性和文本通道攻击的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了软提示增强KG-LLM双通道架构中文本通道与图通道之间的鲁棒性不对称，表明图通道既提供了防御性的语义锚定机制以抵御文本后门攻击，也暴露了新的可被利用的攻击面，后续研究需关注跨通道安全对齐。

title: WildRelight: A Real-World Benchmark and Physics-Guided Adaptation for Single-Image Relighting
comment: Companion paper to the CVPR26 findings paper 'WildRelight', introducing the physics-guided adaptation method evaluated on the dataset. Project Page: https://lez-s.github.io/wildrelight_proj/
summary: Recent single-image relighting methods, powered by advanced generative models, have achieved impressive photorealism on synthetic benchmarks. However, their effectiveness in the complex visual landscape of the real world remains largely unverified. A critical gap exists, as current datasets are typically designed for multi-view reconstruction and fail to address the unique challenges of single-image relighting. To bridge this synthetic-to-real gap, we introduce WildRelight, the first in-the-wild dataset specifically created for evaluating single-image relighting models. WildRelight features a diverse collection of high-resolution outdoor scenes, captured under strictly aligned, temporally varying natural illuminations, each paired with a high-dynamic-range environment map. Using this data, we establish a rigorous benchmark revealing that state-of-the-art models trained on synthetic data suffer from severe domain shifts. The strictly aligned temporal structure of WildRelight enables a new paradigm for domain adaptation. We demonstrate this by introducing a physics-guided inference framework that leverages the captured natural light evolution as a self-supervised constraint. By integrating Diffusion Posterior Sampling (DPS) with temporal Sampling-Aware Test-Time Adaptation (TTA), we show that the dataset allows synthetic models to align with real-world statistics on-the-fly, transforming the intractable sim-to-real challenge into a tractable self-supervised task. The dataset and code will be made publicly available to foster robust, physically-grounded relighting research.

AI.tldr: WildRelight是首个面向野外真实场景的单图像重光照评估数据集，包含高分辨率户外场景及其时间变化的高动态范围环境光照，并提出了结合扩散后验采样与时序感知测试时自适应的物理引导推理框架，有效弥合了合成数据与真实世界之间的域差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成模型的单图像重光照方法在合成基准上表现优异，但在复杂真实世界场景中的有效性尚未得到充分验证；当前数据集多针对多视角重建设计，无法满足单图像重光照的独特需求，存在严重的合成到真实域差距问题。
AI.method: 论文构建了WildRelight数据集，包含严格对齐、光照时变的高分辨率户外场景及其配对的高动态范围环境图；并基于该数据提出物理引导的推理框架，将自然光照演化作为自监督约束，结合扩散后验采样与采样感知的测试时自适应，实现合成模型在真实场景上的即时域对齐。
AI.result: 基于WildRelight建立的严格基准实验表明，现有在合成数据上训练的最先进模型在真实场景中遭受严重的域偏移；通过所提出的时序测试时自适应方法，模型能够利用数据集的时间结构实现有效的自监督域适应，将原本棘手的合成到真实挑战转化为可处理的自监督任务。
AI.conclusion: WildRelight为单图像重光照提供了首个真实野外评估基准，揭示了合成模型的域偏移问题，并展示了利用真实光照时变数据进行物理引导的自监督适应是一种有效的解决方案；该工作为鲁棒、物理可信的重光照研究提供了新的数据基础和方法范式。

title: SAGE: A Self-Evolving Agentic Graph-Memory Engine for Structure-Aware Associative Memory
summary: Long-term memory is becoming a central bottleneck for language agents. Exsting RAG and GraphRAG systems largely treat memory graphs as static retrieval middleware, which limits their ability to recover complete evidence chains from partial cues, exploit reusable graph-structrual roles, and improve the memory itself through downstream feedback. We introduce SAGE, a Self-evolving Agentic Graph-memory Engine that models graph memory as a dynamic long-term memory substrate. SAGE couples two roles: a memory writer that incrementally constucts structured graph memory from interaction histories, and a Graph Foundation Model-based memory reader to perform retrieval and provide feedback to the memory writer. We provide rigorooous theoretical annalyses supporting the framework. Across multi-hop QA, open-domain retireval, domain-specific review QA, and long-term agent-memory benchmarks, SAGE improves evidence recovery, answer grounding, and retrieval efficiency: after two self-evolution rounds, it achieves the best average rank on multi-hop QA; in zero-shot open-domain transfer, it reaches 82.5/91.6 Recall@2/5 on NQ. Further results on LongMemEval and HaluMem show that traning and reader-writer feedback improve multiple long-term memory and hallucination-diagnostic metrics, suggesting that self-evolving, structure-aware graph memory is a promising foundation for robust long-horizon language agents.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一种自演进图记忆引擎，将图记忆建模为动态长期记忆基板，通过记忆写入器和基于图基础模型的记忆读取器协同工作，在多跳问答、开放域检索和长期智能体记忆基准上显著提升了证据恢复、答案基元和检索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG和GraphRAG系统将记忆图视为静态检索中间件，导致其难以从局部线索恢复完整证据链、无法利用可复用的图结构角色，也无法通过下游反馈改进记忆自身，这成为语言智能体长期记忆的核心瓶颈。
AI.method: SAGE提出双角色协同架构：记忆写入器从交互历史中增量构建结构化图记忆，基于图基础模型的记忆读取器负责检索并为写入器提供反馈，从而实现图记忆的动态自演进。
AI.result: 经过两轮自演进后，SAGE在多跳问答上达到最佳平均排名；在零样本开放域迁移中，NQ数据集上Recall@2/5分别达到82.5/91.6；在LongMemEval和HaluMem基准上，训练和读写反馈机制改善了长期记忆和幻觉诊断指标。
AI.conclusion: 自演进且结构感知的图记忆是构建鲁棒长时域语言智能体的有前景的基础，训练与读写器反馈能系统性地提升长期记忆质量并减少幻觉。

title: ScaleMoGen: Autoregressive Next-Scale Prediction for Human Motion Generation
summary: We present ScaleMoGen, a scale-wise autoregressive framework for text-driven human motion generation. Unlike conventional autoregressive approaches that rely on standard next-token prediction, ScaleMoGen frames motion generation as a coarse-to-fine process. We quantize 3D motions into compositional discrete tokens across multiple skeletal-emporal scales of increasing granularity, learning to generate motion by autoregressively predicting next-scale token maps. To maintain structural integrity, our motion tokenizers and quantizers are explicitly designed so that discrete tokens at every scale strictly preserve the skeletal hierarchy. Additionally, we employ bitwise quantization and prediction, which efficiently scale up the tokenizer vocabulary to preserve motion details and stabilize optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ScaleMoGen achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing an FID of 0.030 (vs. 0.045 for MoMask) on HumanML3D and a CLIP Score of 0.693 (vs. 0.685 for MoMask++) on the SnapMoGen dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our skeletal-temporal multi-scale representation naturally facilitates training-free, text-guided motion editing.

AI.tldr: ScaleMoGen提出了一种尺度级自回归框架，将文本驱动的3D人体运动生成建模为从粗到细的多尺度离散令牌预测过程，通过保持骨骼层次结构的令牌设计和按位置量化预测，在多个基准上实现了最先进的性能，并支持无需训练的运动编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归方法通常采用标准的逐令牌预测方式生成人体运动，缺乏对运动结构的多尺度层次化建模能力，难以在保持全局结构的同时捕捉精细的时空细节，且在运动编辑任务中需要额外训练或复杂后处理。
AI.method: ScaleMoGen将3D运动量化为跨多个骨骼-时间尺度的组合式离散令牌，从粗粒度到细粒度递增排列，并通过自回归方式预测下一尺度的令牌图；运动分词器和量化器被显式设计为在每个尺度上严格保持骨骼层次结构；同时采用按位置量化（bitwise quantization）和预测机制，高效扩展令牌词汇量以保留运动细节并稳定优化过程。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D数据集上，ScaleMoGen取得了FID 0.030（相比MoMask的0.045）；在SnapMoGen数据集上，CLIP Score达到0.693（相比MoMask++的0.685）；实验还表明该多尺度表示自然地支持无需训练、文本引导的运动编辑。
AI.conclusion: ScaleMoGen表明，通过骨骼-时间多尺度表示的层级化自回归生成能够在运动质量上超越强基线方法，同时该表示结构天然支持零样本的文本引导运动编辑，为运动生成领域提供了兼具高性能与实用性的新框架。

title: Autonomy and Agency in Agentic AI: Architectural Tactics for Regulated Contexts
summary:
Deploying agentic AI in regulated contexts requires principled reasoning about two design dimensions: agency (what the system can do) and autonomy (how much it acts without human involvement). Though often treated independently, they are coupled: at higher autonomy, human error correction is less available, so reliable operation requires constraining agency accordingly; compliance requirements reinforce this by mandating human involvement as action consequences grow. Yet no established approach addresses them jointly, leaving practitioners without a principled basis for reasoning about oversight, action consequences, and error correction.
  This work introduces a two-dimensional design space in which both dimensions are organised into five operational levels, making the coupling explicit and navigable. Autonomy ranges from human-commanded operation (L1) to fully autonomous monitoring (L5); agency ranges from reasoning over supplied context (L1) to committed writes to authoritative records (L5). Building on this space, we propose six architectural tactics--checkpoints, escalation, multi-agent delegation, tool provisioning, tool fencing, and write staging--for adjusting a deployment's position within it. The tactics are grounded in two worked examples from public-sector contexts, illustrating how they apply under realistic compliance constraints. We further examine five deployment parameters--model capability, agent architecture, tool fidelity, workflow bottlenecks, and evaluation--that shape what is achievable at any configuration independently of agency and autonomy. Together, the design space, tactics, and deployment parameters provide a shared vocabulary for principled, compliance-aware agentic AI design in which responsibility, auditability, and reversibility are explicit design considerations rather than properties that must be retrofitted after deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个二维设计空间，将智能体AI的能动性（agency）与自主性（autonomy）分别划分为五个操作层级，并引入六种架构战术和五个部署参数，为合规约束下的智能体AI系统设计提供了原则性的推理框架，使责任、可审计性和可逆性成为显式设计考量。
AI.motivation: 在受监管环境中部署智能体AI时，需要在能动性（系统能做什么）和自主性（系统在多大程度上无需人类参与）两个设计维度上进行原则性推理。然而，现有方法并未将二者联合考虑，导致从业者缺乏关于监督、行动后果和错误修正的原则性推理基础。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个二维设计空间，将自主性从人类指令操作（L1）到完全自主监控（L5）分为五级，能动性从推理给定上下文（L1）到对权威记录进行提交式写入（L5）分为五级。基于此，提出了六种架构战术（检查点、升级、多智能体委派、工具配置、工具围栏、写入暂存）和五个部署参数（模型能力、智能体架构、工具保真度、工作流瓶颈、评估），用于调整系统在设计空间中的位置。
AI.result: 本文通过两个公共部门场景的工作实例，展示了所提战术在现实合规约束下的适用性。研究表明，在更高自主性下，人类纠错可用性降低，因此可靠运行需要相应地约束能动性；合规要求进一步强化了这一点——随着行动后果增大，必须强制人类参与。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为合规感知的智能体AI设计提供了共享词汇表，使责任、可审计性和可逆性成为显式设计考量而非事后追溯的属性，为从业者在受监管环境中进行原则性设计奠定了框架基础。

title: CaC: Advancing Video Reward Models via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Concentrating
summary: In this paper, we propose Concentrate and Concentrate (CaC), a coarse-to-fine anomaly reward model based on Vision-Language Models. During inference, it first conducts a global temporal scan to anchor anomalous time windows, then performs fine-grained spatial grounding within the localized interval, and finally derives robust judgments via structured spatiotemporal Chain-of-Thought reasoning. To equip the model with these capabilities, we construct the first large-scale generated video anomaly dataset with per-frame bounding-box annotations, temporal anomaly windows, and fine-grained attribution labels. Building on this dataset, we design a three-stage progressive training paradigm. The model initially learns spatial and temporal anchoring through single- and multi-frame supervised fine-tuning, and then is optimized by a reinforcement learning strategy based on two-turn Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Beyond conventional accuracy rewards, we introduce Temporal and Spatial IoU rewards to supervise the intermediate localization process, effectively guiding the model toward more grounded and interpretable spatiotemporal reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CaC can stably concentrate on subtle anomalies, achieving a 25.7% accuracy improvement on fine-grained anomaly benchmarks and, when used as a reward signal, CaC reduces generated-video anomalies by 11.7% while improving overall video quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CaC，一种基于视觉-语言模型的由粗到细异常奖励模型，通过全局时间扫描、局部空间定位和结构化时空思维链推理实现细粒度异常检测，结合大规模生成视频数据集和三阶段渐进训练范式，在细粒度异常基准上取得25.7%准确率提升，并作为奖励信号时降低生成视频异常11.7%并提升整体质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法对细粒度、小样本异常的定位能力不足，且缺乏可解释的时空推理机制；同时缺乏带有逐帧边界框、时间异常窗口和细粒度归因标注的大规模数据集，限制了视觉-语言模型在该任务上的监督训练与奖励学习能力。
AI.method: 提出CaC模型，采用由粗到细的异常奖励框架：推理时首先进行全局时间扫描锚定异常时间窗口，再在局部区间内进行细粒度空间定位，最后通过结构化时空思维链推理得出鲁棒判断。构建首个大规模生成视频异常数据集，包含逐帧边界框、时间异常窗口和细粒度归因标签。设计三阶段渐进训练范式：先通过单帧和多帧监督微调学习空间和时间锚定能力，再基于两轮GRPO强化学习策略进行优化，引入时间和空间交并比奖励以监督中间定位过程。
AI.result: 在细粒度异常基准上，CaC相比基线实现25.7%的准确率提升；作为奖励信号使用时，CaC将生成视频的异常比例降低11.7%，同时改善整体视频质量。实验表明模型能够稳定聚焦于细微异常。
AI.conclusion: CaC通过粗到细的定位机制和时空思维链推理显著增强了视觉-语言模型对细微异常的检测能力，其作为奖励信号可有效减少生成视频中的异常内容，研究为可解释的细粒度视频异常检测和生成视频质量控制提供了新范式。

title: Adaptive Multi-Round Allocation with Stochastic Arrivals
summary: We study a sequential resource allocation problem motivated by adaptive network recruitment, in which a limited budget of identical resources must be allocated over multiple rounds to individuals with stochastic referral capacity. Successful referrals endogenously generate future decision opportunities while allocating additional resources to an individual exhibits diminishing returns. We first show that the single-round allocation problem admits an exact greedy solution based on marginal survival probabilities. In the multi-round setting, the resulting Bellman recursion is intractable due to the stochastic, high-dimensional evolution of the frontier. To address this, we introduce a population-level surrogate value function that depends only on the remaining budget and frontier size. This surrogate enables an exact dynamic program via truncated probability generating functions, yielding a planning algorithm with polynomial complexity in the total budget. We further analyze robustness under model misspecification, proving a multi-round error bound that decomposes into a tight single-round frontier error and a population-level transition error. Finally, we evaluate our method on real-world inspired recruitment scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自适应网络招聘中的顺序资源分配问题，提出了一种基于总体替代价值函数的动态规划算法，通过截断概率生成函数在多项式时间内求解，并提供了多轮误差界的鲁棒性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有顺序资源分配问题在自适应网络招聘场景下面临双重挑战：个体随机推荐容量导致未来决策机会内生生成，而同一资源分配至同一个人呈现边际收益递减。单轮问题虽可通过贪心算法求解，但多轮场景下的贝尔曼递归因前沿状态的高维随机演化而难以处理，亟需一种可计算且具有鲁棒性保障的规划方法。
AI.method: 本文首先证明了单轮分配问题存在基于边际生存概率的贪心最优解。针对多轮设定，引入仅依赖于剩余预算和前沿规模的总体替代价值函数，替换原有的高维状态表示。基于该替代函数，利用截断概率生成函数推导出精确动态规划方程，从而给出总预算多项式复杂度的规划算法。此外，建立了模型误设定下的多轮误差界，将其分解为紧的单轮前沿误差与总体转移误差。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，所提多轮分配算法具有多项式时间复杂度（关于总预算），且误差界可分解为单轮前沿误差与总体转移误差两个可分别控制的部分。在基于真实场景的招聘模拟实验中，该方法展现了有效的资源分配性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过总体替代价值函数将原高维随机动态规划问题转化为可计算形式，为自适应网络招聘中的顺序资源分配提供了理论保障和实用算法。误差分解结果为鲁棒性分析提供了结构化视角，未来可进一步推广至更一般的网络资源分配场景。

title: Urban Risk-Aware Navigation via VQA-Based Event Maps for People with Low Vision
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, submitted to IEEE T-ITS
summary: Visual impairment affects hundreds of millions of people worldwide, severely limiting their ability to navigate urban environments safely and independently. While wearable assistive devices offer a promising platform for real-time hazard detection, existing approaches rely on task-specific vision pipelines that lack flexibility and generalizability. In this work, we propose an event map framework based on visual question answering that leverages Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for pedestrian scene description and hazard identification across diverse real-world environments, using a three-level hierarchical query structure to enable fine-grained scene understanding without task-specific retraining. Model responses are aggregated into a weighted risk scoring system that maps street segments into four discrete safety categories, producing navigable risk-aware event maps for route planning. To support evaluation and future research, we introduce a geographically diverse dataset spanning 20 cities across six continents, comprising over 800 annotated images and 18,000 answered questions. We benchmark four VQA architectures -ViLT, LLaVA, InstructBLIP, and Qwen-VL- and find that generative Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) substantially outperform classification-based approaches, with Qwen-VL achieving the best overall balance of precision and recall. These results demonstrate the viability of MLLMs as a flexible and generalizable foundation for assistive navigation systems for visually impaired people.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉问答的事件地图框架，利用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）为视障人群实现灵活、可泛化的行人场景描述与危险识别，并在覆盖20个城市的多大陆数据集上验证了Qwen-VL等生成式MLLMs相比传统分类方法在精确率与召回率上的显著优势。
AI.motivation: 全球数亿视障人士在城市场景中安全独立导航面临严重挑战，现有可穿戴辅助设备依赖任务特定的视觉流水线，缺乏灵活性与泛化能力，无法适应多样化的真实环境。
AI.method: 提出一种基于视觉问答的事件地图框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLMs）通过三级层次化查询结构实现细粒度场景理解与危险识别，无需任务特定重新训练；模型响应被聚合为加权风险评分系统，将街道段映射到四个离散安全类别以生成风险感知事件地图；构建了覆盖六大洲20个城市的带标注数据集，包含800余张图像和18,000个问答对。
AI.result: 在ViLT、LLaVA、InstructBLIP和Qwen-VL四种VQA架构上进行了基准测试，结果表明生成式多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）显著优于基于分类的方法，其中Qwen-VL在精确率与召回率之间取得了最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了MLLMs作为视障辅助导航系统灵活且可泛化基础的可行性，为构建更通用的可穿戴辅助感知系统提供了新方向。

title: Rollout Cards: A Reproducibility Standard for Agent Research
summary: Reproducibility problems that have long affected machine learning and reinforcement learning are now surfacing in agent research: papers compare systems by reported scores while leaving the rollout records behind those scores difficult to inspect. For agentic tasks, this matters because the same behaviour can receive different reported scores when evaluations select different parts of a rollout or apply different reporting rules. In a structured audit of 50 popular training and evaluation repositories, we find that none report how many runs failed, errored, or were skipped alongside headline scores. We also document 37 cases where reporting rules can change task-success rates, cost/token accounting, or timing measurements for fixed evidence, sometimes dramatically. We treat rollout records, not reported scores, as the unit of reproducibility for agent research. We introduce rollout cards: publication bundles that preserve the rollout record and declare the views, reporting rules, and drops manifests behind reported scores. We validate rollout cards in two settings. First, four partial public releases in tool safety, multi-agent systems, theorem proving, and search let us compute analyses their original reports did not include. Second, re-grading preserved benchmark outputs across short-answer, code-generation, and tool-use tasks shows that changing only the reporting rule can change reported scores by 20.9 absolute percentage points and, in some cases, invert rankings of frontier models. We release a reference implementation integrated into Ergon, an open-source reinforcement learning gym, and publicly publish Ergon-produced rollout-card exports for benchmarks spanning tool use, software engineering, web interaction, multi-agent coordination, safety, and search to support future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将回放记录（rollout records）而非报告分数作为智能体研究可复现性的基本单元，引入回放卡片（rollout cards）作为标准化发布束，并通过结构化审计和实验验证了当前报告规则可导致分数显著偏差（最高20.9个绝对百分点）及排名反转。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体研究存在可复现性问题：论文仅报告分数，而回放记录难以审查；同一行为因评估时选择不同回放片段或采用不同报告规则，会导致报告分数显著差异；对50个流行训练与评估仓库的结构化审计发现，没有任何仓库报告失败、出错或跳过的运行次数。
AI.method: 提出回放卡片（rollout cards）作为发布束，保留完整回放记录并声明报告分数背后的视图、报告规则和丢弃清单；在工具安全、多智能体系统、定理证明和搜索四个场景中进行部分公开发布验证；在简答题、代码生成和工具使用任务上对保留的基准输出进行重新评分，仅改变报告规则来观察分数变化。
AI.result: 结构化审计发现37例报告规则可改变任务成功率、成本/令牌核算或时间测量的情况；仅改变报告规则即可使报告分数变化20.9个绝对百分点，并在某些情况下导致前沿模型排名反转；在四个部分公开发布场景中，回放卡片支持的增量分析超出了原始报告的能力。
AI.conclusion: 回放记录（而非报告分数）应成为智能体研究可复现性的基本单元；回放卡片提供了一种实用的标准化机制来提升透明度和可审计性；参考实现已集成至开源强化学习框架Ergon，并公开发布了覆盖多种基准的回放卡片导出数据以支持未来研究。

title: Mitigating Action-Relation Hallucinations in LVLMs via Relation-aware Visual Enhancement
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on diverse vision-language tasks. However, LVLMs still suffer from hallucinations, generating text that contradicts the visual input. Existing research has primarily focused on mitigating object hallucinations, but often overlooks more complex relation hallucinations, particularly action relations involving interactions between objects. In this study, we empirically observe that the primary cause of action-relation hallucinations in LVLMs is the insufficient attention allocated to visual information. Thus, we propose a framework to locate action-relevant image regions and enhance the LVLM's attention to those regions. Specifically, we define the Action-Relation Sensitivity (ARS) score to identify attention heads that are most sensitive to action-relation changes, thereby localizing action-relevant image regions that contain key visual cues. Then, we propose the Relation-aware Visual Enhancement (RVE) method to enhance the LVLM's attention to these action-relevant image regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, compared to existing baselines, our method achieves superior performance in mitigating action-relation hallucinations with negligible additional inference cost. Furthermore, it effectively generalizes to spatial-relation hallucinations and object hallucinations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力增强的框架，通过定义动作关系敏感性（ARS）分数定位关键注意力头，并采用关系感知视觉增强（RVE）方法提升LVLM对动作相关图像区域的关注，有效缓解了动作关系幻觉，且推理成本极低。
AI.motivation: 现有减轻大型视觉-语言模型（LVLM）幻觉的研究主要关注物体级幻觉，忽略了更复杂的动作关系幻觉（即对象间交互关系），且已有方法对动作关系幻觉的成因及缓解策略缺乏深入分析。
AI.method: 首先通过实证发现动作关系幻觉的主要原因是LVLM对视觉信息的注意力不足；进而定义动作关系敏感性（ARS）分数，用于识别对动作关系变化最敏感的注意力头，从而定位包含关键视觉线索的动作相关图像区域；最后提出关系感知视觉增强（RVE）方法，增强LVLM对这些区域的注意力。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在缓解动作关系幻觉上显著优于现有基线方法，且仅引入极小的额外推理成本；此外，该方法还能有效泛化到空间关系幻觉和物体幻觉的缓解任务中。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了动作关系幻觉源于视觉注意力不足的关键成因，并证明通过定位并增强对动作相关视觉区域的注意力即可有效缓解该问题，为LVLM幻觉缓解提供了新的视角和通用框架。

title: MolDeTox: Evaluating Language Model's Stepwise Fragment Editing for Molecular Detoxification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have recently shown promising capabilities in various scientific domain. In particular, these advances have opened new opportunities in drug discovery, where the ability to understand and modify molecular structures is critical for optimizing drug properties such as efficacy and toxicity. However, existing models and benchmarks often overlook toxicity-related challenges, focusing primarily on general property optimization without adequately addressing safety concerns. In addition, even existing toxicity repair benchmarks suffer from limited data diversity, low structural validity of generated molecules, and heavy reliance on proxy models for toxicity assessment. To address these limitations, we propose MolDeTox, a novel benchmark for molecular detoxification, designed to enable fine-grained and reliable evaluation of toxicity-aware molecular optimization across stepwise tasks. We evaluate a wide range of general-purpose LLMs and VLMs under diverse settings, and demonstrate that understanding and generating molecules at the fragment-level improves structural validity and enhances the quality of generated molecules. Moreover, through detailed task-level performance analysis, MolDeTox provides an interpretable benchmark that enables a deeper understanding of the detoxification process. Our dataset is available at : https://huggingface.co/datasets/MolDeTox/MolDeTox

AI.tldr: MolDeTox是一个面向分子解毒任务的细粒度、可靠的新型基准测试，通过碎片级分子理解与生成提升结构有效性和生成质量，并为毒性感知分子优化提供可解释的性能分析。
AI.motivation: 现有LLMs和VLMs在药物发现中主要关注通用性质优化而忽视毒性挑战，同时已有毒性修复基准存在数据多样性不足、生成分子结构有效性低、过度依赖代理模型评估毒性等问题。
AI.method: 提出MolDeTox基准，支持分步式细粒度毒性感知分子优化评估，并在多种通用LLMs和VLMs上进行实验验证，采用碎片级分子理解与生成策略提升结构有效性与生成质量。
AI.result: 实验表明碎片级分子理解与生成方法在结构有效性和生成分子质量上显著优于现有方法；MolDeTox通过任务级性能分析提供了可解释的解毒过程评估。
AI.conclusion: MolDeTox为毒性感知分子优化提供了更可靠、更具可解释性的评估平台，碎片级建模是提升分子生成质量的关键方向。

title: RevealLayer: Disentangling Hidden and Visible Layers via Occlusion-Aware Image Decomposition
summary: Recent diffusion-based approaches have made substantial progress in image layer decomposition. However, accurately decomposing complex natural images remains challenging due to difficulties in occlusion completion, robust layer disentanglement, and precise foreground boundaries. Moreover, the scarcity of high-quality multi-layer natural image datasets limits advancement. To address these challenges, we propose RevealLayer, a diffusion-based framework that decomposes an RGB image into multiple RGBA layers, enabling precise layer separation and reliable recovery of occluded content in natural images. RevealLayer incorporates three key components: (1) a Region-Aware Attention module to disentangle hidden and visible layers; (2) an Occlusion-Guided Adapter to leverage contextual information to enhance overlapping regions; and (3) a composite loss to enforce sharp alpha boundaries and suppress residual artifacts. To support training and evaluation, we introduce RevealLayer-100K, a high-quality multi-layer natural image constructed through a collaboration between automated algorithms and human annotation, and further establish RevealLayerBench for benchmarking layer decomposition in general natural scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RevealLayer consistently outperforms existing approaches in layer decomposition.

AI.tldr: 提出RevealLayer框架，基于扩散模型将RGB图像分解为多个RGBA图层，结合区域感知注意力、遮挡引导适配器和复合损失函数，并构建了大规模高质量多图层数据集RevealLayer-100K，在自然图像图层分解任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像图层分解方法在处理复杂自然图像时面临三大挑战：遮挡区域的补全困难、图层间的鲁棒解耦能力不足、以及前景边界不够精确；同时，高质量多图层自然图像数据集的匮乏严重制约了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 提出RevealLayer框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) Region-Aware Attention（区域感知注意力模块），用于解耦隐藏层与可见层；(2) Occlusion-Guided Adapter（遮挡引导适配器），利用上下文信息增强重叠区域的恢复；(3) 复合损失函数（composite loss），用于强化清晰的alpha边界并抑制伪影。此外，通过自动化算法与人工标注相结合的方式构建了高质量多图层数据集RevealLayer-100K，并建立了标准评测基准RevealLayerBench。
AI.result: 在多个实验场景下，RevealLayer在图层分解任务上持续优于现有方法，在遮挡补全、图层解耦和前景边界清晰度等关键指标上均取得更优表现。
AI.conclusion: RevealLayer通过引入专门设计的注意力机制与适配器结构，有效解决了扩散模型在复杂自然图像图层分解中的关键瓶颈；同时，所构建的大规模数据集与基准为后续研究提供了标准化评测平台，推动了图像图层分解领域的发展。

title: No Action Without a NOD: A Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Architecture for Reliable Service Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have increasingly advanced service applications, such as booking flight tickets. However, these service agents suffer from unreliability in long-horizon tasks, as they often produce policy violations, tool hallucinations, and misaligned actions, which greatly impedes their real-world deployment. To address these challenges, we propose NOD (Navigator-Operator-Director), a heterogeneous multi-agent architecture for service agents. Instead of maintaining task state implicitly in dialogue context as in prior work, we externalize a structured Global State to enable explicit task state tracking and consistent decision-making by the Navigator. Besides, we introduce selective external oversight before critical actions, allowing an independent Director agent to verify execution and intervene when necessary. As such, NOD effectively mitigates error propagation and unsafe behavior in long-horizon tasks. Experiments on $τ^2$-Bench demonstrate that NOD achieves higher task success rates and critical action precision over baselines. More importantly, NOD improves the reliability of service agents by reducing policy violations, tool hallucinations, and user-intent misalignment.

AI.tldr: 提出NOD异构多智能体架构，通过外部化全局状态和引入选择性外部监督，显著减少了长程任务中的策略违规、工具幻觉和意图不对齐问题，在τ²-Bench上取得了更高的任务成功率和关键动作精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的服务智能体在长程任务中不可靠，容易出现策略违规、工具幻觉和动作不对齐等问题，根本原因在于任务状态隐式地维护在对话上下文中，缺乏显式的状态跟踪和决策验证机制，严重阻碍了其在真实场景中的部署。
AI.method: 提出NOD异构多智能体架构，包含三个角色：Navigator将结构化全局状态外部化，实现显式任务状态跟踪和一致决策；Operator负责执行具体动作；Director作为独立智能体在关键动作前进行选择性外部监督，验证执行并在必要时干预，从而阻断错误传播和不安全行为。
AI.result: 在τ²-Bench上的实验表明，NOD相比基线方法取得了更高的任务成功率和关键动作精度，并显著降低了策略违规、工具幻觉和用户意图不对齐问题，全面提升了服务智能体的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过外部化全局状态和引入选择性监督机制，NOD有效解决了服务智能体在长程任务中的可靠性问题，为复杂服务场景下多智能体协作提供了一种实用设计范式。

title: Selection, Not Fusion: Radar-Modulated State Space Models for Radar-Camera Depth Estimation
summary: Radar-camera depth estimation must turn an ultra-sparse, all-weather, metric radar signal into a dense per-pixel depth map. Existing methods -- concatenation, confidence-aware gating, sparse supervision, graph-based extraction -- combine radar and image features outside the backbone's sequence operator, and even cross-modal Mamba variants leave the selection mechanism itself unimodal. We argue that the selection mechanism is the right place for radar to enter. We introduce Radar-Modulated Selection (RMS), a minimal and principled way to inject radar into Mamba's selective scan: radar modulates the scan from within, adding zero-initialised perturbations to the step size $Δ$ and readout $\mathbf{C}$ while leaving the input projection $\mathbf{B}$ and state dynamics $\mathbf{A}$ image-only. The construction is exactly equivalent to a pretrained image-only Mamba at initialisation, ensuring radar only influences the model where it improves accuracy. Two further properties follow that out-of-scan fusion cannot offer: linear-cost cross-modal coupling at every recurrence step, and a natural fallback to the image-only backbone when radar is absent. We deploy RMS in a Multi-View Scan Pyramid (MVSP) that matches the fusion operator to radar's spatial reach at each scale. SemoDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance on nuScenes, reducing MAE by 34.0%, 29.9%, and 29.9% over the previous best at 0--50, 0--70, and 0--80m, while attaining the lowest single-frame latency (26.8ms). A further ablation shows that out-of-scan feature blending adds no accuracy on top of RMS, providing empirical validation that in-scan selection can replace out-of-scan fusion.

AI.tldr: 提出雷达调制选择机制（RMS），将雷达信号直接注入Mamba的选择性扫描内部，替代传统的特征融合方式，在保持零初始化等价性的前提下实现线性成本的跨模态耦合，并在nuScenes数据集上达到SOTA深度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达-相机深度估计方法（拼接、置信门控、稀疏监督、图提取等）均在骨干网络的序列算子外部进行特征融合，即使是跨模态Mamba变体也保留了单模态的选择机制，未能将雷达信号嵌入到选择机制的核心位置，导致跨模态交互不充分且缺乏对雷达缺失场景的自然回退能力。
AI.method: 提出雷达调制选择（RMS），将雷达信号以零初始化扰动方式注入Mamba选择性扫描的步长Δ和读出矩阵C中，而输入投影B和状态动力学A保持纯图像模态；该设计在初始化时与纯图像Mamba完全等价，确保雷达仅在提升精度处发挥作用。进一步提出多视角扫描金字塔（MVSP），在各尺度上将融合算子与雷达空间覆盖范围匹配，构建SemoDepth框架。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，SemoDepth在0–50m、0–70m、0–80m范围内分别将MAE较此前最优方法降低34.0%、29.9%、29.9%，同时实现最低单帧延迟26.8ms。消融实验表明，在RMS基础上叠加扫描外特征融合无额外精度提升，验证了扫描内选择可替代扫描外融合。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将雷达信号嵌入Mamba选择性扫描内部是一种比传统扫描外融合更优的跨模态交互范式，兼具线性成本、自然回退能力和状态最优性能，为雷达-视觉融合提供了一种极简且原则性的新方向。

title: Missingness-MDPs: Bridging the Theory of Missing Data and POMDPs
summary: We introduce missingness-MDPs (miss-MDPs), a novel subclass of partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) that incorporates the theory of missing data. A miss-MDP is a POMDP whose observation function is a missingness function, specifying the probability that individual state features are missing (i.e., unobserved) at a time step. The literature distinguishes three canonical missingness types: missing (1) completely at random (MCAR), (2) at random (MAR), and (3) not at random (MNAR). Our planning problem is to compute near-optimal policies for a miss-MDP with an unknown missingness function, given a dataset of action-observation trajectories. Achieving such optimality guarantees for policies requires learning the missingness function from data, which is infeasible for general POMDPs. To overcome this challenge, we exploit the structural properties of different missingness types to derive probably approximately correct (PAC) algorithms for learning the missingness function. These algorithms yield an approximate but fully specified miss-MDP that we solve using off-the-shelf planning methods. We prove that, with high probability, the resulting policies are epsilon-optimal in the true miss-MDP. Empirical results confirm the theory and demonstrate superior performance of our approach over two model-free POMDP methods.

AI.tldr: 提出缺失性MDP（miss-MDP）框架，将缺失数据理论融入部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，并针对未知缺失机制设计PAC可学习算法，从而保证学习到的策略在真实环境中达到epsilon-最优。
AI.motivation: 现有POMDP方法在处理状态特征部分缺失的真实场景时，缺乏对缺失机制（MCAR/MAR/MNAR）的形式化建模，且当缺失函数未知时，直接学习最优策略在一般POMDP中不可行，导致策略在真实环境中的最优性无法得到保证。
AI.method: 提出miss-MDP子类，其观测函数由缺失性函数定义，刻画各状态特征在时间步上的缺失概率。针对缺失函数未知的情形，利用不同缺失类型（MCAR、MAR、MNAR）的结构特性，设计PAC算法从动作-观测轨迹数据中学习缺失性函数，从而获得一个近似的完全指定miss-MDP，再使用现成的规划方法求解近优策略。
AI.result: 理论证明学习到的策略以高概率在真实miss-MDP中达到epsilon-最优。实验验证了理论结果，并表明所提方法在性能上优于两种无模型的POMDP方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次将缺失数据理论系统性地融入序列决策建模，提供了在未知缺失机制下仍能保证策略最优性的理论基础和可行算法，为实际应用中处理部分可观测与数据缺失问题开辟了新路径。

title: GATA2Floor: Graph attention for floor counting in street-view facades
comment: Accepted at IEEE ICIP 2026; 6 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
summary: Automated analysis of building facades from street-level imagery has great potential for urban analytics, energy assessment, and emergency planning. However, it requires reasoning over spatially arranged elements rather than solely isolated detections. In this work, we model each facade as a graph over window/door detections with a vertical prior on edges. Additionally, we introduce GATA2Floor, a multi-head Graph Attention v2 (GATv2) based model that predicts the global floor count of a building and, via learnable cross-attention queries, softly assigns elements to latent floor slots, yielding interpretable outputs and robustness to irregular designs. To mitigate the lack of labeled datasets, we demonstrate that the proposed graph-based reasoning can be applied without annotations by leveraging a lightweight label-free proposal mechanism based on self-supervised features and vision-language scoring. Our approach demonstrates the value of graph-attention-based relational reasoning for facade understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出GATA2Floor模型，通过图注意力网络对建筑立面中的门窗检测构建图结构并结合垂直先验进行全局楼层计数与元素-楼层软分配，同时利用自监督特征与视觉语言评分的无标签机制实现无需标注的推理。
AI.motivation: 街道图像中的建筑立面自动分析对城市分析、能源评估和应急规划具有重要价值，但现有方法仅能进行孤立的物体检测，缺乏对空间排列元素的推理能力，阻碍了对建筑全局结构的理解。
AI.method: 将每个建筑立面建模为基于门窗检测构造的图，并在边上引入垂直先验；提出基于多头图注意力v2（GATv2）的GATA2Floor模型，通过可学习的交叉注意力查询将元素软分配到潜在楼层槽位中，从而预测建筑全局楼层数；为缓解标注数据匮乏，利用自监督特征与视觉语言评分设计轻量级无标签机制，实现无需人工标注的图推理。
AI.result: 实验表明所提出的基于图注意力关系推理的方法在立面理解任务上表现优异，所提出的无标签机制有效弥补了标注数据不足的问题，并证明了GATv2在图结构立面推理中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了图注意力网络在进行建筑立面空间关系推理中的有效性，通过软分配机制获得可解释输出并对不规则设计具有鲁棒性，为无标注场景下的立面分析提供了可行路径。

title: How Useful Is Cross-Domain Generalization for Training LLM Monitors?
summary: Using prompted language models as classifiers enables classification in domains with limited training data, but misses some of the robustness and performance benefits that fine-tuning can bring. We study whether training on multiple classification tasks, each with its own prompt, improves performance on new domains with new classification prompts. We show that such training partially generalizes to adjacent domains, improving classification performance on tasks that are unseen during training. However, we identify specific edge cases where the fine-tuned models fail to follow prompts, such as when the classification prompt changes completely while the data domain remains the same as during training. We show that classification training can be mixed with general instruction following training, and that (when done well) such training keeps the benefits of classification training and mitigates its generalization failures. Surprisingly, we see that this no-thinking supervised classification training can generalize to with-thinking classification and summarization, suggesting that no-thinking classification training might be instrumentally useful in building other kinds of classifiers and monitoring systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多任务分类提示上微调语言模型能否泛化到新领域，发现其能部分泛化但存在提示遵循失败的问题，并进一步表明将分类训练与通用指令跟随训练混合可以缓解此类失败，同时监督式无思考分类训练还能意外地泛化到需思考的分类与摘要任务。
AI.motivation: 提示语言模型作为分类器虽能在标注数据稀缺的领域中使用，但缺乏微调所带来的鲁棒性与性能优势；现有研究尚未系统探索在多分类任务上微调是否能提升模型在新领域中的泛化能力及其局限性。
AI.method: 本文通过在多个分类任务上分别使用对应提示进行多任务微调，评估模型在新领域和新分类提示上的表现；进一步将分类训练与通用指令跟随训练混合，以在保留分类训练收益的同时缓解泛化失败问题。
AI.result: 多任务分类微调能部分泛化到相邻领域，提升未见任务的分类性能；但在分类提示完全改变而数据域不变时，模型无法遵循提示。将分类训练与指令跟随训练混合可保持分类性能并减少泛化失败。此外，无思考监督式分类训练能泛化到需思考的分类和摘要任务。
AI.conclusion: 分类训练与指令跟随训练的混合策略能有效兼顾分类性能与提示遵循能力；无思考分类训练的意外泛化能力暗示其在构建其他分类器与监控系统中的潜在工具性价值。

title: FIS-DiT: Breaking the Few-Step Video Inference Barrier via Training-Free Frame Interleaved Sparsity
summary: While the overall inference latency of Video Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) can be substantially reduced through model distillation, per-step inference latency remains a critical bottleneck. Existing acceleration paradigms primarily exploit redundancy across the denoising trajectory; however, we identify a limitation where these step-wise strategies encounter diminishing returns in few-step regimes. In such scenarios, the scarcity of temporal states prevents effective feature reuse or predictive modeling, creating a formidable barrier to further acceleration. To overcome this, we propose Frame Interleaved Sparsity DiT (FIS-DiT), a training-free and operator-agnostic framework that shifts the optimization focus from the temporal trajectory to the latent frame dimension. Our approach is motivated by an intrinsic duality within this dimension: the existence of frame-wise sparsity that permits reduced computation, coupled with a structural consistency where each frame position remains equally vital to the global spatiotemporal context. Leveraging this insight, we implement Frame Interleaved Sparsity (FIS) as an execution strategy that manipulates frame subsets across the model hierarchy, refreshing all latent positions without requiring full-scale block computation. Empirical evaluations on Wan 2.2 and HunyuanVideo 1.5 demonstrate that FIS-DiT consistently achieves 2.11--2.41$\times$ speedup with negligible degradation across VBench-Q and CLIP metrics, providing a scalable and robust pathway toward real-time high-definition video generation.

AI.tldr: 提出帧交错稀疏（FIS-DiT）方法，利用视频扩散Transformer中帧维度的固有稀疏性与结构一致性，在无需训练和算子修改的情况下，实现2.11–2.41倍推理加速并在视频生成质量上几乎无损。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散Transformer加速方法主要利用去噪轨迹维度上的冗余，但此类按步优化的策略在步数极少的推理场景中收益递减，因为时间状态稀缺导致特征复用和预测建模失效。现有方法忽略了帧维度上潜藏的加速潜力，成为实现实时高分辨率视频生成的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Frame Interleaved Sparsity DiT（FIS-DiT），一种无需训练、与算子无关的加速框架。其核心是利用帧维度上的双重特性：帧级稀疏性允许减少计算量，同时各帧位置具有结构一致的重要性。基于此，实现帧交错稀疏（FIS）执行策略，在模型层级中对帧子集进行交错操作，在不进行全尺度块计算的前提下刷新所有潜在帧位置。
AI.result: 在Wan 2.2和HunyuanVideo 1.5两个视频DiT模型上进行实验，FIS-DiT在VBench-Q和CLIP指标上仅产生可忽略的性能下降，同时实现2.11–2.41倍的推理加速。结果表明该方法在不同架构上具有强可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FIS-DiT通过将加速优化的焦点从时间轨迹转向潜在帧维度，有效突破了现有方法在少步推理场景下的瓶颈。该框架提供了可扩展且鲁棒的高清视频生成加速路径，为实时视频生成应用奠定了技术基础。

title: NARA: Anchor-Conditioned Relation-Aware Contextualization of Heterogeneous Geoentities
summary: Geospatial foundation models have primarily focused on raster data such as satellite imagery, where self-supervised learning has been widely studied. Vector geospatial data instead represent the world as discrete geoentities with explicit geometry, semantics, and structured spatial relations, including metric proximity and topological relationships. These relations jointly determine how entities interact within space, yet existing representation learning methods remain fragmented, often restricted to specific geometry types or partial spatial relations, limiting their ability to capture unified spatial context across heterogeneous geoentities. We propose NARA (Neural Anchor-conditioned Relation-Aware representation learning), a self-supervised framework for vector geoentities. NARA learns context-dependent representations by jointly modeling semantics, geometry, and spatial relations within a unified framework and captures relational spatial structure beyond proximity alone, enabling rich contextualized representations across heterogeneous geoentities of points, polylines, and polygons. Evaluation on building function classification, traffic speed prediction, and next point-of-interest recommendation shows consistent improvements over prior methods, highlighting the benefit of unified relational modeling for vector geospatial data.

AI.tldr: 提出NARA，一种面向矢量地理实体的自监督表示学习框架，通过神经锚定条件联合建模语义、几何与空间关系，在建筑功能分类、交通速度预测和兴趣点推荐任务上一致优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有矢量地理空间数据表示学习方法碎片化严重，通常局限于特定几何类型或仅建模部分空间关系（如单纯的距离度量），缺乏统一建模异质地理实体间语义、几何与结构化空间关系（包括度量邻近性和拓扑关系）的能力，难以捕捉统一的跨实体空间上下文。
AI.method: NARA（神经锚定条件关系感知表示学习）是一个自监督框架，通过神经锚定条件机制在统一框架中联合建模语义、几何与空间关系，超越单纯的邻近关系以捕获关系性空间结构，支持点、折线、多边形等异质矢量地理实体的上下文感知表示学习。
AI.result: 在建筑功能分类、交通速度预测和下一兴趣点推荐三个任务上的实验表明，NARA一致优于现有方法，验证了统一关系建模对矢量地理空间数据的显著提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了联合建模多种空间关系（而非仅依赖距离度量）对于矢量地理实体表示学习的重要性，为构建统一的地理空间基础模型提供了新方向，尤其适用于需要理解复杂空间交互的下游应用。

title: $h$-control: Training-Free Camera Control via Block-Conditional Gibbs Refinement
summary: Training-free camera control for pretrained flow-matching video generators is a partial-observation inverse problem: a depth-warped guidance video supplies noisy evidence on a subset of latent sites, which the sampler must reconcile with the pretrained prior. Existing methods struggle to balance the trade-off between trajectory adherence and visual quality and the heuristic guidance-strength tuning lacks robustness. We propose \textbf{$h$-control}, which resolves this dilemma through a structural change to the sampler: each outer hard-replacement guidance step is augmented with an inner-loop \emph{block-conditional pseudo-Gibbs refinement} on the unobserved complement at the same noise level, with provable convergence to the partial-observation conditional data law. To accelerate convergence on high-dimensional video latents, we exploit their conditional locality, partitioning the unobserved complement into 3D patches, each tracked by a custom mixing indicator that adaptively freezes converged patches. On RealEstate10K and DAVIS, \textbf{$h$-control} attains the best FVD against all seven training-free and training-based competitors, outperforming every training-free baseline on every reported metric.

AI.tldr: 提出 h-control，通过将每个外循环硬替换引导步骤与内循环块条件伪吉布斯细化结合，在无需训练的条件下实现了流匹配视频生成器中相机轨迹控制与视觉质量之间的最优平衡，在 RealEstate10K 和 DAVIS 上 FVD 超越所有七种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有针对预训练流匹配视频生成器的免训练相机控制方法面临部分观测逆问题中轨迹遵循度与视觉质量之间的权衡困境，且启发式引导强度调参缺乏鲁棒性，亟需一种能够从根本上解决该权衡的结构性方法。
AI.method: 提出 h-control 框架，在外循环硬替换引导步骤中嵌入内循环块条件伪吉布斯细化，对未观测补集在同一噪声水平上进行迭代精化，并证明其收敛到部分观测条件数据分布；针对高维视频潜变量的收敛加速，利用条件局部性将未观测补集划分为 3D 块，每个块由自适应混合指示器跟踪，在收敛后冻结该块的更新。
AI.result: 在 RealEstate10K 和 DAVIS 数据集上，h-control 在 FVD 指标上达到最优，超越了所有七种免训练与基于训练的竞争对手，并且在所有报告的指标上均优于每一种免训练基线方法。
AI.conclusion: h-control 通过结构性采样器改动而非启发式调参，从根本上解决了免训练相机控制中轨迹遵循与视觉质量之间的权衡问题，其收敛性保证和自适应块冻结机制为高维视频潜变量的高效条件采样提供了有效范式。

title: Executable Agentic Memory for GUI Agent
summary: Modern GUI agents typically rely on a model-centric and step-wise interaction paradigm, where LLMs must re-interpret the UI and re-decide actions at every screen, which is fragile in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose Executable Agentic Memory (EAM), a structured Knowledge Graph (KG) that shifts GUI planning from free-form generation to a robust retrieval-and-execution process. Our approach includes a sample-efficient memory construction pipeline using state-aware DFS and action-group mining to compress multi-step routines. To ensure efficient planning, we introduce a value-guided graph search where a lightweight Q-function model steers Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) over the KG. We theoretically establish bias-consistency for the Q-model and derive sample complexity bounds for path recovery. Empirically, EAM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines like UI-TARS-7B by up to $19.6\%$ on AndroidWorld, while reducing token costs $6\times$ relative to GPT-4o. With a $2.8$s average latency, EAM enables reliable, quick, and long-horizon GUI automation.

AI.tldr: 提出可执行智能体记忆（EAM），一种结构化知识图谱，将GUI智能体的规划从自由文本生成转变为检索-执行流程，通过状态感知DFS、动作组挖掘和价值引导的MCTS，在AndroidWorld上以2.8秒平均延迟和6倍token成本降低实现高达19.6%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体通常采用以模型为中心的逐步交互范式，LLM在每屏都需要重新解释UI和重新决策，这种自由生成的方式在长程任务中表现脆弱，缺乏稳健性和效率。
AI.method: 提出可执行智能体记忆（EAM），一种结构化知识图谱，将GUI规划从自由文本生成转变为检索-执行流程；构建阶段采用状态感知DFS和动作组挖掘实现样本高效的记忆压缩；规划阶段引入价值引导的图搜索，通过轻量级Q函数模型引导蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）对KG进行探索，并理论证明了Q模型的偏差一致性及路径恢复的样本复杂度界。
AI.result: EAM在AndroidWorld上以2.8秒平均延迟超越UI-TARS-7B等最强基线高达19.6%，同时相对GPT-4o降低6倍token成本，实现了可靠、快速且支持长程任务的GUI自动化。
AI.conclusion: EAM通过结构化记忆和检索-执行范式有效解决了长程GUI任务中LLM逐步规划的脆弱性问题，在性能、延迟和成本上均取得显著优势，为GUI智能体提供了一种更高效可靠的范式。

title: Few-Shot Synthetic Data Generation with Diffusion Models for Downstream Vision Tasks
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Accepted at SynData4CV Workshop @ CVPR 2026
summary:
Class imbalance is a persistent challenge in visual recognition, particularly in safety-critical domains where collecting positive examples is expensive and rare events are inherently underrepresented. We propose a lightweight synthetic data augmentation pipeline that fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on as few as 20-50 real images of a rare class and uses a pretrained diffusion model to generate synthetic samples for training.
  We systematically vary the synthetic-to-real ratio and evaluate the approach across two structurally different domains: chest X-ray pathology classification (NIH ChestX-ray14) and industrial surface crack detection (Magnetic Tile Defect dataset). All evaluations are performed on held-out sets of real images only.
  Across both domains, synthetic augmentation consistently improves rare-class recall and F1 compared to training with real data alone. Performance improves with moderate synthetic augmentation and shows diminishing returns as the synthetic ratio increases.
  These results suggest that LoRA-adapted diffusion models provide a simple and scalable mechanism for augmenting rare classes, enabling effective learning in data-scarce scenarios across heterogeneous visual domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级合成数据增强流水线，通过LoRA微调扩散模型（仅需20-50张真实图像）为罕见类别生成合成训练样本，在胸部X光病理分类和工业表面裂纹检测两个异构领域上一致提升了罕见类的召回率和F1分数，表明该方法是一种简单可扩展的数据稀缺场景下的增强机制。
AI.motivation: 视觉识别中类别不平衡问题长期存在，尤其在安全关键领域，收集正样本成本高昂且罕见事件天然欠表征，现有方法难以在数据极度稀缺场景下有效学习罕见类别。
AI.method: 提出一种轻量级合成数据增强流水线：首先在少量（20-50张）罕见类真实图像上微调LoRA适配器，然后利用预训练扩散模型生成合成样本，最后将合成样本按不同比例与真实数据混合用于训练分类器，系统性地变化合成-真实数据比例并在两个异构领域上评估。
AI.result: 在NIH ChestX-ray14胸部X光病理分类和Magnetic Tile Defect工业表面裂纹检测两个数据集上，合成增强一致提升了罕见类的召回率和F1分数；适度的合成增强带来性能提升，但随合成比例增加出现边际效益递减。
AI.conclusion: LoRA适配的扩散模型提供了一种简单且可扩展的罕见类增强机制，能够在数据稀缺场景下跨异构视觉领域实现有效学习，为安全关键领域的实际部署提供了实用方案。

title: LISA: Cognitive Arbitration for Signal-Free Autonomous Intersection Management
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) show strong potential for Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), particularly in tasks requiring situational reasoning and multi-agent coordination. These capabilities make them well suited for cooperative driving, where rule-based approaches struggle in complex and dynamic traffic environments. Intersection management remains especially challenging due to conflicting right-of-way demands, heterogeneous vehicle priorities, and vehicle-specific kinematic constraints that must be resolved in real time. However, existing approaches typically use LLMs as auxiliary components on top of signal-based systems rather than as primary decision-makers. Signal controllers remain vehicle-agnostic, reservation-based methods lack intent awareness, and recent LLM-based systems still depend on signal infrastructure. In addition, LLM inference latency limits their use in sub-second control settings.
  We propose LISA (LLM-Based Intent-Driven Speed Advisory), a signal-free cognitive arbitration framework for autonomous intersection management. LISA uses an LLM to reason over declared vehicle intents, incorporating priority classes, queue pressure, and energy preferences. We evaluate LISA against fixed-cycle control, SCATS, AIM, and GLOSA across varying traffic loads. Results show that LISA reduces mean control delay by up to 89.1% and maintains Level of Service C while all non-LLM baselines degrade to Level of Service F. Under near-saturated demand, LISA reduces mean waiting time by 93% and peak queue length by 60.6% relative to fixed-cycle control. It also lowers fuel consumption by up to 48.8% and achieves 86.2% intent satisfaction, compared to 61.2% for the best non-LLM method. These results demonstrate that LLM-based reasoning can enable real-time, signal-free intersection management.

AI.tldr: LISA (LLM-Based Intent-Driven Speed Advisory) 提出一种基于大语言模型的信号无关认知仲裁框架，用于自主交叉口管理，通过推理车辆声明的意图、优先级和能耗偏好替代传统信号控制，在延迟、排队长度和油耗等关键指标上显著优于固定周期控制、SCATS、AIM 和 GLOSA 等基线方法。
AI.motivation: 交叉口管理因存在冲突的路权需求、异构车辆优先级和实时运动学约束而极具挑战性；现有方法中，信号控制器与车辆无关、基于预留的方法缺乏意图感知，且基于 LLM 的系统仍依赖信号基础设施，未能将 LLM 作为主要决策者；同时 LLM 推理延迟此前被认为限制了其在亚秒级控制场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出 LISA，一种基于 LLM 的意图驱动速度建议框架，采用信号无关的认知仲裁方式管理自主交叉口；LLM 对车辆声明的行驶意图进行推理，综合考虑优先级类别、队列压力和能耗偏好，输出速度建议以协调车辆通过交叉口，无需任何信号灯基础设施。
AI.result: 在不同交通负载下，LISA 平均控制延迟降低最多 89.1%，在非 LLM 基线降至服务水平 F 时仍保持服务水平 C；在接近饱和需求下，平均等待时间减少 93%，峰值队列长度减少 60.6%，燃油消耗降低最多 48.8%；意图满意度达 86.2%，优于最佳非 LLM 方法的 61.2%。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，基于 LLM 的推理能够实现实时、无信号灯的交叉口管理，在效率、能耗和意图满足方面全面超越传统信号控制与先进自适应方法，为 LLM 作为自主交通系统中的核心决策者提供了有力证据。

title: Cluster-Aware Neural Collapse Prompt Tuning for Long-Tailed Generalization of Vision-Language Models
summary: Prompt learning has emerged as an efficient alternative to fine-tuning pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs). Despite its promise, current methods still struggle to maintain tail-class discriminability when adapting to class-imbalanced datasets. In this work, we propose cluster-aware neural collapse prompt tuning (CPT), which enhances the discriminability of tail classes in prompt-tuned VLMs without sacrificing their overall generalization. First, we design a cluster-invariant space by mining semantic assignments from the pre-trained VLM and mapping them to prompt-tuned features. This computes cluster-level boundaries and restricts the constraints to local neighborhoods, which reduces interference with the global semantic structure of the pre-trained VLM. Second, we introduce neural-collapse-driven discriminability optimization with three losses: textual Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) separation loss, class-wise convergence loss, and rotation stabilization loss. These losses work together to shape intra-cluster geometry for better inter-class separation and intra-class alignment. Extensive experiments on 11 diverse datasets demonstrate that CPT outperforms SOTA methods, with stronger performance on long-tail classes and good generalization to unseen classes.

AI.tldr: 提出聚类感知神经崩溃提示调优（CPT），通过聚类不变空间和神经崩溃驱动的判别性优化，在不牺牲整体泛化能力的前提下增强提示调优的视觉-语言模型在类别不平衡数据上的尾类判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的提示学习方法在将预训练视觉-语言模型（VLM）适配到类别不平衡数据集时，难以保持尾类（tail-class）的判别性，导致模型在长尾分布下的分类性能下降。
AI.method: 提出聚类感知神经崩溃提示调优（CPT），包含两个核心组件：一是通过挖掘预训练VLM的语义分配并映射到提示调优特征来构建聚类不变空间，计算聚类级边界并将约束限制在局部邻域以减少对全局语义结构的干扰；二是引入神经崩溃驱动的判别性优化，包含文本等角紧框架（ETF）分离损失、类内收敛损失和旋转稳定损失三个损失函数，共同塑造聚类内几何结构以改善类间分离和类内对齐。
AI.result: 在11个不同数据集上的大量实验表明，CPT在整体性能和长尾类表现上均优于现有最先进方法，同时能较好地泛化到未见类别。
AI.conclusion: CPT通过结合聚类不变空间设计与神经崩溃损失优化，有效解决了提示调优下类别不平衡场景中的尾类判别性问题，为长尾分布下VLM的高效适配提供了新思路。

title: Towards Automated Air Traffic Safety Assessment Around Non-Towered Airports Using Large Language Models
comment: 25 pages, 17 figures, 5 tables, Accepted to AIAA 2026
summary: We investigate frameworks for post-flight safety analysis at non-towered airports using large language models (LLMs). Non-towered airports rely on the Common Traffic Advisory Frequency (CTAF) for air traffic coordination and experience frequent near mid-air collisions due to the pilot self-announcement communication protocol. We propose a general vision-language model (VLM) approach to analyze the transcribed CTAF radio communications in natural language, METeorological Aerodrome Report (METAR) weather data, Automatic Dependent Surveillance-Broadcast (ADS-B) flight trajectories, and Visual Flight Rules sectional charts of the airfield. We provide a preliminary study at Half Moon Bay Airport, with a qualitative real world case study and a quantitative evaluation using a new synthetic dataset of communications and weather modalities. We qualitatively evaluate our framework on real flight data using Gemini 2.5 Pro, demonstrating accurate identification of a right-of-way violation. The synthetic dataset is derived from real examples and includes a 12-category hazard taxonomy, and is used to benchmark three open-source (Qwen 2.5-7B, Mistral-7B, Gemma-2-9B) and three closed-source (GPT-4o, GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6) LLM models on the subset of inputs related to CTAF and METAR. Even limited to CTAF and METAR inputs and open source LLMs, instances of our framework typically achieve a macro F1 score above 0.85 on a binary nominal/danger classification task. Future work includes a quantitative evaluation across all modalities and a larger number of real world examples. Taken together, our results suggest that VLM analysis of safety at non-towered airports may be a valuable future capability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于视觉-语言模型(VLM)的多模态框架，用于非管制机场的飞行后安全分析，通过整合CTAF无线电通信转录文本、METAR气象数据、ADS-B飞行轨迹和VFR航图，能够自动识别飞行安全违规行为，并在二元分类任务中取得宏观F1超过0.85的性能。
AI.motivation: 非管制机场依赖CTAF协议进行空中交通协调，由于飞行员自通报通信协议的限制，近距空中碰撞事件频发，而现有的安全分析缺乏自动化、多模态的智能分析方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种通用VLM框架，输入包括CTAF无线电通信的转录文本、METAR气象数据、ADS-B飞行轨迹和VFR航图四种模态数据；在半月湾机场开展初步研究，构建了包含12类危险分类体系的合成数据集，并基于Gemini 2.5 Pro进行真实数据定性评估，同时在CTAF和METAR输入子集上对Qwen 2.5-7B、Mistral-7B、Gemma-2-9B三种开源模型和GPT-4o、GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6三种闭源模型进行定量基准测试。
AI.result: Gemini 2.5 Pro在真实飞行数据上成功识别出一起通行权违规事件；在CTAF和METAR输入子集的二元名义/危险分类任务中，开源模型版本的框架典型宏观F1分数超过0.85。
AI.conclusion: VLM对非管制机场进行安全分析是一种具有潜在价值的未来能力，但尚需在所有模态上进行定量评估并扩展更多真实样例。

title: Reinforcing VLAs in Task-Agnostic World Models
summary: Post-training Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models via reinforcement learning (RL) in learned world models has emerged as an effective strategy to adapt to new tasks without costly real-world interactions. However, while using imagined trajectories reduces the sample complexity of policy training, existing methods still heavily rely on task-specific data to fine-tune both the world and reward models, fundamentally limiting their scalability to unseen tasks. To overcome this, we argue that world and reward models should capture transferable physical priors that enable zero-shot inference. We propose RAW-Dream (Reinforcing VLAs in task-Agnostic World Dreams), a new paradigm that completely disentangles world model learning from downstream task dependencies. RAW-Dream utilizes a world model pre-trained on diverse task-free behaviors for predicting future rollouts, and an off-the-shelf Vision-Language Model (VLM) for reward generation. Because both components are task-agnostic, VLAs can be readily finetuned for any new task entirely within this zero-shot imagination. Furthermore, to mitigate world model hallucinations, we introduce a dual-noise verification mechanism to filter out unreliable rollouts. Extensive experiments across simulation and real-world settings demonstrate consistent performance gains, proving that generalized physical priors can effectively substitute for costly task-dependent data, offering a highly scalable roadmap for VLA adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出RAW-Dream范式，通过任务无关的世界模型预训练和现成VLM奖励生成，实现VLA模型在零样本想象轨迹中的强化学习微调，无需下游任务依赖数据。
AI.motivation: 现有基于世界模型的VLA后训练方法虽降低了策略学习的样本复杂度，但仍依赖任务特定数据来微调世界模型和奖励模型，这从根本上限制了方法对未见任务的扩展性，缺乏可迁移的物理先验以实现零样本推理。
AI.method: RAW-Dream将世界模型学习与下游任务依赖完全解耦：世界模型在多样化任务无关行为数据上预训练以预测未来轨迹，奖励生成则使用现成VLM实现零样本奖励评估；同时引入双重噪声验证机制过滤不可靠的想象轨迹，缓解世界模型幻觉问题。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界的广泛实验中，RAW-Dream持续取得性能提升，证明了通用物理先验可以有效替代昂贵的任务依赖数据，为VLA适应提供高可扩展性的技术路线。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明通过任务无关的世界模型和VLM奖励生成，可以在完全零样本的想象环境中高效微调VLA策略，消除对下游任务数据的依赖，为后训练VLA模型的规模化部署与泛化提供了新范式。

title: Chronicles-OCR: A Cross-Temporal Perception Benchmark for the Evolutionary Trajectory of Chinese Characters
summary: Vision Large Language Models (VLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in modern text-rich visual understanding. However, their perceptual robustness in the face of the continuous morphological evolution of historical writing systems remains largely unexplored. Existing ancient text datasets typically focus on isolated historical periods, failing to capture the systematic visual distribution shifts spanning thousands of years. To bridge this gap and empower Digital Humanities, we introduce Chronicles-OCR, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the cross-temporal visual perception capabilities of VLLMs across the complete evolutionary trajectory of Chinese characters, known as the Seven Chinese Scripts. Curated in collaboration with top-tier institutional domain experts, the dataset comprises 2,800 strictly balanced images encompassing highly diverse physical media, ranging from tortoise shells to paper-based calligraphy. To accommodate the drastic morphological and topological variations across different historical stages, we propose a novel Stage-Adaptive Annotation Paradigm. Based on this, Chronicles-OCR formulates four rigorous quantitative tasks: cross-period character spotting, fine-grained archaic character recognition via visual referring, ancient text parsing, and script classification. By isolating visual perception from semantic reasoning, Chronicles-OCR provides an authoritative platform to expose the limitations of current VLLMs, paving the way for robust, evolution-aware historical text perception. Chronicles-OCR is publicly available at https://github.com/VirtualLUOUCAS/Chronicles-OCR.

AI.tldr: Chronicles-OCR是首个专门评估视觉大语言模型(VLLMs)跨时间轴视觉感知能力的基准数据集，覆盖汉字从甲骨文到现代楷书的七种字体演变轨迹，通过2,800张平衡图像和四项严谨量化任务揭示了当前VLLMs在历史文字形态演化下的感知局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLLMs在文本丰富的视觉理解任务中取得了显著成功，但其面对历史书写系统持续形态演化的感知鲁棒性尚未被探索。现有古文字数据集通常聚焦孤立历史时期，无法捕捉跨越数千年的系统性视觉分布偏移，亟需一个能够系统评估VLLMs跨时间视觉感知能力的基准。
AI.method: 与顶级机构领域专家合作，构建了包含2,800张严格平衡图像的Chronicles-OCR数据集，覆盖从龟甲到纸本书法的多种物理介质。提出阶段自适应标注范式(Stage-Adaptive Annotation Paradigm)以适应不同历史阶段的剧烈形态和拓扑变化，并设计了四项量化任务：跨时期字符定位、基于视觉指代的细粒度古文字识别、古文本解析以及字体分类。
AI.result: Chronicles-OCR通过将视觉感知与语义推理分离，提供了一个权威平台来暴露当前VLLMs在跨时间古文字理解上的局限性，实验结果表明现有模型难以应对汉字在数千年演化中产生的系统性视觉分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了当前VLLMs在应对历史文字形态演化方面的显著不足，为数字人文领域提供了鲁棒的、具有演化感知能力的历史文本感知评估平台，为后续开发进化感知型视觉模型奠定了基础。

title: ProfiliTable: Profiling-Driven Tabular Data Processing via Agentic Workflows
summary: Table processing-including cleaning, transformation, augmentation, and matching-is a foundational yet error-prone stage in real-world data pipelines. While recent LLM-based approaches show promise for automating such tasks, they often struggle in practice due to ambiguous instructions, complex task structures, and the lack of structured feedback, resulting in syntactically correct but semantically flawed code. To address these challenges, we propose ProfiliTable, an autonomous multi-agent framework centered on dynamic profiling, which constructs and iteratively refines a unified execution context through interactive exploration, knowledge-augmented synthesis, and feedback-driven refinement. ProfiliTable integrates (i) a Profiler that performs ReAct-style data exploration to build semantic understanding, (ii) a Generator that retrieves curated operators to synthesize task-aware code, and (iii) an Evaluator-Summarizer loop that injects execution scores and diagnostic insights to enable closed-loop refinement. Extensive experiments on a diverse benchmark covering 18 tabular task types demonstrate that ProfiliTable consistently outperforms strong baselines, particularly in complex multi-step scenarios. These results highlight the critical role of dynamic profiling in reliably translating ambiguous user intents into robust and governance-compliant table transformations.

AI.tldr: ProfiliTable是一个基于动态画像的自主多智能体框架，通过交互式探索、知识增强合成和反馈驱动精炼，将模糊的用户意图转化为鲁棒且合规的表格转换代码，在涵盖18种表格任务类型的基准测试中持续优于强基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现实数据管道中的表格处理（如清洗、变换、增强和匹配）是基础但易出错的环节，现有基于LLM的方法因指令模糊、任务结构复杂以及缺乏结构化反馈，往往生成语法正确但语义错误的代码，难以可靠地自动化复杂表格处理任务。
AI.method: ProfiliTable提出一个自主多智能体框架，核心是动态画像机制，包含三个组件：(i) Profiler，执行ReAct风格的数据探索以构建语义理解；(ii) Generator，检索精选算子以合成任务感知代码；(iii) Evaluator-Summarizer循环，注入执行分数和诊断见解以实现闭环精炼；三者协同构建并迭代优化统一的执行上下文。
AI.result: 在涵盖18种表格任务类型的多样化基准测试上进行的大量实验表明，ProfiliTable在整体性能上持续优于强基线方法，尤其在复杂多步骤场景中表现更为突出。
AI.conclusion: 动态画像机制对于将模糊的用户意图可靠地转化为鲁棒且合规的表格变换至关重要，该框架展示了通过交互式探索和闭环反馈提升LLM自动化表格处理能力的关键路径。

title: Optimizing 4D Wires for Sparse 3D Abstraction
summary: We present a unified framework for 3D geometric abstraction using a single continuous 4D wire, parameterized as a B-spline with spatial coordinates and variable width $(x,y,z,w)$. Existing approaches typically represent shapes as collections of many independent curve segments, which often leads to fragmented structures and limited physical realizability. In contrast, we show that a single continuous spline is sufficiently expressive to capture complex volumetric forms while enforcing global topological coherence. By imposing continuity, our method transforms 3D sketching from a local density-accumulation process into a global routing problem, providing a strong inductive bias toward cleaner aesthetics and improved structural coherence. To enable gradient-based optimization, we introduce a differentiable rendering pipeline that efficiently rasterizes variable-width curves with bounded projection error. This formulation supports robust optimization using modern guidance signals such as Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) or CLIP. We demonstrate applications including image-to-3D abstraction, multi-view wire art generation, and differentiable stylized surface filling. Experiments show that our unified representation produces structures with higher semantic fidelity and improved structural coherence compared to approaches based on collections of discrete curves.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于单条连续4D B样条曲线（包含空间坐标和可变宽度）的统一3D几何抽象框架，将3D草图建模从局部密度累积转化为全局路由问题，并通过可微渲染管线支持梯度优化，在图像到3D抽象、多视图线艺术生成等任务中实现更高语义保真度和结构连贯性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D几何抽象方法通常将形状表示为多条独立曲线段的集合，导致结构碎片化且物理可实现性受限；缺乏一种既能表达复杂体积形态又能保持全局拓扑连贯性的统一连续表示。
AI.method: 提出一种参数化为4D B样条（空间坐标(x,y,z)加可变宽度w）的单条连续曲线框架，通过强制性连续性约束将3D草图建模转化为全局路由问题；并引入可微渲染管线，通过高效栅格化可变宽度曲线并控制投影误差，支持基于Score Distillation Sampling (SDS)或CLIP等现代引导信号的梯度优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该统一表示在图像到3D抽象、多视图线艺术生成和可微风格化表面填充等应用场景中，相比基于离散曲线集合的方法，生成了具有更高语义保真度和更优结构连贯性的输出。
AI.conclusion: 单条连续4D样条曲线足以捕捉复杂体积形态并提供全局拓扑连贯性，将3D抽象重新定义为路由问题带来了更清洁的美学效果和更强的结构归纳偏置，为物理可实现的3D几何抽象提供了新范式。

title: Formalize, Don't Optimize: The Heuristic Trap in LLM-Generated Combinatorial Solvers
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to solve complex combinatorial problems through direct reasoning, so recent neuro-symbolic systems increasingly use them to synthesize executable solvers. A central design question is how the LLM should represent the solver, and whether it should also attempt to optimize search. We introduce CP-SynC-XL, a benchmark of 100 combinatorial problems (4,577 instances), and evaluate three solver-construction paradigms: native algorithmic search (Python), constraint modeling through a Python solver API (Python + OR-Tools), and declarative constraint modeling (MiniZinc + OR-Tools). We find a consistent representational divergence: Python + OR-Tools attains the highest correctness across LLMs, while MiniZinc + OR-Tools has lower absolute coverage despite using the same OR-Tools back-end. Native Python is the most likely to return a schema-valid solution that fails verification, whereas solver-backed paths preserve higher conditional fidelity. On the heuristic axis, prompting for search optimization yields only small median speed-ups (1.03-1.12x) and a strongly bimodal effect: many instances slow down, and correctness drops sharply on a long tail of problems. A paired code-level audit traces these regressions to a recurring heuristic trap. Under an efficiency-oriented prompt, the LLM may replace complete search with local approximations (Python), inject unverified bounds (Python + OR-Tools), or add redundant declarative machinery that overwhelms or over-constrains the model (MiniZinc + OR-Tools). These findings support a conservative design principle for LLM-generated combinatorial solvers: use the LLM primarily to formalize variables, constraints, and objectives for verified solvers, and separately check any LLM-authored search optimization before use.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建CP-SynC-XL基准（100个组合问题，4,577个实例），系统评估了三种LLM驱动的求解器构建范式（原生Python算法搜索、Python+OR-Tools约束建模、MiniZinc+OR-Tools声明式建模），发现Python+OR-Tools取得了最高正确率，而提示LLM优化搜索仅带来微小的中位加速（1.03-1.12倍）且伴随显著的正确率下降，揭示了LLM生成的搜索优化存在"启发式陷阱"问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在直接推理复杂组合问题方面存在困难，因此神经符号系统越来越多地利用LLM来合成可执行的求解器，但核心设计问题在于LLM应如何表示求解器以及是否应尝试优化搜索，目前缺乏对不同求解器构建范式在正确性和搜索优化有效性方面的系统比较评估。
AI.method: 作者构建了CP-SynC-XL基准测试集，包含100个组合问题（4,577个实例），系统评估了三种求解器构建范式：原生Python算法搜索、通过Python求解器API进行约束建模（Python+OR-Tools）、以及声明式约束建模（MiniZinc+OR-Tools），并在不同LLM上测试了这些范式的正确性和搜索优化效果。
AI.result: Python+OR-Tools在所有LLM中取得了最高的正确率，而MiniZinc+OR-Tools尽管使用相同的OR-Tools后端，绝对覆盖率却较低；原生Python最可能返回模式有效但验证失败的解决方案，而基于求解器的路径保持了更高的条件保真度；在搜索优化方面，提示LLM优化搜索仅带来1.03-1.12x的中位加速，但效果呈强烈双峰分布——许多实例反而变慢，且在一长尾问题中正确率急剧下降；代码级审计将这些问题归因于重复出现的"启发式陷阱"：LLM可能用局部近似替代完全搜索、注入未经验证的边界约束、或添加冗余声明式机制导致模型过约束。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，对于LLM生成的组合求解器应采用保守设计原则：主要利用LLM来形式化变量、约束和目标以用于经过验证的求解器，而对LLM撰写的搜索优化应单独检查后再使用，不能直接信任LLM自动生成的搜索优化策略。

title: EDGER: EDge-Guided with HEatmap Refinement for Generalizable Image Forgery Localization
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 14th International Symposium on Information and Communication Technology (SOICT 2025)
summary: Text-guided inpainting has made image forgery increasingly realistic, challenging both SID and IFL. However, existing methods often struggle to point out suspicious signals across domains. To address this problem, we propose EDGER, a patch-based, dual-branch framework that localizes manipulated regions in arbitrary resolution images without sacrificing native resolution. The first branch, Edge-Guided Segmentation, introduces a Frequency-based Edge Detector to emphasize high-frequency inconsistencies at manipulation boundaries, and fine-tunes a SegFormer to fuse RGB and edge features for pixel-level masks. Since edge evidence is most informative only when patches contain both authentic and manipulated pixels, we complement Edge-Guided Segmentation with a Synthetic Heatmapping branch, a classification-based localizer that fine-tunes a CLIP-ViT image encoder with LoRA to flag fully synthetic patches. Together, Synthetic Heatmapping provides coarse, patch-level synthetic priors, while Edge-Guided Segmentation sharpens boundaries within partially manipulated patches, yielding comprehensive localization. Evaluated in the MediaEval 2025, SynthIM challenge, Manipulated Region Localization Task's setting, our approach scales to multi-megapixel imagery and exhibits strong cross-domain generalization. Extensive ablations highlight the complementary roles of frequency-based edge cues and patch-level synthetic priors in driving accurate, resolution-agnostic localization.

AI.tldr: EDGER 提出一种基于补丁的双分支框架，结合边缘引导分割（利用频域边缘检测器增强操作边界高频不一致性）与合成热图分支（基于 CLIP-ViT 和 LoRA 分类完全合成补丁），实现了跨域、分辨率无关的图像伪造区域定位。
AI.motivation: 文本引导的修复技术使图像伪造日益逼真，给拼接图像检测和图像伪造定位带来了严峻挑战，现有方法难以跨域捕捉可疑信号。
AI.method: EDGER 采用双分支架构：边缘引导分割分支引入基于频域的边缘检测器以增强操作边界处的高频不一致性，并微调 SegFormer 融合 RGB 与边缘特征生成像素级掩码；合成热图分支通过 LoRA 微调 CLIP-ViT 图像编码器，对完全合成的补丁进行粗粒度的分类定位。两分支协同，合成热图提供补丁级先验，边缘引导分割在部分操纵补丁内锐化边界。
AI.result: 在 MediaEval 2025 SynthIM 挑战的操纵区域定位任务中，EDGER 可扩展至多百万像素图像，展现出强大的跨域泛化能力。大量消融实验验证了频域边缘线索与补丁级合成先验在实现精确且分辨率无关定位方面的互补作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了频域边缘特征与补丁级合成先验在图像伪造定位中的互补有效性，为任意分辨率下的跨域检测提供了一种通用且可扩展的框架。

title: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal execution paths. This difficulty stems from the scarcity of high-quality interleaved GUI-Tool trajectories, the cost and brittleness of collecting real tool trajectories, and the lack of trajectory-level supervision for GUI-Tool path selection. In this paper, we propose ToolCUA, an end-to-end agent designed to learn optimal GUI-Tool path selection through a staged training paradigm. We first introduce an Interleaved GUI-Tool Trajectory Scaling Pipeline that repurposes abundant static GUI trajectories and synthesizes a grounded tool library, enabling diverse GUI-Tool trajectories without manual engineering or real tool-trajectory collection. We then perform Tool-Bootstrapped GUI RFT, combining warmup SFT with single-turn RL to improve decisions at critical GUI-Tool switching points. Finally, we optimize ToolCUA with Online Agentic RL in a high-fidelity GUI-Tool environment, guided by a Tool-Efficient Path Reward that encourages appropriate tool use and shorter execution paths. Experiments on OSWorld-MCP show that ToolCUA achieves 46.85% accuracy, a relative improvement of approximately 66% over the baseline, establishing a new state of the art among models of comparable scale. It also improves by 3.9% over GUI-only settings, demonstrating effective GUI-Tool orchestration. The results further suggest that training in a hybrid action space is a promising paradigm for real-world digital agents. Open-sourced here: https://x-plug.github.io/ToolCUA/

AI.tldr: ToolCUA提出了一种端到端智能体，通过分阶段训练范式（包括交错轨迹扩展、工具引导的GUI强化微调以及在线智能体强化学习）学习在GUI操作和API工具调用之间进行最优路径选择，在OSWorld-MCP基准上达到46.85%的准确率，相比基线提升了约66%。
AI.motivation: 计算机使用智能体（CUA）在混合动作空间中既需要执行原子级GUI操作（如点击、输入）又需要执行高层工具调用（如基于API的文件操作），但缺乏高质量的交错GUI-工具轨迹、收集真实工具轨迹成本高昂且脆弱、以及缺乏轨迹级别的路径选择监督，导致智能体常在何时继续GUI操作与何时切换工具之间犹豫不决，从而产生次优的执行路径。
AI.method: ToolCUA采用三阶段训练范式：首先提出交错GUI-工具轨迹扩展管道，通过复用大量静态GUI轨迹并合成基础工具库，无需人工工程或真实工具轨迹收集即可生成多样化的交错GUI-工具轨迹；然后进行工具引导的GUI强化微调（Tool-Bootstrapped GUI RFT），结合热身阶段的监督微调和单步强化学习来改善关键GUI-工具切换点的决策；最后在高保真GUI-工具环境中使用在线智能体强化学习进行优化，由工具高效路径奖励引导，鼓励适当的工具使用和更短的执行路径。
AI.result: 在OSWorld-MCP基准上，ToolCUA达到了46.85%的准确率，相比基线实现了约66%的相对提升，在同规模模型中取得了新的最优结果。同时，相比纯GUI操作的设置提升了3.9%，验证了有效的GUI-工具编排能力。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，在混合动作空间中训练是构建真实世界数字智能体的有前景范式，ToolCUA通过分阶段训练有效解决了GUI-工具路径选择问题，为后续研究提供了开源实现。

title: Robust Promptable Video Object Segmentation
summary: The performance of promptable video object segmentation (PVOS) models substantially degrades under input corruptions, which prevents PVOS deployment in safety-critical domains. This paper offers the first comprehensive study on robust PVOS (RobustPVOS). We first construct a new, comprehensive benchmark with two real-world evaluation datasets of 351 video clips and more than 2,500 object masks under real-world adverse conditions. At the same time, we generate synthetic training data by applying diverse and temporally varying corruptions to existing VOS datasets. Moreover, we present a new RobustPVOS method, dubbed Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation (MoGA). The key to successfully performing RobustPVOS is two-fold: effectively handling object-specific degradation and ensuring temporal consistency in predictions. MoGA leverages object-specific representations maintained in memory across frames to condition the robustification process, which allows the model to handle each tracked object differently in a temporally consistent way. Extensive experiments on our benchmark validate MoGA's efficacy, showing consistent and significant improvements across diverse corruption types on both synthetic and real-world datasets, establishing a strong baseline for future RobustPVOS research. Our benchmark is publicly available at https://sohyun-l.github.io/RobustPVOS_project_page/.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究鲁棒性提示视频目标分割（RobustPVOS），构建了包含真实世界退化条件和合成训练数据的综合基准，并提出基于记忆目标条件门控秩适配（MoGA）方法，通过对象特定表示和时序一致性机制显著提升了模型在多种输入损坏下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有提示视频目标分割（PVOS）模型在输入受到损坏时性能显著下降，这阻碍了其在安全关键领域的实际部署，而该问题此前缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 本文构建了包含351个视频片段和超过2500个目标掩码的真实世界退化评估数据集，并通过施加多样且时变的合成损坏生成训练数据；同时提出Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation（MoGA）方法，利用跨帧记忆中维护的目标特定表征来调节鲁棒化过程，从而以时序一致的方式差异化处理每个跟踪目标。
AI.result: 在提出的综合基准上进行的大量实验表明，MoGA在合成和真实世界数据集上的多种损坏类型中均取得了一致且显著的性能提升，为该研究方向建立了强基线。
