AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了PVOS模型在输入损坏下性能严重退化的问题，表明有效处理目标特定退化并保证预测的时序一致性是鲁棒PVOS成功的关键，为未来研究提供了基准和方法基础。

title: OmniHumanoid: Streaming Cross-Embodiment Video Generation with Paired-Free Adaptation
summary: Cross-embodiment video generation aims to transfer motions across different humanoid embodiments, such as human-to-robot and robot-to-robot, enabling scalable data generation for embodied intelligence. A major challenge in this setting is that motion dynamics are partly transferable across embodiments, whereas appearance and morphology remain embodiment-specific. Existing approaches often entangle these factors, and many require paired data for every target embodiment, which limits scalability to new robots. We present OmniHumanoid, a framework that factorizes transferable motion learning and embodiment-specific adaptation. Our method learns a shared motion transfer model from motion-aligned paired videos spanning multiple embodiments, while adapting to a new embodiment using only unpaired videos through lightweight embodiment-specific adapters. To reduce interference between motion transfer and embodiment adaptation, we further introduce a branch-isolated attention design that separates motion conditioning from embodiment-specific modulation. In addition, we construct a synthetic cross-embodiment dataset with motion-aligned paired videos rendered across diverse humanoid assets, scenes, and viewpoints. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that OmniHumanoid achieves strong motion fidelity and embodiment consistency, while enabling scalable adaptation to unseen humanoid embodiments without retraining the shared motion model.

AI.tldr: OmniHumanoid 提出了一种解耦运动迁移与外观形态的跨具身视频生成框架，通过共享运动模型与轻量级具身适配器，实现了从多具身配准视频中学习可迁移运动，并仅使用未配准视频即可泛化到新的人形机器人，无需重新训练共享模型。
AI.motivation: 现有跨具身视频生成方法往往将运动动力学与外观形态纠缠在一起，且多数方法需要为目标具身提供配准数据，这严重限制了向新机器人泛化的可扩展性。
AI.method: OmniHumanoid 提出解耦框架，包含一个从多具身配准视频中学习的共享运动迁移模型，以及针对新具身仅使用未配准视频微调的轻量级具身适配器；同时引入支路隔离注意力机制，将运动条件与具身特定调制相分离以减少干扰；此外还构建了一个包含多样化人形资产、场景和视角的合成跨具身数据集。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界基准上的实验表明，OmniHumanoid 实现了高水平的运动保真度与具身一致性，并能在不重新训练共享运动模型的情况下，可扩展地适配未见过的目标人形具身。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了解耦运动迁移与具身适应是实现可扩展跨具身视频生成的关键路径，在不依赖配准数据的前提下实现了对新机器人具身的有效泛化，为具身智能中的大规模数据生成提供了可行方案。

title: TAR: Text Semantic Assisted Cross-modal Image Registration Framework for Optical and SAR Images
summary: Existing deep learning-based methods can capture shared features from optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images for spatial alignment. However, optical-SAR registration remains challenging under large geometric deformations, because the model needs to simultaneously handle cross-modal appearance discrepancies and complex spatial transformations. To address this issue, this paper proposes a text semantic-assisted cross-modal image registration framework, named TAR, for optical and SAR images. TAR exploits text semantic priors from remote sensing scenes and land-cover categories to alleviate the modality gap and enhance cross-modal feature learning. TAR consists of three components: a multi-scale visual feature learning (MSFL) module, a text-assisted feature enhancement (TAFE) module, and a coarse-to-fine dense matching (CFDM) module. MSFL extracts multi-scale visual features from optical and SAR images. TAFE constructs text descriptors related to remote sensing scenes and land-cover objects, and uses a frozen RemoteCLIP text encoder to extract text features. These text features are introduced through visual-text interaction to enhance high-level visual features for more reliable coarse matching. CFDM then establishes coarse correspondences based on the enhanced high-level features and refines the matched locations using low-level features. Experimental results on cross-modal remote sensing images demonstrate the effectiveness of TAR, which achieves stronger matching performance than several state-of-the-art methods and yields significant gains under large geometric deformations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种文本语义辅助的跨模态图像配准框架TAR，通过引入遥感场景和地物类别的文本先验来缓解光学与SAR图像之间的模态差异，并在大几何形变条件下实现了优于现有方法的配准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的配准方法虽能提取光学与SAR图像的共享特征，但在大几何形变条件下难以同时应对跨模态外观差异和复杂空间变换，导致配准性能严重下降。
AI.method: TAR由三个模块组成：多尺度视觉特征学习模块提取光学和SAR图像的多尺度视觉特征；文本辅助特征增强模块利用冻结的RemoteCLIP文本编码器提取遥感场景和地物类别的文本描述特征，通过视觉-文本交互增强高层视觉特征；粗到精密集匹配模块先在增强后的高层特征上建立粗对应关系，再通过低层特征细化匹配位置。
AI.result: 在跨模态遥感图像上的实验结果表明，TAR在匹配性能上优于多种现有方法，并在大几何形变条件下取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 利用文本语义先验能够有效缓解光学与SAR图像之间的模态差异并增强跨模态特征学习，为大几何形变下的跨模态图像配准提供了新的解决思路。

title: Anomaly-Aware Vision-Language Adapters for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: Zero-shot anomaly detection aims to identify defects in unseen categories without target-specific training. Existing methods usually apply the same feature transformation to all samples, treating normal and anomalous data uniformly despite their fundamentally asymmetric distributions, compact normals versus diverse anomalies. We instead exploit this natural asymmetry by proposing AVA-DINO, an anomaly-aware vision-language adaptation framework with dual specialized branches for normal and anomalous patterns that adapt frozen DINOv3 visual features. During training on auxiliary data, the two branches are learned jointly with a text-guided routing mechanism and explicit routing regularization that encourages branch specialization. At test time, only the input image and fixed, predefined language descriptions are used to dynamically combine the two branches, enabling an asymmetric activation. This design prevents degenerate uniform routing and allows context-specific feature transformations. Experiments across nine industrial and medical benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 93.5% image-AUROC on MVTec-AD and strong cross-domain generalization to medical imaging without domain-specific fine-tuning. https://github.com/aqeeelmirza/AVA-DINO

AI.tldr: 提出AVA-DINO，一种利用正常与异常样本固有非对称性的零样本异常检测框架，通过双分支视觉-语言适配与文本引导路由机制，在九个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本异常检测方法对所有样本应用相同的特征变换，忽略了正常样本分布紧凑而异常样本分布多样的固有非对称性，导致无法充分捕捉正常与异常模式之间的本质差异。
AI.method: AVA-DINO基于冻结的DINOv3视觉特征，设计双分支适配架构分别处理正常和异常模式；通过文本引导路由机制和显式路由正则化联合训练两个分支，防止退化均匀路由；测试时仅依赖输入图像和预定义语言描述动态组合双分支，实现非对称激活和上下文感知的特征变换。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD上达到93.5%图像级AUROC，在九个工业和医学基准数据集上均取得最先进性能，无需领域特定微调即可强泛化到医学影像领域。
AI.conclusion: 利用异常检测中正常与异常样本的固有非对称性设计双分支架构是零样本异常检测的有效策略；文本引导的动态路由机制能实现上下文特定的特征变换，显著提升跨域泛化能力。

title: UniCustom: Unified Visual Conditioning for Multi-Reference Image Generation
summary: Multi-reference image generation aims to synthesize images from textual instructions while faithfully preserving subject identities from multiple reference images. Existing VLM-enhanced diffusion models commonly rely on decoupled visual conditioning: semantic ViT features are processed by the VLM for instruction understanding, whereas appearance-rich VAE features are injected later into the diffusion backbone. Despite its intuitive design, this separation makes it difficult for the model to associate each semantically grounded subject with visual details from the correct reference image. As a result, the model may recognize which subject is being referred to, but fail to preserve its identity and fine-grained appearance, leading to attribute leakage and cross-reference confusion in complex multi-reference settings. To address this issue, we propose UniCustom, a unified visual conditioning framework that fuses ViT and VAE features before VLM encoding. This early fusion exposes the VLM to both semantic cues and appearance-rich details, enabling its hidden states to jointly encode the referred subject and corresponding visual appearance with only a lightweight linear fusion layer. To learn such unified representations, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: reconstruction-oriented pretraining that preserves reference-specific appearance details in the fused hidden states, followed by supervised finetuning on single- and multi-reference generation tasks. We further introduce a slot-wise binding regularization that encourages each image slot to preserve low-level details of its corresponding reference, thereby reducing cross-reference entanglement. Experiments on two multi-reference generation benchmarks demonstrate that UniCustom consistently improves subject consistency, instruction following, and compositional fidelity over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: UniCustom提出了一个统一的视觉条件控制框架，通过在VLM编码之前融合ViT和VAE特征，并采用两阶段训练策略和插槽式绑定正则化，有效解决了多参考图像生成中的属性泄露和交叉参考混淆问题，在多个基准上显著提升了主体一致性和组合保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM增强的扩散模型采用解耦的视觉条件控制（VLM处理语义ViT特征，扩散骨干网络后期注入富含外观的VAE特征），这种分离设计导致模型难以将每个语义主体与对应参考图像的正确视觉细节关联起来，在复杂多参考场景中容易出现属性泄露和交叉参考混淆，即模型虽能识别所指主体但无法保留其身份和细粒度外观。
AI.method: UniCustom提出统一视觉条件框架，在VLM编码之前通过轻量线性融合层将ViT特征和VAE特征进行早期融合，使VLM的隐藏状态能够同时编码所指主体及其对应的视觉外观；采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段面向重建的预训练以保留融合隐藏状态中参考特有的外观细节，第二阶段在单参考和多参考生成任务上进行监督微调；进一步引入插槽式绑定正则化，鼓励每个图像插槽保留其对应参考的低级细节，减少交叉参考纠缠。
AI.result: 在两个多参考图像生成基准上的实验表明，UniCustom在主体一致性、指令遵循能力和组合保真度方面持续优于强基线方法，有效缓解了属性泄露和交叉参考混淆问题。
AI.conclusion: 早期融合ViT和VAE特征使VLM能够同时编码语义信息和外观细节，是一种高效且轻量的多参考生成范式；两阶段训练策略和插槽式绑定正则化对于学习解耦且保真的多参考表示至关重要，为复杂多主体可控生成提供了可行方向。

title: Cross-Modal-Domain Generalization Through Semantically Aligned Discrete Representations
summary: Multimodal learning seeks to integrate information across diverse sensory sources, yet current approaches struggle to balance cross-modal generalizability with modality-specific structure. Continuous (implicit) methods preserve fine-grained priors but render generalization challenging, while discrete (explicit) approaches enforce shared prototypes at the expense of modality specificity. We introduce CoDAAR (Cross-modal Discrete Alignment And Reconstruction), a novel framework that resolves this long-standing trade-off by establishing semantic consensus across modality-specific codebooks through index-level alignment. This design uniquely allows CoDAAR to preserve modality-unique structures while achieving generalizable cross-modal representations within a unified discrete space. CoDAAR combines two complementary mechanisms: Discrete Temporal Alignment (DTA), which enables fine-grained temporal quantization, and Cascading Semantic Alignment (CSA), which promotes progressive cross-modal semantic agreement. Together, they establish a competition-free unified representation space. Trained with self-supervised reconstruction objectives on paired multimodal sequences, CoDAAR demonstrates robust cross-modal and cross-domain generalization. Across Cross-Modal Generalization benchmarks, including event classification, localization, video segmentation, and cross-dataset transfer, CoDAAR achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new paradigm for discrete and generalizable multimodal representation learning.

AI.tldr: CoDAAR 提出一种跨模态离散对齐与重建框架，通过索引级语义对齐平衡了模态特异性和跨模态泛化性，在多个跨模态泛化基准上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态学习方法难以同时兼顾跨模态泛化能力与模态特异性结构：连续隐式方法保留细粒度先验但泛化困难，离散显式方法强制共享原型却损失模态特定信息，两者之间存在长期未解决的权衡。
AI.method: CoDAAR 框架通过索引级对齐建立跨模态码本间的语义共识，在统一离散空间中同时保留模态独有结构并实现可泛化的跨模态表征；包含两种互补机制：离散时间对齐（DTA）实现细粒度时间量化，级联语义对齐（CSA）促进渐进式跨模态语义一致，整体通过自监督重建目标在配对多模态序列上训练。
AI.result: 在事件分类、定位、视频分割和跨数据集迁移等跨模态泛化基准测试中，CoDAAR 取得了最先进的性能，验证了其在离散且可泛化的多模态表征学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CoDAAR 通过索引级离散对齐有效解决了多模态学习中泛化性与特异性之间的固有权衡，为构建通用且保留模态细节的多模态表征学习建立了新范式。

title: Self-Consistent Latent Reasoning: Long Latent Sequence Reasoning for Vision-Language Model
summary: In language reasoning, longer chains of thought consistently yield better performance, which naturally suggests that visual latent reasoning may likewise benefit from longer latent sequences. However, we discover a counterintuitive phenomenon: the performance of existing latent visual reasoning methods systematically degrades as the latent sequence grows longer. We reveal the root cause: Information Gain Collapse -- autoregressive generation makes each step highly dependent on prior outputs, so subsequent tokens can barely introduce new information. We further identify that heavily pooled ($\geq 128\times$) image embeddings used as supervision targets provide no more signal than meaningless placeholders. Motivated by these insights, we propose SCOLAR (Self-COnsistent LAtent Reasoning), which introduces a lightweight detransformer that leverages the LLM's full-sequence hidden states to generate auxiliary visual tokens in a single shot, with each token independently anchored to the original visual space. Combined with three-stage SFT and ALPO reinforcement learning, SCOLAR extends acceptable latent CoT length by over $30\times$, achieves state-of-the-art among open-source models on real-world reasoning benchmarks (+14.12% over backbone), and demonstrates strong out-of-distribution generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉潜在推理中延长潜在序列会导致性能下降的反直觉现象，揭示了其根源为信息增益崩溃，并提出SCOLAR方法，通过轻量级解变换器与三阶段SFT及ALPO强化学习，将可接受潜在思维链长度提升30倍以上，在现实推理基准上取得开源模型最优性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然语言推理中更长的思维链能持续提升性能，但现有视觉潜在推理方法在延长潜在序列长度时性能反而系统性下降，这一反直觉现象构成了核心研究空白与待解决问题。
AI.method: SCOLAR引入轻量级解变换器（detransformer），利用LLM完整序列的隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，每个token独立锚定到原始视觉空间；结合三阶段监督微调（SFT）和ALPO强化学习，实现更长的有效潜在推理链。
AI.result: SCOLAR将可接受的潜在思维链长度扩展超过30倍，在现实推理基准上达到开源模型最优水平，相较骨干模型提升14.12%，并展现出强分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了视觉潜在推理中信息增益崩溃的根本机制——自回归生成导致后续token几乎不引入新信息，且高度池化的图像嵌入作为监督目标等同于无效占位符；SCOLAR验证了通过解耦生成与锚定视觉空间可有效突破这一瓶颈。

title: Enhancing Domain Generalization in 3D Human Pose Estimation through Controllable Generative Augmentation
summary: Pedestrian motion, due to its causal nature, is strongly influenced by domain gaps arising from discrepancies between training and testing data distributions. Focusing on 3D human pose estimation, this work presents a controllable human pose generation framework that synthesizes diverse video data by systematically varying poses, backgrounds, and camera viewpoints. This generative augmentation enriches training datasets, enhances model generalization, and alleviates the limitations of existing methods in handling domain discrepancies. By leveraging both indoor/real-world and outdoor/virtual datasets, we perform cross-domain data fusion and controllable video generation to construct enriched training data, tailored to realistic deployment settings. Extensive experiments show that the augmented datasets significantly improve model performance on unseen scenarios and datasets, validating the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种可控人体姿态生成框架，通过系统性地改变姿态、背景和相机视角合成多样化视频数据，以增强训练集并提升3D人体姿态估计模型对领域差异的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 行人运动具有因果性，容易受到训练与测试数据分布不一致所导致的领域差异的强烈影响。现有方法在处理领域差异方面存在局限性，需要通过可控的数据增强手段来提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了一种可控人体姿态生成框架，通过系统性地改变姿态、背景和相机视角来合成多样化的视频数据。该框架利用室内/真实世界与室外/虚拟数据集进行跨领域数据融合，并实现可控视频生成，从而构建针对实际部署场景定制的增强训练数据。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，使用增强后的数据集显著提升了模型在未见场景和数据集上的性能，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过生成式数据增强可以丰富训练数据集，有效缓解领域差异问题，提升3D人体姿态估计模型在实际部署环境中的泛化能力。这一思路为处理多源数据分布不匹配问题提供了可行的解决方案。

title: TriBand-BEV: Real-Time LiDAR-Only 3D Pedestrian Detection via Height-Aware BEV and High-Resolution Feature Fusion
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2026)
summary: Safe autonomous agents and mobile robots need fast real time 3D perception, especially for vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as pedestrians. We introduce a new bird's eye view (BEV) encoding, which maps the full 3D LiDAR point cloud into a light-weight 2D BEV tensor with three height bands. We explicitly reformulate 3D detection as a 2D detection problem and then reconstruct 3D boxes from the BEV outputs. A single network detects cars, pedestrians, and cyclists in one pass. The backbone uses area attention at deep stages, a hierarchical bidirectional neck over P1 to P4 fuses context and detail, and the head predicts oriented boxes with distribution focal learning for side offsets and a rotated IoU loss. Training applies a small vertical re bin and a mild reflectance jitter in channel space to resist memorization. We use an interquartile range (IQR) filter to remove noisy and outlier LiDAR points during 3D reconstruction. On KITTI dataset, TriBand-BEV attains 58.7/52.6/47.2 pedestrian BEV AP(%) for easy, moderate, and hard at 49 FPS on a single consumer GPU, surpassing Complex-YOLO, with gains of +12.6%, +7.5%, and +3.1%. Qualitative scenes show stable detection under occlusion. The pipeline is compact and ready for real time robotic deployment. Our source code is publicly available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: TriBand-BEV 提出一种基于鸟瞰图的三波段高度编码方法，将3D LiDAR点云转换为轻量2D BEV张量，在单次前向传播中统一检测汽车、行人和骑行者，在KITTI数据集上以49 FPS实现行人检测AP 58.7%/52.6%/47.2%，显著优于Complex-YOLO。
AI.motivation: 安全自主代理和移动机器人需要快速实时3D感知，特别是针对行人等弱势道路使用者的检测；现有方法在实时性与检测精度之间难以兼顾，且多类别统一检测框架仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 提出TriBand-BEV框架，将完整3D LiDAR点云映射为三高度波段的轻量2D BEV张量，将3D检测显式重构为2D检测问题，再从BEV输出重建3D边界框；骨干网络在深层使用区域注意力，设计层次化双向颈部融合P1至P4层的上下文与细节，检测头采用分布聚焦学习预测侧向偏移并引入旋转IoU损失；训练中应用小尺度垂直重分箱和适度反射率抖动以抵抗过拟合，3D重建阶段使用四分位距滤波器去除噪声和离群LiDAR点。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，TriBand-BEV在单张消费级GPU上以49 FPS运行，行人BEV AP在简单、中等、困难级别分别达到58.7%、52.6%、47.2%，超越Complex-YOLO，增益分别为+12.6%、+7.5%、+3.1%；定性场景显示在遮挡条件下检测稳定。
AI.conclusion: TriBand-BEV通过轻量BEV编码和统一的2D检测范式，在实时性与精度之间取得了有效平衡，适用于真实机器人部署；代码已公开，为后续基于BEV的实时3D感知研究提供了可靠基线。

title: UHR-Micro: Diagnosing and Mitigating the Resolution Illusion in Earth Observation VLMs
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly operate on ultra-high-resolution (UHR) Earth observation imagery, yet they remain vulnerable to a severe scale mismatch between large-scale scene context and micro-scale targets. We refer to this empirical gap as a "resolution illusion": higher input resolution provides the appearance of richer visual detail, but does not necessarily yield reliable perception of spatially small, task-relevant evidence. To benchmark this challenge, we introduce UHR-Micro, a benchmark comprising 11,253 instructions grounded in 1,212 UHR images, designed to evaluate VLMs at the spatial limits of native Earth observation imagery. UHR-Micro spans diverse micro-target scales, context requirements, task families, and visual conditions, and provides diagnostic annotations that support controlled evaluation and fine-grained error attribution. Experiments with representative high-resolution VLMs show substantial failures in spatial grounding and evidence parsing, despite access to high-resolution inputs. Further analysis suggests that these failures are not fully resolved by increasing model capacity, but are closely tied to insufficient guidance in locating and using task-relevant micro-evidence. Motivated by this finding, we propose Micro-evidence Active Perception (MAP), a reference agent that decomposes queries into evidence-seeking steps, actively inspects candidate regions, and grounds its answers in localized observations. MAP-Agent improves micro-level perception by making high-resolution reasoning evidence-centered rather than image-centered. Together, UHR-Micro and MAP-Agent provide a diagnostic platform for evaluating, understanding, and advancing high-resolution reasoning in Earth observation VLMs. Datasets and source code were released at https://github.com/MiliLab/UHR-Micro.

AI.tldr: 本文发现高分辨率遥感影像中视觉语言模型存在"分辨率错觉"现象，即高分辨率输入并不能保证对微尺度目标的可靠感知；为此构建了UHR-Micro基准（11,253条指令、1,212张超高分辨率图像）并提出MAP-Agent代理框架，通过将查询分解为主动证据搜索步骤来提升微尺度感知能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在处理超高分辨率地球观测影像时面临大尺度场景上下文与微尺度目标之间的严重尺度失配问题，高分辨率输入虽然提供了丰富的视觉细节，但并不能保证模型可靠地感知空间上极小且任务相关的证据，作者将此经验性差距定义为"分辨率错觉"。
AI.method: 构建了UHR-Micro基准数据集，包含11,253条指令及其对应的1,212张超高分辨率遥感图像，覆盖多种微目标尺度、上下文需求、任务类型和视觉条件，提供诊断性标注以支持受控评估和细粒度错误归因；并提出Micro-evidence Active Perception (MAP)代理框架，将用户查询分解为证据搜索步骤，主动检查候选区域并将答案锚定在局部观测上，使高分辨率推理从以图像为中心转向以证据为中心。
AI.result: 在代表性高分辨率VLM上的实验表明，尽管模型能访问高分辨率输入，但在空间定位和证据解析方面仍存在严重失败；进一步分析发现，这些失败无法仅通过增加模型容量来解决，而是与模型在定位和使用任务相关微证据方面缺乏足够引导密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM在高分辨率遥感领域的一个关键盲区——分辨率并不等同于感知可靠性，并提供了UHR-Micro和MAP-Agent作为诊断平台和解决方案，为理解与推进地球观测VLM中的高分辨率推理能力提供了评估工具和有效范式。

title: H3D-MarNet: Wavelet-Guided Dual-Path Learning for Metal Artifact Suppression and CT Modality Transformation for Radiotherapy Workflows
comment: Accepted for publication at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition, Lyon, France August, 17-22, 2026
summary:
Metal artifacts in computed tomography (CT) severely degrade image quality, compromising diagnostic accuracy and radiotherapy planning, especially in cancer patients with high-density implants. We propose H3D-MarNet, a two-stage framework for artifact-aware CT domain transformation from kilo-voltage CT (kVCT) to mega-voltage CT (MVCT). In the first stage, a wavelet-based preprocessing module suppresses metal-induced artifacts through frequency-aware denoising while preserving anatomical structures. In second stage, Domain-TransNet performs kVCT-to-MVCT domain transformation using a hybrid volumetric learning architecture. Domain-TransNet integrates a CNN-based encoder to capture fine-grained local anatomical details and a transformer-based encoder to model long-range volumetric dependencies. The complementary representations are fused through an attention-based feature fusion mechanism to ensure spatial and contextual coherence across slices. A multi-stage, attention-guided decoder, supported by deep supervision, progressively reconstructs artifact-suppressed MVCT volumes.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate that H3D-MarNet achieves 28.14 dB PSNR and 0.717 SSIM on artifact-affected slices from full dataset, indicating effective metal artifact suppression and anatomical preservation, highlighting its potential for reliable CT modality transformation in clinical radiotherapy workflows.

AI.tldr: H3D-MarNet 提出了一种两阶段框架，结合小波预处理与混合CNN-Transformer体积学习架构，实现从kVCT到MVCT的伪影感知域转换，在伪影切片上达到28.14 dB PSNR和0.717 SSIM，有效抑制金属伪影并保留解剖结构。
AI.motivation: CT图像中的金属伪影严重降低图像质量，影响诊断准确性和放疗规划，尤其对植入高密度植入物的癌症患者影响显著。现有方法难以在抑制金属伪影的同时有效保留解剖结构，且缺乏从kVCT到MVCT的可靠域转换框架。
AI.method: H3D-MarNet采用两阶段框架：第一阶段利用基于小波的预处理模块，通过频率感知去噪抑制金属伪影并保留解剖结构；第二阶段通过Domain-TransNet执行kVCT到MVCT的域转换，该网络集成CNN编码器捕捉细粒度局部解剖细节与Transformer编码器建模长程体素依赖关系，通过注意力特征融合机制确保空间与上下文一致性，并采用多阶段注意力引导解码器结合深度监督逐步重建伪影抑制的MVCT体数据。
AI.result: 在包含伪影的全数据集切片上，H3D-MarNet达到28.14 dB PSNR和0.717 SSIM，表明该方法在有效抑制金属伪影的同时良好保留了解剖结构，证明了其在临床放疗流程中实现可靠CT模态转换的潜力。
AI.conclusion: H3D-MarNet通过小波预处理与混合CNN-Transformer架构的有效结合，在kVCT到MVCT域转换中实现了优异的金属伪影抑制效果与解剖结构保留能力，为临床放疗中可靠的CT模态变换提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

title: From Image Hashing to Scene Change Detection
summary: Image hashing provides compact representations for efficient storage and retrieval but is inherently limited to global comparison and cannot reason about where changes occur. This limitation prevents hashing from being directly applicable to scene change detection, where spatial localization is essential. In this work, we revisit hashing from a scene change detection perspective and propose HashSCD, a patch-wise hashing framework that enables both efficient global change detection and localized change identification. HashSCD encodes spatially aligned patches into compact hash codes and aggregates them through an XOR-like operation, allowing change detection and localization to be performed directly in the Hamming space without repeated inference on previous images. The model is trained in an unsupervised manner using contrastive learning at both patch and global levels. Experiments demonstrate that HashSCD achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art unsupervised hashing and scene change detection methods, while significantly reducing computational cost and storage requirements.

AI.tldr: HashSCD提出了一种基于分块哈希的无监督场景变化检测框架，通过将空间对齐的图像块编码为紧凑哈希码并在汉明空间中执行类XOR操作，实现了高效的全局变化检测与局部变化定位，在显著降低计算和存储开销的同时取得了与现有方法竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统图像哈希方法仅支持全局比较，无法定位变化发生的位置，这一根本性限制使其难以直接应用于需要空间定位能力的场景变化检测任务。现有方法要么计算开销大，要么无法同时兼顾高效的全局变化检测和准确的局部变化定位。
AI.method: HashSCD采用分块哈希框架，将空间对齐的图像块编码为紧凑哈希码，并通过类XOR操作在汉明空间中直接完成变化检测与定位，无需对历史图像进行重复推理。模型以无监督方式训练，在图像块级别和全局级别上联合使用对比学习目标进行优化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，HashSCD在性能上与最先进的无监督哈希方法和场景变化检测方法相当，同时显著降低了计算成本和存储需求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将哈希技术从全局比较拓展到空间定位场景，证明了分块哈希与汉明空间操作相结合能够有效支撑变化检测任务，为实现高效、轻量级的场景变化检测提供了新思路。

title: Beyond Text Prompts: Visual-to-Visual Generation as A Unified Paradigm
summary:
Humans often specify and create through visual artifacts: typography sheets, sketches, reference images, and annotated scenes. Yet modern visual generators still ask users to serialize this intent into text, a bottleneck that compresses signals like spatial structure, exact appearance, and glyph shape. We propose \textbf{\emph{visual-to-visual} (V2V)} generation, in which the user conditions a generative model with a visual specification page rather than a text prompt. The page is not an edit target, but a visual document that specifies the desired output. We introduce \textbf{V2V-Zero}, a training-free framework that exposes this interface in existing vision-language model (VLM) conditioned generators by replacing text-only conditioning with final-layer hidden states extracted from visual pages, exploiting the fact that the frozen VLM already maps both text and images into the generator's conditioning space.
  On GenEval, V2V-Zero reaches 0.85 with a frozen Qwen-Image backbone, closely matching its optimized text-to-image performance without fine-tuning. To evaluate the broader V2V space, we introduce \textbf{Simple-V2V Bench}, spanning seven visual-conditioning tasks and seven models, including GPT Image 2, Nano Banana 2, Seedream 5.0 Lite, open-weight baselines, and a video extension. V2V-Zero scores 32.7/100, outperforming evaluated open-weight image baselines and revealing a clear capability hierarchy: attribute binding is strong, content generation is unreliable, and structural control remains hard even for commercial systems. A HunyuanVideo-1.5 extension scores 20.2/100, showing the interface transfers beyond images. Mechanistic analysis shows the default reasoning path is primarily visually routed, with 95.0\% of conditioning-token attention mass on visual-page hidden states.

AI.tldr: 提出视觉到视觉（V2V）生成范式及训练无关框架V2V-Zero，利用冻结VLM的最终层隐藏状态将视觉规格页面直接映射到生成器条件空间，在GenEval达0.85，无需微调即可匹配优化后的文生图性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉生成模型要求用户将视觉意图（如空间结构、精确外观、字形）序列化为文本提示，这一文本瓶颈严重压缩了丰富视觉信号的表达能力。
AI.method: 提出V2V生成范式，用户以视觉规格页面（而非文本提示）条件化生成模型；提出V2V-Zero训练无关框架，通过提取冻结VLM对视觉页面的最终层隐藏状态，替换原有文本条件输入，利用VLM已具备的图文联合嵌入空间实现跨模态条件对齐。
AI.result: V2V-Zero在GenEval上以冻结Qwen-Image骨干达到0.85，接近优化后的文生图性能；在Simple-V2V Bench上（含7项视觉条件任务、7个模型）得32.7/100，优于开放权重基线；HunyuanVideo-1.5视频扩展得20.2/100；机制分析显示95.0%的条件标记注意力落在视觉页面隐藏状态上。
AI.conclusion: V2V范式有效突破了文本提示的序列化瓶颈，验证了冻结VLM可同时编码文本与图像到生成器条件空间；属性绑定能力强但内容生成不可靠，结构控制仍是难点；该接口可跨模态迁移至视频生成领域。

title: Large-Small Model Collaboration for Farmland Semantic Change Detection
summary: Farmland Semantic Change Detection (SCD) is essential for cultivated land protection, yet existing benchmarks and models remain insufficient for fine-grained farmland conversion monitoring. Current datasets often lack dedicated "from-to" annotations, while visual change detection models are easily disturbed by phenology-induced pseudo-changes caused by crop rotation, seasonal variation, and illumination differences. To address these challenges, we construct HZNU-FCD, a large-scale fine-grained farmland SCD benchmark with a unified five-class farmland-to-non-farmland annotation protocol. It contains 4,588 bitemporal image pairs with pixel-level labels for practical farmland protection. Based on this benchmark, we propose a large-small collaborative SCD framework that integrates a task-driven small visual model with a frozen large vision-language model. The small model, Fine-grained Difference-aware Mamba (FD-Mamba), learns dense change representations for boundary preservation and small-region localization. The large-model pathway, Cross-modal Logical Arbitration (CMLA), introduces CLIP-based textual priors for prompt-guided semantic arbitration and pseudo-change suppression. To enable effective collaboration, we design a hard-region co-training strategy that supervises the CMLA semantic score map only on low-confidence pixels. Experiments show that our method achieves 97.63% F1, 96.32% IoU, and 96.35% SCD_IoU_mean on HZNU-FCD with only 6.65M trainable parameters. Compared with the multimodal ChangeCLIP-ViT, which leverages vision-language information for change detection, our method improves F1 by 10.19 percentage points on HZNU-FCD. It also achieves 91.43% F1 and 84.21% IoU on LEVIR-CD, and 93.85% F1 and 88.41% IoU on WHU-CD, demonstrating strong robustness and generalization. The code is available at https://github.com/Lovelymili/FD-Mamba.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了大规模细粒度农田语义变化检测基准HZNU-FCD，并提出一种大-小模型协同框架（FD-Mamba + CMLA），通过冻结的大视觉语言模型提供文本先验以抑制伪变化，在多个数据集上取得SOTA结果，参数量仅6.65M。
AI.motivation: 现有农田语义变化检测（SCD）基准和模型在细粒度农田转换监测方面存在不足：当前数据集缺乏专用的"从-到"变化标注，而视觉变化检测模型易受作物轮作、季节变化和光照差异引起的物候伪变化干扰，难以准确区分真实农田转换与表观变化。
AI.method: 提出了一个大规模细粒度农田SCD基准HZNU-FCD（4,588对双时相图像，统一五类农田-非农田标注协议），并设计了大-小模型协同变化检测框架：小模型路径为细粒度差异感知Mamba（FD-Mamba），用于密集变化表征、边界保持和小区域定位；大模型路径为跨模态逻辑仲裁（CMLA），利用冻结的CLIP模型引入文本先验进行语义仲裁和伪变化抑制；两类模型通过置信度引导的硬区域共训练策略在低置信度像素上协同监督。
AI.result: 该方法在HZNU-FCD上达到97.63% F1、96.32% IoU和96.35% SCD_IoU_mean，仅6.65M可训练参数；相比多模态ChangeCLIP-ViT，F1提升10.19个百分点；在LEVIR-CD上达91.43% F1和84.21% IoU，在WHU-CD上达93.85% F1和88.41% IoU，展现了强鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，将轻量视觉模型与冻结的大视觉语言模型通过文本先验引导和硬区域协同训练相结合，能有效抑制物候伪变化、提升细粒度农田变化检测精度，为该方向的基准和模型设计提供了新的范式。

title: Images in Sentences: Scaling Interleaved Instructions for Unified Visual Generation
summary: While recent advancements in multimodal language models have enabled image generation from expressive multi-image instructions, existing methods struggle to maintain performance under complex interleaved instructions. This limitation stems from the structural separation of images and text in current paradigms, which forces models to bridge difficult long-range dependencies to match descriptions with visual targets. To address these challenges, we propose \texttt{I}mages i\texttt{N} \texttt{SE}n\texttt{T}ences (\textit{a.k.a}, INSET), a unified generation model that seamlessly embeds images as native vocabulary within textual instructions. By positioning visual features directly at their corresponding semantic slots, INSET leverages the contextual locality of transformers for precise object binding, effectively treating images as dense, expressive language tokens. Furthermore, we introduce a scalable data engine that synthesizes 15M high-quality interleaved samples from standard image and video datasets, utilizing VLMs and LLMs to construct rich, long-horizon sequences. Evaluation results on InterleaveBench demonstrate that INSET significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in multi-image consistency and text alignment, with performance gaps widening as input complexity increases. Beyond standard generation, our approach inherently extends to multimodal image editing, integrating visual content as part of the instruction to facilitate highly expressive and creative visual manipulations.

AI.tldr: INSET提出了一种统一生成模型，将图像作为原生词汇无缝嵌入文本指令中，利用Transformer的上下文局部性实现精确对象绑定，并通过可扩展数据引擎合成1500万高质量交织样本，在复杂交错指令下的图像生成任务中显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态语言模型在处理复杂交错指令时性能受限，根本原因在于当前范式将图像与文本结构分离，迫使模型通过难以建立的长程依赖关系将描述与视觉目标匹配，导致多图像一致性和文本对齐能力不足。
AI.method: INSET提出了一种统一生成模型，将图像作为原生词汇嵌入文本指令中，把视觉特征直接放置于对应语义槽位，利用Transformer的上下文局部性实现精确对象绑定；同时引入可扩展数据引擎，利用VLM和LLM从标准图像和视频数据集中合成1500万高质量长序列交织样本。
AI.result: 在InterleaveBench基准上的评估表明，INSET在多图像一致性和文本对齐方面显著优于现有最先进方法，且随着输入复杂度增加，性能差距进一步扩大；此外，该方法还能自然地扩展到多模态图像编辑任务中。
AI.conclusion: INSET通过将图像视为密集、表达丰富的语言令牌，有效解决了长程依赖匹配难题，为复杂交织指令下的图像生成提供了一种统一且可扩展的框架，并展现出在多模态图像编辑等下游任务中的广泛应用潜力。

title: Contrastive Learning under Noisy Temporal Self-Supervision for Colonoscopy Videos
summary: Learning robust representations of polyp tracklets is key to enabling multiple AI-assisted colonoscopy applications, from polyp characterization to automated reporting and retrieval. Supervised contrastive learning is an effective approach for learning such representations, but it typically relies on correct positive and negative definitions. Collecting these labels requires linking tracklets that depict the same underlying polyp entity throughout the video, which is costly and demands specialized clinical expertise. In this work, we leverage the sequential workflow of colonoscopy procedures to derive self-supervised associations from temporal structure. Since temporally derived associations are not guaranteed to be correct, we introduce a noise-aware contrastive loss to account for noisy associations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the learned representations across multiple downstream tasks, including polyp retrieval and re-identification, size estimation, and histology classification. Our method outperforms prior self-supervised and supervised baselines, and matches or exceeds recent foundation models across all tasks, using a lightweight encoder trained on only 27 videos. Code is available at https://github.com/lparolari/ntssl.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时间结构自监督关联的噪声感知对比学习框架，仅用27个视频训练的轻量级编码器即可在息肉检索、重识别、尺寸估计和组织学分类等任务上超越现有自监督、监督基线及基础模型。
AI.motivation: 监督对比学习依赖正确的正负样本定义，而收集此类标签需要对视频中同一息肉实体进行跨片段关联标注，成本高昂且需要专业临床知识，限制了其在息肉表征学习中的可扩展性。
AI.method: 利用结肠镜检查的时序工作流自动导出自监督关联，并设计噪声感知对比损失（Noise-Aware Contrastive Loss）来容错时序关联中可能存在的不正确配对，使用轻量级编码器在仅27个视频上进行训练。
AI.result: 该方法在息肉检索与重识别、尺寸估计和组织学分类等多个下游任务上超越了先前的自监督和监督基线，并在所有任务上匹配或超越了最新的基础模型。
AI.conclusion: 时序结构可作为低成本自监督信号用于息肉跟踪序列表征学习，噪声感知对比学习能有效处理自动关联中的错误，证明了轻量级模型在有限数据下学习到超越大规模基础模型的鲁棒表征的可能性。

title: VIP: Visual-guided Prompt Evolution for Efficient Dense Vision-Language Inference
summary: Pursuing training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in an efficient and generalizable manner remains challenging due to the deep-seated spatial bias in CLIP. To overcome the limitations of existing solutions, this work moves beyond the CLIP-based paradigm and harnesses the recent spatially-aware dino.txt framework to facilitate more efficient and high-quality dense prediction. While dino.txt exhibits robust spatial awareness, we find that the semantic ambiguity of text queries gives rise to severe mismatch within its dense cross-modal interactions. To address this, we introduce \textcolor{oursblue}{\textbf{VI}}sual-guided \textcolor{oursblue}{\textbf{P}}rompt evolution (\textcolor{oursblue}{\textbf{\textit{VIP}}}) to rectify the semantic expressiveness of text queries in dino.txt, unleashing its potential for fine-grained object perception. Towards this end, \VIP integrates alias expansion with a visual-guided distillation mechanism to mine valuable semantic cues, which are robustly aggregated in a saliency-aware manner to yield a high-fidelity prediction. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that \VIP: \ding{182} surpasses the top-leading methods by $1.4\% \sim 8.4\%$ average mIoU, \ding{183} generalizes well to diverse challenging domains, and \ding{184} requires marginal inference time and memory overhead. \href{https://github.com/MiSsU-HH/VIP}{Our code is publicly available at GitHub \faGithub}.

AI.tldr: 提出了VIP (Visual-guided Prompt Evolution)方法，通过视觉引导的提示演化机制修正DINOvT文本查询的语义模糊性，实现无需训练的高效开放词汇语义分割，平均mIoU超越领先方法1.4%~8.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法多基于CLIP范式，但CLIP存在深层空间偏差，限制了密集预测任务的效率与泛化性；虽然后续DINOvT框架具备更好的空间感知能力，但其跨模态交互中文本查询的语义歧义导致严重的不匹配问题。
AI.method: 本文提出VIP（Visual-guided Prompt Evolution）框架，该框架在DINOvT基础上引入别名扩展（alias expansion）与视觉引导蒸馏机制，以挖掘有价值的语义线索，并通过显著性感知（saliency-aware）方式鲁棒地聚合这些线索，最终生成高保真预测结果，整个过程无需训练。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，VIP在平均mIoU上超越顶级方法1.4%∼8.4%，在多种具有挑战性的域上展现出良好的泛化能力，并且仅需极少的推理时间和内存开销。
AI.conclusion: VIP通过视觉引导的提示演化有效修正了DINOvT中文本查询的语义歧义，释放了其在细粒度目标感知中的潜力，证明了超越CLIP范式、利用空间感知基础模型结合语义校准是开放词汇语义分割的高效且泛化性强的方向。

title: AOI-SSL: Self-Supervised Framework for Efficient Segmentation of Wire-bonded Semiconductors In Optical Inspection
comment: Accepted to the AI4RWC Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Segmentation models in automated optical inspection of wire-bonded semiconductors are typically device-specific and must be re-trained when new devices or distribution shifts appear. We introduce AOI-SSL, a training-efficient framework for semantic segmentation of wire-bonded semiconductors by combining small-domain self-supervised pre-training of vision transformers with in-context inference that minimizes the need of labeled examples. We pre-train SOTA self-supervised algorithms in a small industrial inspection dataset and find that Masked Autoencoders are the most effective in this small-data setting, improving downstream segmentation while reducing the labeled fine-tuning effort. We further introduce in-context, patch-level retrieval methods that predict masks directly from dense encoder embeddings with negligible additional training. We show that, in this setting, simple similarity-based retrieval performs on par with more complex attention-based aggregation used currently in the literature. Furthermore, our experiments demonstrate that self-supervised pre-training significantly improves segmentation quality compared to training from scratch and to ImageNet pre-trained backbones under a fixed fine-tuning computational budget. Finally, the results reveal that retrieval based segmentation outperforms fine-tuning when targeting single device images, allowing for near-instant adaptation to difficult samples.

AI.tldr: 提出AOI-SSL框架，通过小域自监督预训练视觉Transformer（以MAE最优）结合上下文补丁级检索方法，在半导体引线键合的无损检测中实现高效语义分割，显著降低标注需求并支持单设备图像的快速自适应。
AI.motivation: 现有引线键合半导体自动光学检测中的分割模型通常针对特定设备训练，当新设备出现或数据分布发生偏移时需要重新训练，缺乏跨设备的泛化能力和适应效率。
AI.method: 提出AOI-SSL训练高效框架，结合小域自监督预训练（对比Masked Autoencoders等方法在小型工业检测数据集上的效果）与上下文补丁级检索推理方法（包括基于相似度的检索和基于注意力的聚合），直接从编码器稠密嵌入预测分割掩码，几乎无需额外训练。
AI.result: 实验表明MAE在小数据自监督预训练中最有效，显著提升下游分割质量并减少标注微调需求；简单相似度检索与复杂注意力聚合表现相当；自监督预训练在固定微调预算下优于从头训练和ImageNet预训练主干；基于检索的分割在单设备图像上超越微调方法，实现近乎即时的难样本自适应。
AI.conclusion: 小域自监督预训练结合上下文检索可有效降低半导体AOI分割对标注数据的依赖，为设备快速切换和分布偏移应对提供了实用高效的解决方案。

title: SenseNova-U1: Unifying Multimodal Understanding and Generation with NEO-unify Architecture
summary: Recent large vision-language models (VLMs) remain fundamentally constrained by a persistent dichotomy: understanding and generation are treated as distinct problems, leading to fragmented architectures, cascaded pipelines, and misaligned representation spaces. We argue that this divide is not merely an engineering artifact, but a structural limitation that hinders the emergence of native multimodal intelligence. Hence, we introduce SenseNova-U1, a native unified multimodal paradigm built upon NEO-unify, in which understanding and generation evolve as synergistic views of a single underlying process. We launch two native unified variants, SenseNova-U1-8B-MoT and SenseNova-U1-A3B-MoT, built on dense (8B) and mixture-of-experts (30B-A3B) understanding baselines, respectively. Designed from first principles, they rival top-tier understanding-only VLMs across text understanding, vision-language perception, knowledge reasoning, agentic decision-making, and spatial intelligence. Meanwhile, they deliver strong semantic consistency and visual fidelity, excelling in conventional or knowledge-intensive any-to-image (X2I) synthesis, complex text-rich infographic generation, and interleaved vision-language generation, with or without think patterns. Beyond performance, we show detailed model design, data preprocessing, pre-/post-training, and inference strategies to support community research. Last but not least, preliminary evidence demonstrates that our models extend beyond perception and generation, performing strongly in vision-language-action (VLA) and world model (WM) scenarios. This points toward a broader roadmap where models do not translate between modalities, but think and act across them in a native manner. Multimodal AI is no longer about connecting separate systems, but about building a unified one and trusting the necessary capabilities to emerge from within.

AI.tldr: 提出SenseNova-U1，一种基于NEO-unify的原生统一多模态范式，将理解与生成融合为单一协同过程，在多种理解和生成任务上达到顶尖性能，并在VLA和世界模型场景中展现潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉-语言模型（VLM）存在理解与生成被割裂为独立问题的根本性二分，导致架构碎片化、级联流水线以及表示空间不对齐；作者认为这一分裂不仅是工程问题，更是阻碍原生多模态智能涌现的结构性限制。
AI.method: 提出SenseNova-U1原生统一多模态范式，基于NEO-unify框架构建，将理解与生成视为同一底层过程的协同视图；发布两个变体：SenseNova-U1-8B-MoT（密集8B参数）和SenseNova-U1-A3B-MoT（30B参数MoE，激活3B），并详细阐述了模型设计、数据预处理、预训练/后训练及推理策略。
AI.result: 在文本理解、视觉-语言感知、知识推理、智能体决策和空间智能上媲美顶级纯理解VLM；在常规/知识密集型任意图生成、复杂文图混合生成及交错视觉-语言生成中表现优异，具备强语义一致性和视觉保真度；初步证据表明其在视觉-语言-动作（VLA）和世界模型（WM）场景中表现强劲。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明多模态AI应从连接独立系统转向构建统一模型，使必要能力从内部涌现；模型不仅限于感知与生成，还能在多种模态间原生地思考与行动，为未来多模态智能发展提供了新路线图。
